2.trans: 今天，我们致敬...

3.trans: 它的杀戮欲暂时平息了。

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: Perhaps it just needs some reassurance.
describe_plantstressorhappiness.trans: 也许它只是需要一些保证。

announce_cold.en: I am chilled to the bone.

announce_elixir_ghostvision.en: My world is just as cold and dark without you, Abby.
announce_elixir_ghostvision.trans: 没有你，我的世界依旧冷酷黑暗，阿比。

announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.en: Oh. Maybe I could try making this new costume...
announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.trans: 噢，也许我能学着做这件新礼服……

1.en: Well, I've learned a little more. Even if it won't do me any good.
1.trans: 好吧，我又学到了一点东西。即使它不会给我带来任何好处。

announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.en: Closer to the judge would be best.

announce_plant_randomseed.en: It is buried. I wonder what will grow.
announce_plant_randomseed.trans: 它被埋没了。不知道会长出什么来。

announce_research.en: I now possess greater knowledge of this terrible world.
announce_research.trans: 我现在掌握了更多关于这个糟糕世界的知识。

2.trans: 殿下。

3.en: My kingdom for another day with her.
3.trans: 我愿用我的王国换与她再多待一天。

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: Like the death's own hand, come to snuff our fragile flame.
announce_lightsout_shadowhand.trans: 像死神的手一样，来掐灭我们柔弱的灯火。

announce_shadowthrall_stealth.trans: 露出你的真面目。我见过更糟糕的。

announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.en: I don't think we're alone here.
announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.trans: 这里除了我们应该还有别人。

out_of_water.en: I have no water left to give.

inuse.en: That pumpkin is being stabbed already.
inuse.trans: 那个南瓜已经有人在捅了。

targetincombat.en: I'll wait for it to calm down...

notallowed.en: It doesn't go there. I know the feeling.
notallowed.trans: 它不是放在那里的。我知道这种感觉。

inuse.en: No one wants to share with me.

notready.en: Perhaps when my life is in slightly less peril.
notready.trans: 也许等我的生命不受到威胁的时候再说。

hermitcrab_relocate.en: It's empty. I'll try again later.
hermitcrab_relocate.trans: 它是空的。我晚点再试试。

toofar.en: It has escaped death's cold embrace... for now.
toofar.trans: 它逃脱了死神冰冷的拥抱...只是暂时。

inmood.en: I don't think I can manage it while they're like this.
inmood.trans: 现在这样我没办法控制它。

beef_hitched.en: My beefalo can only leave when I choose it so.
beef_hitched.trans: 只有我让它走，我的皮弗娄牛才能走。

needbeef.en: Oh where could a beefalo be?
needbeef.trans: 我上哪找头皮弗娄牛去？

needbeef_closer.en: Come closer, dear beefalo. I won't hurt you.
needbeef_closer.trans: 过来点，亲爱的皮弗娄牛。我不会伤害你的。

busy.en: Oh... I can tell you're busy...
busy.trans: 哦…我能看得出来你很忙…

dead.en: They have no need of material possessions where they've gone.
dead.trans: 它们去的地方不需要任何物质。

sleeping.en: They look so peaceful... I'll come back later.
sleeping.trans: 他们看起来很平和…我很快就回来。

full.en: They're already too burdened by this world...
full.trans: 他们已经为这个世界操心太多…

unsuitable_for_plants.en: Perhaps if I wanted my garden to die a slow, painful death...
unsuitable_for_plants.trans: 也许如果我想让作物缓慢痛苦地死去的话……

notamerm.en: There is nothing for me in there.
notamerm.trans: 里面没有适合我的东西。

restricted.en: Can't always get what you want. Some never do.
restricted.trans: 不可能总是得到想要的东西。有些人永远得不到。

generic.en: Must everything in life be hard?
generic.trans: 生命经历的一切都必须这么艰难吗？

inuse.en: Take your time... I'll just watch.

generic.en: I... I can't.

no_racers.en: I suppose I'll have to go find some Carrats...
no_racers.trans: 看来我要去找几只胡萝卜鼠了……

mushroomfarm_needsshroom.en: It doesn't need that. It needs a mushroom.
mushroomfarm_needsshroom.trans: 它不需要那东西。它需要一个蘑菇。

dead.en: They've no need of material possessions where they've gone.
dead.trans: 它们去的地方不需要任何物质。

foodfull.en: It hasn't yet eaten our last sacrifice...
foodfull.trans: 它还没有吃掉我们上次供奉的祭品...

wrongshadowform.trans: 这些骨头胡乱拼装起来，怪可怕的...

sleeping.en: Another time. It's enjoying a temporary death right now...
sleeping.trans: 下次吧。现在它正在体验临时死亡。

notamonkey.en: I'm sorry... I don't know what you're trying to say...
notamonkey.trans: 我很抱歉……我不知道你想说什么……

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: It doesn't need that. It needs a magic log.
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 它不需要那东西。它需要一块魔法木头。

busy.en: It's too busy to pay attention to me...

pigkinggame_danger.en: Danger lurks. There's no time for games.
pigkinggame_danger.trans: 危险潜伏着。没有玩的时间了。

notgem.en: I don't think that will work there...
notgem.trans: 我不认为那东西在那里会有用...

terrarium_cooldown.en: I suppose it needs more time to recover from all it has been through.
terrarium_cooldown.trans: 它经历了那么多，故意要缓一缓。

pigkinggame_toolate.en: It's much too late for games.

cantshadowrevive.en: It has no will to live.

queenbusy.en: She doesn't have time for someone like me.
queenbusy.trans: 她没有时间给像我这样的人。

pigkinggame_messy.trans: 帮我清理一下，阿比盖尔。

generic.en: No... I can't...

spidernohat.en: I have a feeling the spider would get it all rumpled in my pocket.
spidernohat.trans: 我有预感蜘蛛会把它在我的口袋里弄得皱巴巴的。

abigailheart.trans: 阿比盖尔，为什么不起作用？

hashat.en: I can't crush that poor hat.
hashat.trans: 我不能压死那顶可怜的帽子。

melting.en: It's no use. It's the end for this one.

no_elixirable.en: I need Abby's flower to pour it on.
no_elixirable.trans: 我需要阿比盖尔之花才能继续。

targetincombat.en: I'll wait for it to calm down...

inuse.en: I'll have to be quicker to the saddle next time.
inuse.trans: 下次我会更快点爬上鞍具。

sleeping.en: It feels so cruel to wake it from its dreams...
sleeping.trans: 把它从梦中唤醒的感觉很残酷……

oneghost.en: I can only ferry one soul to their destination at a time...
oneghost.trans: 我一次只能渡一个灵魂到达目的地……

nohealth.en: I can't... I don't feel so good...

generic.en: only_used_by_walter

burning.en: I guess I won't be changing again anytime soon.
burning.trans: 我猜最近都换不了衣服了。

nooccupant.en: There's nothing here for me to groom...
nooccupant.trans: 这里没有可以让我打扮的东西...

inuse.en: I'd like to use that after you. If you don't mind, I mean.
inuse.trans: 我会在你之后使用那个。我是说你不介意的话。

notenoughhair.en: Perhaps once its fur grows in.

generic.en: What's the point.

nocarnival.en: The ravens have deserted this place... I think I'll miss them.
nocarnival.trans: 乌鸦们已经抛弃了这个地方……我想我会想念它们的。

pillowfight_no_handpillow.en: I don't even have a pillow to fight with...

notmybernie.en: It's doing what it does best.
notmybernie.trans: 它在做它最擅长的事情。

locked_gate.en: I can't open it without a key.
locked_gate.trans: 没有钥匙，我就打不开它。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: If we play now, they won't find a place to hide.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.trans: 如果我们现在玩，他们连藏身地都找不到。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: If we play now, they will stand no chance at winning.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.trans: 如果我们现在玩，他们将没有机会获胜。

hostbusy.en: I suppose he has more important things to do.
hostbusy.trans: 我想他有更重要的事情要做。

kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.en: If we play more, Abigail will get tired.
kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.trans: 如果我们接着玩，阿比盖尔会疲倦。

alreadyactive.en: He must be busy somewhere else.
alreadyactive.trans: 他一定在别的地方忙着。

doesntwork.en: Hello sir? He seems to be out.

shadowmagic.en: Do you want me to read you a story, Abigail?
shadowmagic.trans: 阿比盖尔，你想要我给你读故事吗？

toodeep.en: I can't catch anything out here with this flimsy rod.
toodeep.trans: 我用这根弱弱的鱼竿什么都抓不到。

wrongpiece.en: Will I never make the pieces fit in this pitiful life?
wrongpiece.trans: 恐怕永远都不能把这些碎片放到悲惨的人生中？

wronggear.en: This might be overdoing it a bit.

quagmire_wrongkey.en: Should I give up, or find another key?
quagmire_wrongkey.trans: 我应该放弃，还是去寻找另一把钥匙？

wrongkey.en: It remains locked, like my heart.
wrongkey.trans: 它还是打不开，就像我的心。

klaus.en: Death would surely find me if I tried...
klaus.trans: 如果我试了，死亡肯定会找到我的...

empty.trans: 我没办法把虚无打包起来...

generic.en: I know all its secrets.

fertilizer.en: I've learned enough to last me a lifetime.
fertilizer.trans: 我学到的东西够我用一辈子的了。

not_merm.en: Let the merms delay the inevitable.
not_merm.trans: 能让鱼人们推迟那个不可避免的结局。

busy.en: Oh... I can tell you're busy...
busy.trans: 哦…我能看得出来你很忙…

dead.en: They have no need of material possessions where they've gone.
dead.trans: 它们去的地方不需要任何物质。

sleeping.en: They look so peaceful... I'll come back later.
sleeping.trans: 他们看起来很平和…我一会儿再回来。

full.en: They're already too burdened by this world...
full.trans: 他们已经为这个世界操心太多…

awakebeefalo.en: I'd prefer to be blanketed by the night for this.
awakebeefalo.trans: 我宁愿在夜色的遮掩下干这个。

generic.en: I'm not taking a razor to that.
generic.trans: 我才不要拿剃刀对着那个。

webberonly.en: They are Webber's friends, not mine.
webberonly.trans: 这些是韦伯的朋友，不是我的。

notnight.en: It won't work in the sun.

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: It won't pay any attention to me...

inuse.en: What are you making...? Smells good...

generic.en: Oh. No one ever taught me to cook.
generic.trans: 呃。没人教过我怎么做饭。

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: The world is too dark... I can't see it clearly.
messagebottlemanager_not_found.trans: 这个世界太黑暗了……我看不清它。

known.trans: 我已经掌握了那个知识...

stash_map_not_found.en: There's nothing marked on this map... what a cruel joke.
stash_map_not_found.trans: 这张地图上没有任何标记……多么残酷的笑话。

1.en: Well... that was a futile effort.

2.trans: 早就预料到了，彻底的失败。

3.en: It seems I'm not cut out for a life of sailing.

1.en: It... doesn't seem to like me very much.

2.en: I shouldn't take what isn't mine.
2.trans: 不是我的我不要。

full_of_curses.trans: 我已经忍受了足够多的诅咒。

noimage.trans: 有参照物我会画得更好...

restricted.en: Can't always get what you want. Some never do.
restricted.trans: 不可能总是得到想要的东西。有些人永远得不到。

inuse.en: Can I use that after you?
inuse.trans: 我可以在你之后用那个吗？

generic.en: It wouldn't fit.

notempty.en: It isn't empty inside, unlike me.

cooking.en: Mother warned me not to touch a pot while it's cooking.
cooking.trans: 妈妈嘱咐过我，煮饭的时候不要碰锅。

notnow.en: Oh. I suppose he's too busy...

ticoon.en: The more friends you have, the shallower they are.
ticoon.trans: 朋友交得越多，就发现他们越浅薄。

mounted.en: I can't place that from this lofty position.
mounted.trans: 我不能把它从崇高的位置上弄下来。

bad_timing0.en: As usual, I seem to be out of step with the world.
bad_timing0.trans: 我好像总和这个世界格格不入。

bad_timing1.en: Abigail, perhaps you could take a turn rowing?
bad_timing1.trans: 阿比盖尔，要不要换你划一会儿？

beef_bell_has_beef_already.en: I will not replace my dear beefalo.
beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 我亲爱的皮弗娄牛无可取代。

not_mine.en: I can't do anything with that.

beef_bell_already_used.en: It shares a bond with someone else.

already_marked.trans: 我已经做出了我的选择。

not_participant.en: Maybe next time I can enter a beefalo of my own...
not_participant.trans: 也许下次我能带着自己的皮弗娄牛参赛……

samedish.en: I've already put this on a dish.

mismatch.en: Like my soul, this food doesn't belong in this vessel.
mismatch.trans: 这道菜不应装在这个容器里。

announce_nohungersleep.en: My stomach is as empty as my heart. I can't sleep now.
announce_nohungersleep.trans: 我的胃就像我的心灵一样空虚。我现在不能睡觉。

announce_abigail_retrieve.en: I'm sorry... it's not safe for you out here.
announce_abigail_retrieve.trans: 我很抱歉……你在外面不安全。

announce_nonightsiesta_cave.en: I'd really rather be in a tent.
announce_nonightsiesta_cave.trans: 我真的宁愿是在帐篷里。

announce_snowball_too_big.en: There's no use rolling it more.

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: The garden is a bit untidy...

announce_nonightsiesta.en: I'd really rather be in a tent.
announce_nonightsiesta.trans: 我真的宁愿是在帐篷里。

announce_dusk.en: The sickly sweet scent of roses fills the air...
announce_dusk.trans: 空气中飘满了玫瑰矫情的香味…

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: I suppose we will all be nourishment for plants one day.
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 总有一天我们都会成为植物的营养品。

announce_snared_ivy.en: I suppose this is how it ends...

announce_hunt_successful_fork.en: The creature hasn't seen me yet...
announce_hunt_successful_fork.trans: 那个生物还没有看到我……

1.en: It's not like I have anything better to do.
1.trans: 反正也没别的事情可做。

2.trans: 我不如饿死算了。

3.en: Perhaps I will be standing here forever.

4.en: Fishing is rather dull, I don't know why people enjoy it.
4.trans: 钓鱼真无聊，为什么会有人喜欢。

announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: It seems my zeal was short-lived.

announce_cozy_sleep.en: Such a peaceful slumber... but now I must wake.
announce_cozy_sleep.trans: 睡得很平静……但我现在必须起来了。

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: The poor soul who shot that flare... they've sealed their own fate.
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 那个射出信号弹的可怜人……就这样写死了自己的命运。

quagmire_announce_win.en: Let us depart this terrible place.
quagmire_announce_win.trans: 让我们离开这个可怕的地方。

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.en: Something clawing it's way back from the grave?
announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 有什么东西正在从坟墓里爬回来吗？

announce_weak_rat.en: The poor creature is too far gone.

announce_nosleeponfire.en: That'd be quite the way to go out.

quagmire_announce_notrecipe.en: Those foods weren't meant to be together.
quagmire_announce_notrecipe.trans: 这些食物不应当混在一起的。

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: It's too close to the other plants... it's suffocating...
describe_plantstressorovercrowding.trans: 它离其他植物太近了……会窒息……

yotb_post.en: Where my beefalo will await judgment.
yotb_post.trans: 我的皮弗娄牛等待被裁决的地方。

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: I guess I could set this up and be helpful.
deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.trans: 我也可以装好它，帮别人的忙。

generic.en: What an odd looking watering can.

held.en: He is safely in my embrace.

generic.en: He's wandering mindlessly, oblivious to his fate.
generic.trans: 他盲目地四处游荡，对自己的命运一无所知。

unimplemented.trans: 还没有完结，就像生命一样。

cozy_bunnyman.en: Poor creatures, sleep is only a temporary escape.
cozy_bunnyman.trans: 可怜的生物，睡眠只是短暂的逃脱。

quagmire_lamp_post.en: It sheds light on nothing important.

beetletaur.en: You are a prisoner of your own doomed destiny.
beetletaur.trans: 你是自己悲惨命运的囚徒。

twinofterror2.en: Don't worry... Abby and I will make sure you leave this world together.
twinofterror2.trans: 别担心……阿比和我保证让你俩一起离开这个世界。

twinofterror1.en: Don't worry... Abby and I will make sure you leave this world together.
twinofterror1.trans: 别担心……阿比和我保证让你俩一起离开这个世界。

chesspiece_anchor.en: Why did we sculpt an anchor.
chesspiece_anchor.trans: 我们为什么雕了这么个锚？

trunk_summer.en: I would have preferred the ears.

chessjunk1.trans: 冰冷的、死去的人造生命。

slurtle.en: It is mindlessly chasing after rocks.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.en: A paltry last meal for the fish.

chessjunk3.trans: 冰冷的、死去的人造生命。

frognewton.en: Sweet and only a little slimy.
frognewton.trans: 味道甜美，有一点黏糊糊。

chessjunk2.trans: 冰冷的、死去的人造生命。

reviver.en: Choices matter.

trinket_9.en: Mismatched buttons for a mismatched life.
trinket_9.trans: 不搭的纽扣，乱搭的人生。

boat_magnet_kit.en: I'm left to pick up the pieces...

trinket_8.en: I wish I could take a bath.

trinket_6.en: Once alive with electricity, they've met their end.
trinket_6.trans: 曾经因通电而有了生命，现在已经走到了尽头。

lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.en: The wearer shall be a force of good.
lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.trans: 戴上它，就会拥有正义的力量。

ghost.en: Say hi to Abigail while I get you a heart, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，当我带给你一颗心时，向阿比盖尔问候。

firestarter.en: Let's watch the world burn together, %s.
firestarter.trans: 让我们一起看着世界燃烧，%s。

murderer.en: You've made a terrible error, %s.
murderer.trans: 你犯了个可怕的错误，%s。

attacker.en: %s is a madwoman.

reviver.en: Abigail likes you, %s. Do you like her?
reviver.trans: 阿比盖尔喜欢你，%s。你喜欢她吗？

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

trinket_5.en: I'll hold onto it... but only for a friend.
trinket_5.trans: 我会收着的...只是为了一个朋友。

trinket_4.en: I'd carry this to the end of the world.
trinket_4.trans: 我会带着这个，直到世界末日。

nitre.en: Herein lies the folly of man.
nitre.trans: 这是人类的愚蠢带来的产物。

eating_corpse.trans: 尽管已经死去，它仍在吞噬。

generic.en: A truly bad omen.

trinket_3.en: If only knives solved more of my problems...
trinket_3.trans: 要是小刀能解决所有问题该有多好...

teleportato_box.trans: 它包含着至关重要的火花。

trinket_2.trans: 只是个诱惑，就像死亡一样。

warn.en: I can feel the prying eyes.
warn.trans: 我可以感觉到虎视眈眈的眼睛。

calm.en: I know not what lurks in the shadow.
calm.trans: 我不知道阴影中潜伏着什么。

waning.trans: 我想它们应该正在离去。

minisign_item.en: We must stick it in the cold, hard ground...
minisign_item.trans: 我们必须把它刺进寒冷坚硬的土地里...

asparagus.en: Vegetables are good for you, but what do I care?
asparagus.trans: 蔬菜对我有好处，但我还在乎什么呢？

fruitfly.en: They have no respect for living things.

generic.en: Why leave? The light here compliments my complexion.
generic.trans: 为什么要离开？这里的光线显得我气色不错。

full.en: Oh... I guess I'm not invited to the surface party...
full.trans: 哦…我想我没有被邀请参加地面晚会…

tree_rock_seed.en: Everything is born to one day die.

halloweenpotion_moon.en: If only it could change the past.
halloweenpotion_moon.trans: 要是能改变过去就好了。

beargervest.en: Death surrounds us. Well, our torsos anyhow.
beargervest.trans: 死亡围绕着我们的躯干。

wereitem_moose.en: I don't want to play with that.

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: It's like a grave for my things.

froglegs.trans: 它是从青蛙身上扯下来的。

ipecacsyrup.en: I'd like a poison that is less stinky, please.
ipecacsyrup.trans: 毒药的话我想要没那么臭的，谢谢。

generic.en: No dignity at all.

burnt.en: Somehow, it found a way to sink even lower.
burnt.trans: 不论怎样，它找到了更加沉沦的方式。

boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.en: Does it matter where? It's all a game isn't it?
boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.trans: 放在哪重要吗？种种所有皆是一场游戏，不是吗？

rat.en: You know you'll never get that berry, don't you?
rat.trans: 你知道永远拿不到那颗果实，对吧？

generic.en: Abigail would have enjoyed this.
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔会喜欢这个的。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: I fear I've already lost my way.

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.en: We ripped it from its home on the shrub.
quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 它长在灌木丛上，我们把它扯下来了。

boatrace_primemate.en: We are all just racing to the end.
boatrace_primemate.trans: 我们所有人都冲着去终点。

corn_cooked.en: This corn couldn't handle the heat.
corn_cooked.trans: 这个玉米热得爆开了花。

mask_ancient_handmaidhat.en: She bears the look of one fated to be reckoned with.
mask_ancient_handmaidhat.trans: 她是那种注定要被命运重视的长相。

haunted_ground.en: I need to show Abigail how to play.
haunted_ground.trans: 我需要教阿比盖尔怎么玩。

medium.en: I can sense Abigail's presence growing stronger.
medium.trans: 我能感觉到阿比盖尔的气息越来越强了。

level1.en: It was my sister's flower. She's gone far away.
level1.trans: 这是我孪生姐妹的花。她去了很远的地方。

generic.en: It's still so pretty.

level3.en: Abigail! Are you ready to play?

haunted_pocket.en: Abigail is ready to play, but she needs some space.
haunted_pocket.trans: 阿比盖尔准备好了，但她需要一点空间。

level2.en: I can sense Abigail's spirit growing stronger.
level2.trans: 我能感觉到阿比盖尔的精神越来越强了。

kitcoon_desert.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_desert.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

firestarter.en: %s, let's find a game that doesn't involve fire.
firestarter.trans: %s，我们找一个不涉及火的游戏吧。

ghost.en: A heart could bring back my friend, %s...
ghost.trans: 一颗心就能把我的朋友带回来，%s…

murderer.en: Don't worry, %s. This won't hurt a bit.
murderer.trans: %s，不要担心。这一点也不疼。

attacker.en: %s, are you friend... or foe?

reviver.en: You could never be a monster, %s.

generic.en: Hey, %s!

charcoal.en: Cold, dead and black, just like my heart.
charcoal.trans: 冰冷、死寂而黑暗，如同我的内心。

chesspiece_catcoon.trans: 那些明亮的日子的纪念。

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: It would make a steering wheel...

wintersfeastfuel.en: Makes me think of holidays with Abigail.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 让我想起了跟阿比盖尔一起的那些节日。

slingshotammo_gold.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_gold.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

generic.en: It came from the belly of the sphinx.

ratatouille.en: A whole bunch of cooked vegetables. Riveting.
ratatouille.trans: 一大锅烩蔬菜，非常吸引人。

has_item.trans: 阿比盖尔最喜欢的藏身之处。

generic.en: Abigail's favorite hiding spot.
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔最喜欢的藏身之处。

wall_ruins_2.en: These didn't protect the ancients, now did they!
wall_ruins_2.trans: 这些并没能保护古人，不是吗！

standing.en: A creature of shadow that seeks the light... how sad...
standing.trans: 寻求光亮的暗影生物...真可悲啊...

sitting.en: My heart aches with its beauty.
sitting.trans: 我的心随着它的美丽而疼痛。

oceanfishingbobber_oval.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_oval.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

carnivalcannon_kit.en: I suppose I should try to be useful...
carnivalcannon_kit.trans: 我想我应该努力成为一个有用的人……

hermitcrab.en: It's a tragic fate, to be left behind by those you love.
hermitcrab.trans: 悲惨的命运啊，被你深爱的人丢下。

chesspiece_clayhound.en: Happiness is a warm puppy... but this one is cold.
chesspiece_clayhound.trans: 幸福就是一只暖暖的小狗...但这一只是冷的。

shroomcake.en: Will it make me grow? Or shrink perhaps? Mushrooms are funny things.
shroomcake.trans: 它会让我成长吗？还是会缩水？蘑菇真有趣。

potato_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
potato_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: She deserves to live in a nicer place.
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 她值得拥有更好的居所。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: It can't hold back the darkness forever.
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 它不可能永远挡住黑暗。

halloweencandy_12.en: Today I eat them. One day, they'll eat me.
halloweencandy_12.trans: 今天我吃掉它们，有一天它们会吃掉我。

halloweencandy_13.en: A candy as hard as my heart.
halloweencandy_13.trans: 和我的心一样硬的糖果。

goldenshovel.en: One might as well dig with style.

plantmeat_cooked.trans: 烹饪过后味道只好了一点点。

target_too_far_away.en: What we're looking for is well beyond our reach.
target_too_far_away.trans: 我们所寻找的东西远远超出了我们的能力范围。

tracking_not_mine.en: He leads me to a treasure I cannot obtain.
tracking_not_mine.trans: 他指向的宝藏我无法得到。

success.en: No one can hide from their fate forever.
success.trans: 没有人可以永远躲避自己的命运。

nothing_to_track.en: Nothing left to find but dust.
nothing_to_track.trans: 除了灰尘，什么都找不到了。

abandoned.en: That's how it always ends. I'm alone.
abandoned.trans: 所有的相逢总是以我孤身一人结尾。

tracking.en: May you find what you are looking for.
tracking.trans: 愿你找到你正在寻找的东西。

nearby.en: So close, and yet, so far.
nearby.trans: 如此接近，却又如此遥远。

generic.en: He is the light I must follow.

palmcone_scale.en: I warned you that your armor wouldn't protect you.
palmcone_scale.trans: 我警告过你，盔甲也不能保护你。

feather_crow.en: A soft feather, black like eternal darkness.
feather_crow.trans: 柔软的羽毛，如永夜一般漆黑。

generic.en: How do you know I'm mad?

empty.en: What shall I let go to please it?
empty.trans: 我应该拿出什么来取悦它？

halloweencandy_11.en: You have to bite their heads off first... heehee...
halloweencandy_11.trans: 你首先必须把它们的脑袋咬下来...嘻嘻...

quagmire_pot_syrup.trans: 甜蜜的味道会带来甜蜜的生活。

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_dollrepairedhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

redmooneye.en: Now Wolfgang won't get "lost" when I invite him to play.
redmooneye.trans: 现在当我邀请他的时候，沃尔夫冈不会“迷路”了。

wereitem_beaver.en: A small wooden reminder of Woodie's cursed existence.
wereitem_beaver.trans: 小小的木制品，提醒我们伍迪是被诅咒的。

lordfruitfly.en: I would curtsy, but I've decided that I don't like you at all.
lordfruitfly.trans: 我不会行礼，因为我根本不喜欢你。

boat_rotator.en: If only I could turn everything around so easily.
boat_rotator.trans: 如果我可以如此轻易地扭转一切就好了。

wrong_tile.en: This doesn't feel like its final resting place.
wrong_tile.trans: 这里并不像它最终的安息之地。

wrong_season.en: Perhaps it will grow next season. I can wait.
wrong_season.trans: 也许下一季它还会生长。我可以等。

generic.en: Maybe if you're lucky, you'll get the chance to grow up.
generic.trans: 也许幸运的话，你会有机会长大。

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.trans: 多么恐怖的毁灭性力量……

generic.en: It prefers to be alone.

sleeping.en: It is arrested by deepest sleep.

rope.en: That would be the easy way out of this place.
rope.trans: 这会是一种轻松的解脱方式。

wx78module_movespeed2.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

wx78module_light.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_light.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

hedgehound.en: Its beauty hid the beast within.
hedgehound.trans: 外在的美丽掩盖了内心的野兽。

general.trans: 暖暖的灯光……给了我一些安慰。

out.en: What little comfort it gave is now gone.
out.trans: 它给的一点点的安慰也消失了。

general.trans: 暖暖的灯光……给了我一些安慰。

out.en: What little comfort it gave is now gone.
out.trans: 它给的一点点的安慰也消失了。

mulleddrink.en: Can it thaw a cold, broken heart?
mulleddrink.trans: 它能消融一颗冰冷破碎的心吗？

petals_evil.en: They are painted with the colors of my soul.

fishmeat_dried.en: The dessicated remains of a fish.

statueharp.en: Maybe these statues will keep me company.
statueharp.trans: 也许这些雕像将一直伴我左右。

pumpkincarver.en: I love a pumpkin gutting contest.

picked.en: It has nothing to offer me.

withered.trans: 我跟它的感受是一样的。

generic.en: It's born fruit.

barren.en: It will never again bear fruit.

meatysalad.trans: 这个沙拉的味道很奇怪……

caught.en: I'm sorry. You are the unlucky ones.
caught.trans: 我很抱歉。你们才是真的不幸。

lowered.en: I shouldn't get my hopes up...

fixed.en: Somehow, I managed to fix it.

generic.en: The fish must die, so that I may prolong my own terrible existence.
generic.trans: 鱼必须死，这样我就可以延长我自己不快乐的存在。

antlionhat.en: A crown fit for a queen of dirt.

generic.en: Is it worth it to put stake in your future?
generic.trans: 值得拿你的未来冒险吗？

inground.en: I would hide too, if I could.
inground.trans: 如果可以的话，我也想藏起来。

generic.en: Musty.

blue_cap.en: A fungus to preserve the monotony.

wetgoop.en: A miserable mess, just like life.
wetgoop.trans: 一团糟糕的东西，就像生活一样。

monkeyisland_portal.en: For a moment I let myself imagine it might take me home... when will I learn?
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 有那么一会儿，我让自己想象它可能会带我回家……我什么时候才能学会？

yots_lantern_post_item.en: Shall I cast some light upon the darkness?
yots_lantern_post_item.trans: 我要不要在黑暗中投射一点光亮？

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

drying_notmeat.en: It sways in the drying wind.
drying_notmeat.trans: 它在干燥的风中晃来晃去。

drying.en: It sways in the drying wind.
drying.trans: 它在干燥的风中晃来晃去。

done_salt.en: Food without salt is like life without...
done_salt.trans: 少了盐的食物，就像缺了……的生活。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: The rain is keeping it from drying.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 雨水让它没那么容易晾干。

dryinginrain.en: The rain is keeping it from drying.
dryinginrain.trans: 雨水让它没那么容易晾干。

burnt.trans: 它晾肉的日子永远结束了。

generic.en: One can dry much on there. How optimistic.
generic.trans: 好多东西都能在上面晾干。真是乐观呢。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: A meager light to combat the darkness.
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 一盏微不足道的灯，难以对抗黑暗。

noeyeball.en: Hot. Cold. What does it matter?

generic.en: No colder than a world without Abigail.
generic.trans: 并没有比少了阿比盖尔的世界更冷。

rook.en: A Rook? Or is it a Castle?

quagmire_casseroledish_small.en: For making a small amount of food.

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: Death when I least expect it.

quagmire_pot.en: We cook to stave off death.
quagmire_pot.trans: 我们通过烹饪来抵挡死亡。

ocean_trawler_kit.en: Even I should be able to build it simply enough.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 即使是我也应该能够轻松地建造它。

saltrock.en: Almost as salty as my bitter tears.
saltrock.trans: 几乎跟我的苦泪一样咸。

starving.en: A black hole from which seeds never return.
starving.trans: 一个黑洞，种子有去无回。

generic.en: Hello there, little one.

sleeping.trans: 梦想去那个更好的世界。

mask_blacksmithhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_blacksmithhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

yotd_anchor.en: Its golden luster will be lost beneath the sea.
yotd_anchor.trans: 它的金色光泽将消失在海底。

wx78module_movespeed.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

salty_dog.en: You are no hound... but I'll overlook it.
salty_dog.trans: 你并不是一条猎犬……不过我不计较。

forgetmelots.en: They are rather pretty for a weed.
forgetmelots.trans: 对于野草来说，它们是相当漂亮的。

spice_chili.en: Full of more vitality than I'm used to.
spice_chili.trans: 这种强大的生命力让我有些不自在。

generic.en: How I miss my poetry books.
generic.trans: 真是想念我的那些诗集啊。

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: I suppose I should make myself useful.
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 我想我应该让自己变得有用。

slingshot_frame_gems.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

dumbbell_heat.en: It may warm the body, but not the heart.
dumbbell_heat.trans: 它可以温暖身体，但不能温暖心灵。

kitcoon_moon.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_moon.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

pudgy.en: More of the world is within the beast than without.

mypartner.en: At least we have each other for company.
mypartner.trans: 起码我们俩可以互相作伴。

follower.en: He follows me unto his doom.
follower.trans: 他跟着我走向他的末日。

dead.trans: 死了，但也许还没有离开。

domesticated.en: I wonder if it misses its old family?
domesticated.trans: 我在想，它是否想念原来的家庭？

naked.en: His nakedness is now on display.

rider.trans: 我们可以一起冒险到远方。

generic.en: What demented thoughts must lie behind those eyes.
generic.trans: 那些眼睛背后一定藏有什么疯狂的想法。

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

coolant.trans: 它似乎是活的，但其实未必。

bird_mutant_spitter.en: Something is terribly wrong with that bird.

powder_monkey.en: What more can be taken from me?
powder_monkey.trans: 还能从我身上带走什么？

dustmoth.en: They seem to live only to clean. What a tiresome life.
dustmoth.trans: 他们活着好像只为了打扫卫生。天生操劳命。

greenstaff.en: I can see the power sparkling deep within.
greenstaff.trans: 我能看见其中深藏的能量火花。

blueprint.en: Do you see what's up there, Abigail?
blueprint.trans: 阿比盖尔，你看到了那上面有什么吗？

generic.en: It's about to collapse... maybe I'll be here when it does.
generic.trans: 它快要崩塌了……也许崩塌时我会在这里。

pumpkin_cooked.en: It shriveled a tiny bit from the heat. I like that.
pumpkin_cooked.trans: 热量让它萎缩了一点点。我喜欢这样。

bandage.en: There's no salve for the pain of existence.
bandage.trans: 没有药膏可以缓解存在的痛苦。

generic.en: I could curl up and die in there.
generic.trans: 我可以卷起身子，死在那里。

costume_fool_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_fool_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

battlesong_sanitygain.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

tallbird.en: Free from the shackles of the sky.

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: Being a commander must be terribly lonely.

greengem.en: The flaws are its most beautiful features.
greengem.trans: 瑕疵是它最美丽的特质。

trunk_winter.trans: 和它唯一的朋友分开了。

quagmire_flour.en: Flour by any other name would smell as sweet.
quagmire_flour.trans: 即使换一个名称，面粉依然会是香气四溢的。

yotc_carrat_race_start.en: Why do I bother with such silly things.
yotc_carrat_race_start.trans: 我为什么要在乎这些蠢事。

kelp_dried.en: We took it out of the ocean, then took the ocean out of it.
kelp_dried.trans: 我们从海里把它捞起来，然后再把它身上的海去掉。

battlesong_healthgain.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

oceantree_pillar.en: It reminds me of happier days, sitting in the dappled shade...
oceantree_pillar.trans: 它让我想起了坐在斑驳的树荫下的欢乐时光……

ghost.en: Abigail's been dying to meet you, %s.
ghost.trans: 阿比盖尔一直很想见你，%s。

firestarter.en: You've been breaking your own rules, %s...
firestarter.trans: 你自己口口声声说的规则你自己破坏了，%s……

murderer.en: It seems the killer was among us all along.
murderer.trans: 看来凶手一直就在我们中间。

attacker.en: I'll get you back for that, %s!

reviver.en: Maybe I should listen to %s more often.

generic.en: Hello %s, how do you do?
I don't know why you bother.
generic.trans: 我不明白你为什么要费劲做这个。

moonglass_wobster_den.en: What lives within that cold glass mound?
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 那冰冷的玻璃里有什么活物？

record_creepyforest.en: Does this music lift your spirits, Abigail?
record_creepyforest.trans: 听了音乐心情有没有好一点，阿比盖尔？

armor_lunarplant.en: Shining armor, but no knight to save us.
armor_lunarplant.trans: 盔甲闪着光，但没有骑士来救我们。

waterplant_baby.en: I could cut it down now, before it grows...
waterplant_baby.trans: 我完全可以把它扼杀在萌芽中……

unagi.en: It looks more appetizing this way.

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: It's time to finish this... race track.
yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.trans: 是时候完成这个……赛道了。

tentacle_pillar.en: So this is what goes on down below.
tentacle_pillar.trans: 所以这就是下面的情况了。

slingshot_frame_bone.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

carrot_seeds.en: It's a plant that's waiting to be.

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: I suppose I should make myself useful.
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 我想我应该让自己变得有用。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: Can I... help set up the carnival?

slingshotammo_rock.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_rock.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

watermelonhat.en: It makes the wearer's head sticky. Yuck.
watermelonhat.trans: 戴着它，头会变得黏黏的。真恶心。

slingshot_handle_sticky.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

generic.en: The remains of a tuft of grass.

strawhat.en: When the sun beats mercilessly, life finds a way. Ugh.
strawhat.trans: 当太阳无情地鞭挞，生命总能找到出路。啊。

monkeytail.en: Oh. They're so soft. And fuzzy.
monkeytail.trans: 哦。它们是如此柔软。而且毛茸茸的。

generic.en: It tricks them with the promise of sustenance.
generic.trans: 通过会有食物的假象来欺骗他们。

generic.en: This is not real poultry.

burnt.en: No more enjoyment to be had.

boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.en: I should throw this in the water.

generic.en: Such a striking likeness...

cotl_trinket.en: I wonder whose head it toppled from.
cotl_trinket.trans: 我想知道它从谁的脑袋上掉了下来。

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: This world is nothing but hurt.

blowdart_pipe.en: Blow in one end, pain comes out the other.
blowdart_pipe.trans: 从这一端吹气，另一端出来的是痛苦。

generic.en: The highest honor this beast of burden will likely ever receive.
generic.trans: 这头驮重物的野兽能获得最高荣誉。

record_drstyle.en: Does this music lift your spirits, Abigail?
record_drstyle.trans: 听了音乐心情有没有好一点，阿比盖尔？

quagmire_bowl_silver.en: It is empty, like my heart.
quagmire_bowl_silver.trans: 空空如也，就像我的内心一样。

skeletonhat.trans: 里面压迫着被拷打的理智。

hermitcrab_shell.en: If only it would take me to Abigail.
hermitcrab_shell.trans: 要是能带我去见阿比盖尔就好了。

mutator_hider.en: Very well, since you made the cookies you can bring one spider friend to our tea party.
mutator_hider.trans: 好吧，既然你做了曲奇饼，那就允许你带一个蜘蛛朋友参加我们的茶会。

generic.en: It will be worth more after the artist dies.
generic.trans: 艺术家去世后，它会价值更高。

firestarter.en: I'd begun to think you were all talk, %s.
firestarter.trans: 我已经开始觉得你只会夸夸其谈了，%s。

ghost.en: Say "Pretty Please" and I might get you a heart, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，要是你说“求求你了”，我就给你拿到心。

murderer.en: None of us are above death, %s!
murderer.trans: %s，我们谁也不能凌驾于死亡之上！

attacker.en: Do you have a conscience, %s?

reviver.en: Abigail likes you, %s.

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

watermelon_seeds.en: It's a plant that's waiting to be.

eyeturret.en: I do not know why it helps me.
eyeturret.trans: 我不知道它为什么帮我。

held.en: So many have perished. But this one is safe.
held.trans: 许多已经消亡。但这个很安全。

generic.en: Its life is short, but beautiful.
generic.trans: 它的生命很短暂，但是很美好。

bombed.en: I don't see how this helped.

generic.en: When I gaze upon my reflection, a ghost stares back at me.
generic.trans: 我注视自己的倒影时，看到一个鬼魂盯着我看。

sewing_tape.en: It doesn't mend the hole... merely masks it.
sewing_tape.trans: 它没有修补那个洞...只是掩盖住而已。

dragonboat_pack.en: I suppose I can make myself useful in some small way and put it together.
dragonboat_pack.trans: 我多少可以有一点作用，把它组装起来吧。

hermit_bundle.en: For once I'm rewarded for my efforts.
hermit_bundle.trans: 我的努力第一次有了回报。

fence_gate.en: Will it keep others in, or out?
fence_gate.trans: 它会把别人困在里面，或是外面吗？

mutator_moon.en: Very well, since you made the cookies you can bring one spider friend to our tea party.
mutator_moon.trans: 好吧，既然你做了曲奇饼，那就允许你带一个蜘蛛朋友参加我们的茶会。

ice_blueprint.en: It reflects the coldness I feel inside.
ice_blueprint.trans: 它反映了我内心的冰冷。

spider_healer.en: It's only prolonging the inevitable. How sad.
spider_healer.trans: 这只是在拖延不可避免的事情。多么可悲。

friendlyfruitfly.en: Oh. It seems to be friendly.

statue.en: Naught but a pithy imitation of life.
statue.trans: 只不过是粗浅地模仿活物。

generic.en: My, what big teeth you have.
A warrior of the night!

potato_cooked.en: Now its eyes will never open.
potato_cooked.trans: 从现在起，它的眼睛永远睁不开了。

generic.en: Maybe I'll just take a peek...
I see the light.

nolight.en: Even the earth is falling apart under the pressure.
nolight.trans: 压力这么大，大地都崩溃了。

picked.en: We've taken all there was to take.

generic.en: I suppose it could be edible.

normal.trans: 燃烧的温度很高...但是不明亮...

high.en: No need to lean in and check if it's hot. I can feel it from here.
high.trans: 没有必要向前一步看它是否很烫。我在这里就感觉得到。

generic.en: Its teeth do not even gnash.

healingsalve.en: Life brings pain, pain brings life.
healingsalve.trans: 生命带来痛苦，痛苦带来生命。

marbletree.en: Be ye alive or be ye dead?

waterplant_planter.en: Even if I plant it, the fickle thing may turn against me.
waterplant_planter.trans: 即使我种下它，这个变幻莫测的东西也可能对我不利。

sketch.en: I think we could make what's drawn here...
sketch.trans: 我想我们可以制造出这里画的东西...

cave_fern.en: A touch of color in the bleakness.

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: I doubt those eggs will ever hatch.
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 我觉得这些蛋可能孵不出来了。

mutator_healer.en: It's the only thing smiling around here.
mutator_healer.trans: 这是这里唯一在笑的东西。

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: Can I... help set up the carnival?

acorn.en: A tiny life, ensconced in brittle death.
acorn.trans: 藏身于脆弱死亡中的渺小生命。

shadow_beef_bell.en: A shame it only works for beefalo.
shadow_beef_bell.trans: 可惜它只适用于皮弗娄牛。

eel_cooked.en: An eel that has been cooked.

record_danger.en: Does this music lift your spirits, Abigail?
record_danger.trans: 听了音乐心情有没有好一点，阿比盖尔？

boaron.en: A shame you have to perish.

quagmire_goatkid.en: What childhood is this for you?
quagmire_goatkid.trans: 你这是怎么样的童年啊？

drying_notmeat.en: It sways in the drying wind.
drying_notmeat.trans: 它在干燥的风中晃来晃去。

drying.en: It sways in the drying wind.
drying.trans: 它在干燥的风中晃来晃去。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: The rain is keeping it from drying.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 雨水让它没那么容易晾干。

dryinginrain.en: The rain is keeping it from drying.
dryinginrain.trans: 雨水让它没那么容易晾干。

burnt.trans: 它晾肉的日子永远结束了。

generic.en: One can't survive long without food...

beehat.en: This will protect me from those happy buzzing sounds. Oh, and stings.
beehat.trans: 有了这个，我再也不用害怕那些快乐的嗡嗡声，也不用害怕那些毒刺了。

lunarfrog.en: What horrors have you seen, little frog?
lunarfrog.trans: 小青蛙，你看到了什么恐怖的东西？

gunpowder.en: It is a dark path we tread.
gunpowder.trans: 这是一条我们踏上的黑暗之路。

yoth_knighthat.en: One may become the knight and save themselves.
yoth_knighthat.trans: 也许成为骑士，便能拯救自己。

yotp_food1.trans: 有生物为那场盛宴而死。

yotp_food2.en: I don't want to eat that.

nonslipgrit.en: At least one thing won't slip away from me...
nonslipgrit.trans: 至少还有一样东西不会从我身边溜走……

yotp_food3.en: It'll keep me alive a little longer.
yotp_food3.trans: 它能让我再活一段时间。

slingshot_handle_silk.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

chesspiece_crabking.en: We put him out of his misery.
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 我们让他从痛苦中解脱了。

armorsnurtleshell.en: A suit to hide from one's problems.

kitcoon_yot.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_yot.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

boat_rotator_kit.en: I could build a rudder, I suppose...
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 那就让我来建个转向舵吧……

sculpture_bishophead.trans: 这东西是怎么到这里来的？

quagmire_coin2.en: Money will not bring back Abigail.
quagmire_coin2.trans: 有钱也无法让我的阿比盖尔复活。

quagmire_coin1.en: I shall put them on my eyes when I die.
quagmire_coin1.trans: 我要在临死前把它放在我的眼睛上。

monkeyqueen.en: Queens don't usually scratch their backsides in public, do they Abigail?
monkeyqueen.trans: 女王们通常不会在公共场合抓屁股，是吗，阿比盖尔？

wagpunk_floor_kit.en: I wonder how the ocean feels about this.

follower.en: Do you really wish to come with me?

brokenhorn_follower.en: You've lost something dear to you too, haven't you?
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 你失去了对自己很重要的东西，对不对？

brokenhorn.trans: 有的伤口永远都不会愈合。

generic.en: I cannot escape its piercing gaze... or horn.
generic.trans: 我逃不过它刺穿一切的目光……或者角。

unwritten.en: Its blank face shall soon offer a secret.
unwritten.trans: 它一脸茫然，很快便会透露秘密。

generic.en: A mark is made, however transient.
generic.trans: 我做了个标记，不过是暂时的。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: What a lot of trouble to go to.

construction_plans.en: Shall I even bother building this?

knight.trans: 一匹冰冷的、没有灵魂的马。

book_birds.en: Will it teach me to fly away from here?
book_birds.trans: 它会教我怎么飞离这里吗？

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: How do you measure one's worth?
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 你能量出生命的价值吗？

acorn_sapling.trans: 一棵树很快就会长出来。

record_main.en: I wonder if father still listens to his record collection.
record_main.trans: 不知道父亲是否还会听他收藏的旧唱片。

barnacle.en: We pried it from its home.
barnacle.trans: 我们把它从它的家里撬了出来。

staffcoldlight.trans: 星星像其他东西一样死去...

polishcookie.en: I suppose... it wouldn't hurt to have one...
polishcookie.trans: 我猜……吃一个也没坏处吧……

megaflare.en: I could just let the monsters come for me...
megaflare.trans: 完全可以让怪物们直接冲我来……

drumstick.en: Makes a good thud, and it's nutritious!
drumstick.trans: 可以用来打鼓，而且很有营养！

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: I'm afraid the past is just as dreadful as the future.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 我担心过去和未来一样可怕。

mask_mirrorhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

merm_tool.en: It's only slightly better than useless.
merm_tool.trans: 只比没用的垃圾稍微强一点。

footballhat.en: A dead thing for me to wear. Goody.
footballhat.trans: 我可以把这个死去的东西戴在头上。太好了。

support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 在那层裹尸布下面隐藏着什么？

has_item_light.en: I could weigh it against a feather.

generic.en: A fleeting distraction from our pitiable lives.
generic.trans: 我们可悲的生活中一个短暂的插曲。

tillweedsalve.en: A balm to ease my suffering.

archive_orchestrina_main.en: Abigail was better at these things.
archive_orchestrina_main.trans: 阿比盖尔更擅长这些事情。

watertree_pillar.en: I'd be filled with awe if my heart still felt such things.
watertree_pillar.trans: 如果我的内心还会起波澜的话，我此时该充满敬意。

generic.en: It's just seaweed.

shovel.en: What terrible secrets might be uncovered with this?
shovel.trans: 这到底揭示了什么可怕的秘密？

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 冰冷而美丽，就像死亡一样。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: A fleeting moment of joy, captured in stone.
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 转瞬即逝的欢乐时刻被铭记在了石头里。

pomegranate_oversized.en: I wonder how long a single seed would keep one trapped in the underworld...
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 不知道拿一颗种子能在地下世界待多久……

woodcarvedhat.en: Today, a pine hat... perhaps tomorrow a pine box.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 今天，是一顶松木帽子……明天也许是一个松木盒子。

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: I suppose I should try to be useful...
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 我想我应该努力成为一个有用的人……

brush.en: Oh, to rid the world of fluff.
brush.trans: 哦，为这个世界除去无价值的东西。

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: Delivering sweet death from a distance.
houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 从远处派送甜美的死亡。

hot.trans: 它承受不了这样的高温。

long.en: A life sooner begun is a life sooner ended.

generic.en: A tiny, fragile being, struggling for the light.
generic.trans: 小小的脆弱生命，正在挣扎着迎向光明。

sentryward.en: Grant us the power of sight...

spoiled_food.trans: 最终一切都会变成垃圾。

burning.en: Now it is truly free. Well, as free as a flightless bird.
burning.trans: 现在它真正自由了，就像一只不会飞的鸟一样自由。

reviving.en: There can be a fate worse than death.
reviving.trans: 原来还有比死亡更糟的命运。

generic.en: Poor bird.

critter_puppy.trans: 幸福地未察觉到致命问题...

generic.en: It visits death upon intruders.

burnt.en: It all crumbles to ash, in the end.
burnt.trans: 最终，一切都烧成了灰烬。

moonrocknugget.trans: 它跨越了遥不可及的距离...

skeleton_notplayer.en: All living things share the same fate. Thankfully.
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 所有活着的东西命运都是一样的。还好。

boat_bumper_shell.en: It will only prolong the inevitable.
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 这只会延长不可避免的事情。

chesspiece_moon.en: I'd prefer to look at this over the real thing.
chesspiece_moon.trans: 比起真月亮来，我更喜欢看着这个。

pepper.en: It looks so tiny and insignificant.

quagmire_onion_cooked.en: It will never make anyone cry again.
quagmire_onion_cooked.trans: 它再也无法让谁流泪了。

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Pretty though.
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。倒是挺漂亮的。

walking_stick.en: What a funny little walking cane.

furtuft.en: This came from a living creature.

polly_rogers.en: I would have preferred a raven.

perd.en: Dumb bird! Stay away from the berries!

construction1.en: There's so much left to be done...

construction2.en: It's quite odd looking, isn't it?

generic.en: How very peculiar.

chesspiece_beequeen.en: She once had a sweet life.

idle.en: There's nothing left to look for.
idle.trans: 没有什么值得寻找的了。

generic.en: All paths lead to suffering.
generic.trans: 所有的道路都通向苦难。

saddle_race.en: Too much whimsy gives me indigestion.
saddle_race.trans: 无法理解太多的怪念头。

trident.en: It was stolen from the sea, but it still holds power over the waves.
trident.trans: 是从海里偷来的，还有控制波浪的力量。

pumpkincookie.en: Why indulge in such childish things?
pumpkincookie.trans: 为什么沉迷于这种孩子把戏？

moonrockcrater.en: It's useless and missing a piece, much like me.
moonrockcrater.trans: 它没有用，还缺了一块，就像我一样。

book_gardening.en: Imagine, a rolling field of red flowers...
book_gardening.trans: 想想看，一片旋转的红玫瑰田...

generic.en: The shadow of death lies upon it.

gingerbreadhouse.en: Temporary joy, meant to be consumed.
gingerbreadhouse.trans: 短暂的欢愉，注定要被消耗。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: They make starving seem almost appealing...
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 看看它这样子，相比之下饿死反而更有吸引力……

quagmire_altar_statue1.en: What horror have those eyes witnessed?
quagmire_altar_statue1.trans: 这些眼睛见证过怎样的恐怖情景呢？

merm_toolshed.en: Father had a tool shed, though he hardly used it.
merm_toolshed.trans: 父亲有过一个工具棚，不过他很少使用。

spice_garlic.en: It's smell is good for keeping people at a distance.

shadow_forge_kit.en: I suppose if I tried I could piece it together.
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 勉强努力一下应该可以把它拼凑起来。

generic.en: Heehee. Yes, I'd love to hear a secret.
generic.trans: 嘿嘿，对，快告诉我有什么秘密。

moon_altar_wip.en: It doesn't feel good to be incomplete.
moon_altar_wip.trans: 不喜欢这种不完整的感觉。

unhappy.trans: 一股深沉的愤怒正在酝酿...

generic.en: Do you know any riddles?

monkeypillar.en: Her kingdom is built on nothing but sand, and one day it will topple.
monkeypillar.trans: 她的王国建立在沙子上面，总有一天会倒塌。

cactus_meat_cooked.en: Its defenses have been stripped away.

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: Merely a lonely part of a completed whole.

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: Merely a lonely part of a completed whole.

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: Merely a lonely part of a completed whole.

wx78_moduleremover.en: What must it be like, to lose a piece of oneself and feel nothing?
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 不知不觉地失去自身的一部分，是怎样一种情形？

goldenpickaxe.en: One might as well smash rocks with style.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 谁都可以有范地击碎岩石。

weed_ivy.en: All the thorns of a rose, with none of the beauty.
weed_ivy.trans: 一身玫瑰的荆棘，却没有玫瑰的美丽。

quagmire_seedpacket.en: Planting seeds requires an optimism I don't possess.
quagmire_seedpacket.trans: 播种需要抱有乐观精神，然而我没有。

trap.trans: 小小的草也变得致命了。

ruinshat.trans: 阿比盖尔会喜欢这个王冠的。

quagmire_berrybush.en: It shall never grow another berry.

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: This time... I can protect you.

mosquitobomb.en: The enemies of my enemies are my mosquitoes.
mosquitobomb.trans: 我的敌人的敌人是我的蚊子。

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: Perhaps I could put it over here...

bloom.trans: 它这么努力地尝试，为什么？

generic.en: These are some strange trees.

acidcovered.en: I know the scent of death and decay.
acidcovered.trans: 我了解死亡和腐烂的味道。

generic.en: A light in the darkness.

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.en: I wish I possessed such burning within my heart.
halloweenpotion_fire_fx.trans: 我真希望我心里也燃烧着这样的火。

twigs.en: Plucked from the ground before their prime.
twigs.trans: 还没长大就被拔出了土地。

corn_seeds.en: The seed of life, so tiny in my hand.
corn_seeds.trans: 生命的种子，在我的手中如此之小。

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

atrium_key.en: I think I know where it goes...
atrium_key.trans: 我觉得我知道它去哪了...

balloonvest.en: Why try to prolong the inevitable?
balloonvest.trans: 为什么要延迟不可避免的死亡？

line_1.en: A people struck by famine and sorrow.
line_1.trans: 人们受到饥荒和悲伤的打击。

line_2.en: A piece of their story, lost to time.
line_2.trans: 他们的故事，输给了时间。

line_5.en: Finally, a city, full of life.
line_5.trans: 最后，城市里充满了生机。

destabilizing.en: Oh well. I hope it's a quick death.
destabilizing.trans: 噢，好啊。 我希望来个痛快的了断。

cooldown.en: We can't do that again for awhile.
cooldown.trans: 我们好一会无法再这样做了。

off.en: A beacon of hope left unlit... How fitting.
off.trans: 希望的灯塔没有被照亮...真是太合适了。

quagmire_mermhouse.en: Seclusion has not been kind to it.
quagmire_mermhouse.trans: 它与世隔绝，却不得善终。

generic.en: A bit of light in the darkness.

asparagus_cooked.en: If I ever feel like eating anything, I'll eat it.
asparagus_cooked.trans: 我可以吃它。如果我想要吃东西的话。

generic.en: If trees could talk, they would scream at the sight of this.
generic.trans: 如果树可以说话，看到这个会让它们尖叫。

held.en: It's so soft. It is my enemy.
held.trans: 它如此柔软。它是我的敌人。

generic.en: Life in the barren, frozen wastes.

spider_repellent.en: Nothing I try seems to work well for me.

pigtent.en: The place where they wrap pigs in blankets.
pigtent.trans: 他们把猪裹进毯子里的地方。

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: Its new lease on life was, well, short-lived.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 它的新生契约，嗯，太过短暂。

carnival_vest_c.en: Perhaps I could join the ravens and fly far, far away...
carnival_vest_c.trans: 也许我该加入乌鸦，飞到很远很远的地方去……

carnival_vest_b.en: I find a curious comfort in the sound of dead, rustling leaves.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 我在枯萎的、沙沙作响的树叶声中找到了一种奇怪的安慰。

merm_lunar.en: Their eyes... they're so vacant and cold...
merm_lunar.trans: 他们的眼神……是如此空洞和冷漠

emberlight.en: At least it warms my hands.

generic.en: Those figures can't be natural.

book_bees.en: Bees live such short, unremarkable lives.
book_bees.trans: 蜜蜂的一生短暂无波澜。

generic.en: Its cycle of life is ending.

revealed.en: I wonder how long he's been here.
revealed.trans: 说不清他在这里多久了。

generic.en: Looks unusual. Maybe it's dying.
generic.trans: 看起来不太寻常。也许它快死了。

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_turnip_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

mask_halfwithat.trans: 我早就掩饰自己的情感了。

gazpacho.en: Cold and watery like a sailor's grave.
gazpacho.trans: 冰冷，水汪汪，如同水手的坟墓。

archive_lockbox.en: How am I to get it open? Perhaps the key is nearby.
archive_lockbox.trans: 我要怎么打开它？也许钥匙就在附近。

carnival_vest_a.en: I wish you could try it on Abigail, I think it would suit you.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 真希望阿比盖尔你能穿上试试，它一定很合你身。

firestarter.en: Monkeys shouldn't play with fire.
firestarter.trans: 猴子不能玩火。

ghost.en: Now you and Abigail can play together.
ghost.trans: 现在你和阿比盖尔可以一起玩了。

murderer.en: I think it's time Abigail and I put an end to your games... for good.
murderer.trans: 是时候让阿比盖尔和我结束你的游戏了……永远地结束。

attacker.en: I think I know why the other monkeys cast you out.
attacker.trans: 我想我知道为什么其他猴子把你赶走了。

reviver.en: What a strange creature you are.

generic.en: Why hello there. Did the other monkeys shun you?
generic.trans: 你怎么了？其他猴子都避开你了吗？

hound.en: Stay back, foul minion of evil!

wx78module_maxhealth.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

sleeping.en: He is practicing for the big sleep.
sleeping.trans: 他正在为长睡不醒做准备呢。

generic.en: How do you do, sir?

mask_queenhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_queenhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: This was once a happy home.
quagmire_rubble_chimney.trans: 这里曾经是一个幸福的家。

yotb_post_item.en: Where should I lay it to rest, I wonder?
yotb_post_item.trans: 我在想放它在哪安息呢？

inspectself.en: When I look in the mirror, it's like Abigail's here.
inspectself.trans: 当我照镜子时，犹如看到阿比盖尔。

book_brimstone.en: The tome to end it all...

klaus.en: I see him when I'm sleeping...
klaus.trans: 我在睡觉的时候看见了他...

fused_shadeling.en: It knows nothing but pain and hunger.
fused_shadeling.trans: 除了痛苦和饥饿，它什么都不知道。

night_new.en: A new moon looms above us.
night_new.trans: 一轮新月在我们上面时隐时现。

night_full.en: A full moon looms overhead. Watchful.
night_full.trans: 一轮满月在地面上时隐时现。小心。

night_wax.trans: 月亮在我们面前越来越圆。

night_wane.en: The moon is on the wane.

generic.en: Does it reflect from the other side too, Abigail?
generic.trans: 它从另一边也会反射吗，阿比盖尔？

generic.en: If only it could spice up my life.
generic.trans: 要是能给我的生活调出味道就好了。

tomato_oversized.en: It looks like a giant heart. Shall I cut it open?
tomato_oversized.trans: 它看起来像一个巨大的心脏。要我把它切开吗？

driftwood_log.en: Bleached like bones left in the sun.
driftwood_log.trans: 漂白的像太阳底下的骨头。

thulecite.en: Its presence marks the edge of the unknown.
thulecite.trans: 它的存在标志着未知的边界。

quagmire_rubble_roof.en: The roof cannot protect you when death comes.
quagmire_rubble_roof.trans: 死神降临时，屋顶保护不了你。

quagmire_altar_ivy.trans: 就像死神一样，它到处爬行。

picked.en: Life is pain. Now it has no life.
picked.trans: 生命是一种痛苦。现在，它没有了生命。

generic.en: A bush that always hurts.
generic.trans: 总是能造成伤痛的灌木丛。

quagmire_grill_small.en: It makes a little bit of food.
quagmire_grill_small.trans: 可以用它制作少许食物。

generic.en: Cold glass.

succulent_potted.trans: 这个镀金的笼子是陶瓷的。

burnt.en: A preview of the fires of Hell.

generic.en: Sleep is but a preview of death.

dug_sapling.en: I like it dead, but it should probably be returned to the earth.
dug_sapling.trans: 我想它死，但它可能会重返地球。

boat_grass_item.en: It will make a rather flimsy boat. I'll likely drown.
boat_grass_item.trans: 做出来也是容易散架的船。我很可能会溺水。

moonglassaxe.en: Death is so anticlimactic for trees.
moonglassaxe.trans: 死亡对于树木来说太反高潮了。

pocket_scale.en: What is the weight of my actions?

giftwrap.en: Abby... how do I make the ribbon curly?
giftwrap.trans: 阿比...我怎么才能把缎带弄弯曲？

feather_robin_winter.en: A snowbird feather, white as the light at the end of the tunnel.
feather_robin_winter.trans: 雪雀的羽毛，就像隧道尽头的光一样白。

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: I suppose I should try to be useful...
carnivaldecor_plant_kit.trans: 我想我应该努力成为一个有用的人……

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

quagmire_potato_cooked.en: Now its eyes will never open.
quagmire_potato_cooked.trans: 从现在起，它的眼睛永远睁不开了。

dreadstone_stack.en: Do I dare imagine what kind of darkness it grew from?
dreadstone_stack.trans: 我无法想象它是从怎样的黑暗中生长出来的。

quagmire_sapling.en: We will perish before this grows back.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 等它长大的时候，我们早就不复存在了。

klaus_sack.trans: 我们应该往里面瞧瞧吗...？

picked.en: The nest is empty. Vacant. Barren. A void.
picked.trans: 巢是空的。空虚、贫瘠而虚无。

generic.en: That egg represents a new life. Ugh.
generic.trans: 这个蛋代表了一个新生命。呃。

milkywhites.en: Ashes to ashes, dust to... this.

eyemaskhat.en: I am the beholder of the eye.

wx78module_bee.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_bee.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

quagmire_syrup.trans: 没有阿比盖尔那么甜美。

locked.trans: 锁住了，就像我的心一样。

generic.en: Let's have a peek inside...

chopped.en: It's met its end at our hands.

generic.en: The bleached remains of a dead tree.

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

desiccantboosted.en: I can't remember the last time my eyes were dry.
desiccantboosted.trans: 已经记不得上一次眼睛是干的是什么时候了。

honeynuggets.en: Meat cut into tiny pieces. Just like my heart.
honeynuggets.trans: 把肉切成小块。就像我的心一样。

armormarble.en: Could stop the daggers that stab at mine heart.
armormarble.trans: 可以阻挡那把刺向我心脏的利刃。

staff_lunarplant.en: It will help me make sure no one gets too close.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 它能帮我确保无人能近我的身。

messagebottle.en: I wonder what poor forgotten soul sent that.
messagebottle.trans: 不知道是哪个被遗忘的可怜虫发出的。

firestarter.en: Is fire important in your line of work...?
firestarter.trans: 你干的那行需要用火吗...？

ghost.en: You can't escape that way, %s. I've tried.
ghost.trans: 你那样是逃不出去的，%s。我试过了。

murderer.en: Abigail and I will have fun with you!
murderer.trans: 我和阿比盖尔会跟你玩得很开心！

attacker.en: There is anger in %s's heart.

reviver.en: Hi %s. Abigail says "thank-you".
reviver.trans: 嗨，%s。阿比盖尔跟你说“谢谢”。

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

charlie_npc.en: Are you the true face of the darkness?
charlie_npc.trans: 你就是黑暗的本来面目吗？

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: I suppose I'd better get started.

pomegranate.en: So many juicy red bits to chomp and squish!
pomegranate.trans: 这么多可以咬碎挤扁的多汁红色果肉！

record.en: I wondered if I'd ever hear that song again.
record.trans: 不知是否还会再听到那首歌。

sharkboi.en: It has a bite no colder than reality.
sharkboi.trans: 它的撕咬与现实一样寒气逼人。

generic.en: They are so standoffish.

off.en: Let's turn it red as my heart's blood...
off.trans: 我们把它变得和我的心脏的血一样红吧...

burnt.trans: 好的东西不可能会持续。

on.trans: 这样一个脆弱的真菌发光了...

ready.en: It still needs a large key.

generic.en: What does this newfangled thing do?
generic.trans: 这个新奇玩意有什么用处？

shroombait.en: Will it give me a dreamless sleep?

scrap_monoclehat.en: I won't find what I'm looking for, no matter how far I can see.
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 无论看多远，我都找不到要找的东西。

wilted.en: I think it's lovelier this way...
wilted.trans: 我想以这种方式它会更可爱...

generic.en: We pulled the flowers from their homes for our own amusement.
generic.trans: 我们为了消遣从它们家摘了鲜花。

empty.en: The shadow equivalent of taxidermy. I like it.
empty.trans: 阴影等同于剥制术。我喜欢它。

supertacklecontainer.en: I don't see what's so spectacular about it.
supertacklecontainer.trans: 真看不出有什么了不起的。

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: I suppose I should make myself useful.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 我想我应该让自己变得有用。

beargerfur_sack.en: I already carry the coldness within.

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: She now lies, cold as stone.
chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 她现在躺着，像石头一样冰冷。

moon_altar_idol.en: Abby and I will help put you back together.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 阿比和我会把你重新装好。

spicepack.en: To fend off the ravages of decay... for my food at least.
spicepack.trans: 至少能为我的食物抵御腐坏的味道。

fused_shadeling_bomb.en: They lead such short, explosive lives.
fused_shadeling_bomb.trans: 他们短暂而爆炸的生命啊。

mask_kinghat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_kinghat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

dug_trap_starfish.en: A pity it didn't crunch me up when it had the chance.
dug_trap_starfish.trans: 它原本有机会咬住我，可惜了吧。

comfy.en: The egg is warm, but my heart is still cold.
comfy.trans: 蛋暖和了，但我的心还是冰冷的。

cold.en: This egg is almost as cold as my heart.
cold.trans: 这个蛋几乎像我的心一样冰冷。

batwing_cooked.en: They once held such great potential.
batwing_cooked.trans: 它们曾经拥有如此大的潜力。

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: Its flesh is far more bloody now.
quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 现在它的肉显得更血淋淋了。

crabking_mob_knight.en: Is your agression an attempt to fill the void?
crabking_mob_knight.trans: 你的咄咄逼人其实是为了填补空虚吗？

some_kelp.en: The merms are in an endless cycle of feeding. Give them more.
some_kelp.trans: 鱼人无休止地循环进食。再多给它们一些。

lots_of_kelp.en: So, even the merms have their limits.
lots_of_kelp.trans: 所以，即使是鱼人也有自己的极限。

generic.en: Empty.

deflated.en: Sail far away from here, little balloon.

generic.en: Will it make me swift enough to outrun my problems?
generic.trans: 它能让我快到远远抛开我的问题吗？

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: How does it feel to be ripped from your home?
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 把它从你家分离出去感觉怎么样？

diseased.en: It's not long for this world...

withered.en: It just couldn't take the heat.
withered.trans: 它无法承受这样的高温。

generic.en: It's just a tuft of grass.

carnival_plaza_kit.en: Perhaps I might enjoy its shade one day.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 也许有一天我也能在它的阴影中纳凉。

barnaclinguine.en: I like my noodles plain, with butter.

generic.en: To let it live would be a cruelty.

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Sigh. Isn't the regular swamp bad enough?
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 唉。普通沼泽还不够糟糕吗？

generic.en: I could water the ground well enough with my tears.
generic.trans: 我的眼泪足以浇灌大地。

boatrace_seastack.en: Why try to avoid the inevitable?
boatrace_seastack.trans: 明知不可避免，又何必闪躲？

charged.en: Even this power will run out.
charged.trans: 即使是这样的力量也会耗尽。

generic.en: Focuses the destruction.
generic.trans: 将毁灭的力量聚集于一处。

head.en: Are the two heads aware of each other?
head.trans: 两颗头知道彼此的存在吗？

flipped.en: For me, the world feels upside down.
flipped.trans: 对我来说，世界感觉颠倒了。

boat_leak.en: I always knew the ocean floor would be my final resting place.
boat_leak.trans: 我早就知道将在海底安眠。

mutator_dropper.en: Webber sees the world in a most curious way.
mutator_dropper.trans: 韦伯以一种最奇特的方式看待世界。

dustmothden.en: Poor things, their home is no longer safe from us.
dustmothden.trans: 可怜的家伙们，它们曾经安全的家现在落到了我们的手里。

eggplant_seeds.en: It's a plant that's waiting to be.

winterhat.en: It helps stave off the encroaching cold.
winterhat.trans: 这有助于延缓寒冷的侵袭。

vegstinger.trans: 无法给我的生活带来丝毫乐趣。

penguin.en: All dressed up, but where to go?
penguin.trans: 全都衣冠楚楚，但是去哪呢？

rainhat.en: What fun is rain if you're not getting wet?
rainhat.trans: 如果你身上不打湿，下雨还有什么乐趣呢？

reviving.en: You would return to this life?

generic.en: All that remains is a corpse.

quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.en: Neither a house nor a home.

talleggs.en: A life snatched away... and wrapped in fried sausage.
talleggs.trans: 先夺走一条生命……然后把它包在了炸香肠里。

lichen.en: How does it manage to grow like that?

kitcoon_forest.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_forest.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: A useful guide, or a marker for a watery grave...
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 是指引，还是水葬的航标？

fishingrod.en: With this the fishies will be ripped from the safety of their precious pond.
fishingrod.trans: 有了这个，可以把小鱼从珍贵的池塘分离开。

boatpatch_kelp.en: It will probably fall apart before I can reach shore. If I'm lucky.
boatpatch_kelp.trans: 它多半会在我上岸之前就散架。如果我幸运的话。

book_tentacles.en: Does this world need more beasts?
book_tentacles.trans: 这个世界需要更多的野兽吗？

flower_withered.en: This is the fate of all things.

generic.en: A mockery of life.

burnt.en: This burnt husk is all that remains.
burnt.trans: 只留下一个烧焦的外壳。

lowpower.en: It's not long for this world.
lowpower.trans: 对于这个世界来说，待电时间不够长。

generic.en: It's a kind of electrical box.

burnt.en: It all crumbles to ash, in the end.
burnt.trans: 最终，一切都烧成了灰烬。

off.en: What did Winona put in it again? Oh...
off.trans: 薇诺娜又往里面放了啥？哦...

generic.en: This is a creature ruled by fear.
generic.trans: 这是一个被恐惧左右的生物。

generic.en: For this creature, to live is to suffer.
generic.trans: 对这个生物来说，活着就是受罪。

shieldofterror.en: Nothing can truly shield you from the horrors of this cruel world.
shieldofterror.trans: 没有什么能真正保护你不受这个残酷世界的伤害。

beefalowool.en: Somewhere, a beefalo is naked and cold.
beefalowool.trans: 在某个地方，一头皮弗娄牛正光着身子受冻。

wx78module_cold.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_cold.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

yellowstaff.en: The stick is as twisted as my soul.
yellowstaff.trans: 这根魔杖和我的灵魂一样扭曲。

stash_map.en: No map will lead me to what my heart seeks.
stash_map.trans: 没有地图能带领我找到我内心所追求的。

line_1.trans: 这是一种已经消亡的文字。

line_2.en: It was important enough to carve into stone, but we'll never know the meaning.
line_2.trans: 它重要到需要刻在石头里，但我们永远不会知道它的意义。

line_4.en: It was important enough to carve into stone, but we'll never know the meaning.
line_4.trans: 它重要到需要刻在石头里，但我们永远不会知道它的意义。

fishingnet.en: To ensnare fish and tear them from their peaceful lives.
fishingnet.trans: 捕鱼工具，打破鱼儿平静的生活。

pig_coin.en: It pays for a fleeting friendship.
pig_coin.trans: 它能买来一段稍纵即逝的友谊。

generic.en: I must pay my respects.

eyebrellahat.trans: 这是一个可展开的眼睛。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: The sands of time are unforgiving.

generic.en: Where the wild beasts go.

knight_nightmare.trans: 另一场输给时间的战斗。

bunnystew.en: You were fast, little rabbit, but death is faster.
bunnystew.trans: 你的速度很快，小兔子，但死神更快。

quagmire_garlic_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_garlic_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

oceantreenut.en: How strange that it doesn't drown when dropped to the bottom of the ocean.
oceantreenut.trans: 多么奇怪，它掉到海底也不淹死。

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: It will only build a temporary distraction.
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 只能暂时分散一下它们的注意力。

moonbutterflywings.en: It's the way of all things.

blowdart_fire.en: Shall we set the world on fire?
blowdart_fire.trans: 我们要点燃这个世界吗？

gelblob_bottle.en: I have an urge to toss it.
gelblob_bottle.trans: 我有一种把它丢出去的冲动。

burnt.en: And to dust you shall return.

generic.en: Let us remember this monster.
We've brought on our own demise.

quagmire_key.en: It is the key to something precious.

dead.en: Will it rise again, I wonder?

generic.en: It is not through yet.

quagmire_grill_small_item.en: It only works if I place it somewhere.
quagmire_grill_small_item.trans: 我必须把它放在某个地方，它才有用。

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: Its stony gaze will glare for eternity.
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 它坚如磐石的凝视将持续到永远。

lightsout.en: Always on the outside, looking in.

generic.en: At least they are comfortable.

drying_notmeat.en: It sways in the drying wind.
drying_notmeat.trans: 它在干燥的风中晃来晃去。

drying.en: It sways in the drying wind.
drying.trans: 它在干燥的风中晃来晃去。

dryinginrain.en: The rain is keeping it from drying.
dryinginrain.trans: 雨水让它没那么容易晾干。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: The rain is keeping it from drying.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 雨水让它没那么容易晾干。

burnt.trans: 它晾肉的日子永远结束了。

generic.en: I can hang meat here.

feather_robin.en: A redbird feather, red like blood.
feather_robin.trans: 红雀的羽毛，如血液一般猩红。

tomato_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
tomato_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

wormlight.en: There's a slight humming coming from it.
wormlight.trans: 它发出了轻微的嗡嗡声。

kitcoon_grass.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_grass.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

moon_altar_link.trans: 是不是有什么东西藏在里面？

yoth_knightstick.en: Hmm. It does look kind of fun.
yoth_knightstick.trans: 嗯，看起来还挺有意思的。

marblebean_sapling.en: It cares nothing for the laws of this world...
marblebean_sapling.trans: 它丝毫不顾这个世界的规律...

catcoon.en: I wonder if it had a twin, too.
catcoon.trans: 我想知道它是不是也有孪生兄弟姐妹。

quagmire_tomato_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_tomato_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: You have to take your medicine, Abigail.

relic.en: A leftover of an ancient world.

yellowmooneye.trans: 母亲的眼睛是什么颜色？

quagmire_salmon.en: It flops as its life slowly leaves its body.
quagmire_salmon.trans: 奄奄一息时，它翻了个身。

held.en: I should save this for when it's darkest.
held.trans: 我该把它留到最黑的时候。

generic.en: It does lift my spirits... a little.
generic.trans: 它确实让我心情好了……一点点。

statuemaxwell.en: Did it go as you planned?

armorwagpunk.en: Even the thickest metal couldn't protect my heart.
armorwagpunk.trans: 即使是最厚的金属也无法保护我的心。

dragonfruit.en: This isn't shaped like a dragon at all.
dragonfruit.trans: 它的形状一点也不像龙。

polly_rogershat.en: The hat of a cutthroat pirate.
polly_rogershat.trans: 一名残忍的海盗戴过的帽子。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: If only I had a signpost to guide me...
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.trans: 要是也有方向标指引我就好了……

wagpunkhat.en: How freeing it would be, to think like an emotionless machine.
wagpunkhat.trans: 像一台没有感情的机器一样思考是多么的自由。

generic.en: They can't show me what I'm looking for.
generic.trans: 我透过它看不到我要找的东西。

poweroff.en: Devoid of life. Like everything in this place.
poweroff.trans: 毫无生气。就像这个地方的一切。

generic.en: All the knowledge in the world won't bring Abigail back.
generic.trans: 就算拥有了全世界所有的知识，也不能挽回阿比盖尔。

walrushat.en: What feverish thoughts transpired beneath this?
walrushat.trans: 这下面泄露了怎样的狂热想法？

steelwool.en: This offers no hope of warmth.

generic.en: It's not floating, yet.

hermitcrabtea_tillweed.en: This tea will make me live longer. Sigh.
hermitcrabtea_tillweed.trans: 这茶会让我活得更久。唉。

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

ancienttree_seed.en: Its future is unknown. Much like the rest of us.
ancienttree_seed.trans: 它的未来是未知的。像我们大多数人一样。

mutator_warrior.en: Very well, since you made the cookies you can bring one spider friend to our tea party.
mutator_warrior.trans: 好吧，既然你做了曲奇饼，那就允许你带一个蜘蛛朋友参加我们的茶会。

maxwellhead.en: He sure has a taste for the dramatic.

accomplishment_shrine.en: I've never much cared for metaphor.

californiaroll.en: A cold fish, dressed up in a seaweed jacket.
californiaroll.trans: 一条冷鱼，穿着海草的夹克。

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.

armorslurper.trans: 贴身、沉闷、有生命的装束。

seeds_cooked.en: The fire has toasted their life away.

candybag.en: It's for putting nice things in...
candybag.trans: 它是用来倒入美好的东西的...

mutatedbearger.en: Don't worry. Abby and I will put you out of your misery.
mutatedbearger.trans: 不用担心。阿比和我会让你摆脱痛苦。

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.en: For when I miss the cold.
hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.trans: 在我想念寒冷的时候喝。

book_fish.trans: 可怜的鱼儿，很容易就会被杀掉。

dragonchilisalad.en: I missed having someone make me dinner...
dragonchilisalad.trans: 怀念有人给我做晚餐的日子...

sewing_kit.en: Another implement for staving off the inevitable decay.
sewing_kit.trans: 另一种推迟不可避免的腐坏的方法。

turnip_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
turnip_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

generic.en: There's a fire in the pit's belly.

out.en: The lava lost its will to burn...
out.trans: 岩浆失去了燃烧的意愿...

scandata.en: If I'm lucky, it might just bore me to death.
scandata.trans: 如果我走运的话，也许它能把我无聊死。

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Oh, I wish I knew if this is the tool he asked for...
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 噢，要是我知道这是不是他要的工具就好了……

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Abigail, do you think this looks like a... whatever he said?
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 阿比盖尔，你觉得这个像不像……他说的那个东西？

batnose.en: It won't be bothering us anymore.

butterflywings.en: No more can the butterfly soar.
butterflywings.trans: 那只蝴蝶再也不能飞了。

armor_sanity.en: A perfectly safe way to go insane.

wagstaff_tool_3.en: I wonder if this might be what that strange old man was looking for?
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 不知道这个会不会是那个怪老头在找的东西？

wagstaff_tool_4.en: Well, I've found something. I wonder if it's what he's looking for...
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 那个，我找到个东西。不知道是不是他在找的……

wagstaff_tool_5.en: This looks like something that strange old man might have a use for.
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 这个看起来像是那个怪老头会用到的东西。

lavaarena_armorlight.en: If only my heart were as light.
lavaarena_armorlight.trans: 如果我的心也这么轻就好了。

dead.en: Even flowers of the night die.
dead.trans: 即使是夜之花也会死亡。

generic.en: Flower of the night.

slingshotammo_stinger.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_stinger.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

steeringwheel_item.en: It would make a steering wheel...

quagmire_onion_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_onion_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

book_fire.en: What if we let this world fall to ash?
book_fire.trans: 让这个世界烧成灰又如何？

wall_stone.en: What will protect me from what's inside?
wall_stone.trans: 在里面又有什么来保护我呢？

cactus_flower.en: Even the knife-plant has a flower. Ugh.
cactus_flower.trans: 就连满身是刺的植物也有花。呃。

torch.en: A tiny bulwark against the night.

fishmeat_small_cooked.en: It will... tide... me over for now.
fishmeat_small_cooked.trans: 它可以让我...暂时...渡过难关。

goose_feather.en: Plucked, just like Abigail was from me.
goose_feather.trans: 一片落羽，就像阿比盖尔离开我一样。

occupied.en: You might be sitting on Abigail.
occupied.trans: 你可能坐到了阿比盖尔身上。

generic.en: Abigail?
Do you want me to read you a story, Abigail?
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔，你想要我给你读故事吗？

chesspiece_sharkboi.en: Their cold shark heart was just misunderstood.
chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 他们冷酷的鲨心其实是被误解了。

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: I'd find it useful if I feared death.
armor_lunarplant_husk.trans: 我要是怕死的话，也许它还有点用。

moonrockseed.en: Its pallor reminds me of Abigail.
moonrockseed.trans: 它的苍白让我想起了阿比盖尔。

cutlichen.trans: 就像生命一样转瞬即逝。

bunnyman.en: What tormented inner lives they must have.
bunnyman.trans: 它们的内心世界一定备受折磨。

generic.en: The cold keeps it.
It measures cloudiness. I like when it's dreary.
generic.trans: 它能测出是否有雨。我喜欢沉闷的天气。

burnt.en: Does that mean sunshine is dead, too?
burnt.trans: 这意味着阳光也死了吗？

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: This won't be of help to my cold, cold heart.
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 这对我冰冷的心不会有帮助。

spiderhat.en: Time to stare into the abyss.

beefalofeed.en: I wouldn't want my beefalo to starve.
beefalofeed.trans: 我可不想饿死我的皮弗娄牛。

chum.en: I had a pet fish once... it didn't last very long.
chum.trans: 我以前养过一条鱼……它没活多久。

nightcaphat.en: There are so few comforts to be found in this wretched place.
nightcaphat.trans: 在这个悲惨的地方，鲜有令人舒适的东西。

diseased.en: It's not long for this world...

withered.en: The oppressive heat got to this one.

generic.en: It's trying to grow up.

punchingbag.en: Some are simply made to suffer.
punchingbag.trans: 有些东西造出来就是为了承受折磨。

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: It warms all but my soul.
hermitcrabtea_firenettles.trans: 它温暖一切，却温暖不了我的灵魂。

voidcloth_umbrella.en: I will stay under its shadow.

seafoodgumbo.en: A sea once teeming with life. No more.
seafoodgumbo.trans: 一度充满生命的海。现在没了。

costume_mirror_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_mirror_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

sweatervest.en: Pieces of dead things, made into a vest!
sweatervest.trans: 背心是用一块块死去的东西做成的！

cooking.en: At least something is warm in this world.
cooking.trans: 至少这个世界还残存了些温热。

dish_ready.en: I suppose I could eat something.
dish_ready.trans: 好吧，吃一点也是可以的。

generic.en: A place to cook dead things.
generic.trans: 烹调死了的东西的地方。

generic.en: Kill the pig! Spill his blood!
generic.trans: 杀了这只猪，沥干他的血！

halloweenpotion_drinks_potent.en: If only life was so potent.
halloweenpotion_drinks_potent.trans: 如果生命也这么强大就好了。

generic.en: I should pay my respects.

moonstorm_static_roamer.trans: 像极了一只游荡的小鬼魂。

horn.en: It sounds like there's a beefalo trapped inside.
horn.trans: 听起就像里面困着一头皮弗娄牛。

purplegem.trans: 紫得就像一个...紫色的东西。

generic.en: I am directionless.

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: The line seems terribly bare... perhaps it needs something...
oceanfishingbobber_none.trans: 鱼线看起来光秃秃的……也许需要什么……

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: A paltry last meal for the fish.

farm_plow_item.en: I suppose I must find a place for the garden.
farm_plow_item.trans: 看来我必须找个地方建园子。

livingtree_sapling.en: It'll grow up big and abhorrent.
livingtree_sapling.trans: 它会长大，然后变得令人憎恶。

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

oceanvine.en: This would make a good hangman's tree.
oceanvine.trans: 这将是一棵很好的绞刑树。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: To keep the demons at bay.

charging.en: It gives the illusion of control.
charging.trans: 它给人一种控制的错觉。

charged.en: It gives the illusion of control.
charged.trans: 它给人一种控制的错觉。

generic.en: It gives the illusion of control.
generic.trans: 它给人一种控制的错觉。

corn_oversized.en: I could pop enough corn for everyone.
corn_oversized.trans: 我可以给所有人爆出足够多的玉米花。

wall_scrap.en: If junk can find new purpose, maybe... nah.
wall_scrap.trans: 如果连垃圾也能找到新的使命，也许……也罢。

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: It eases pain of the body, but not of the heart.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 它能减轻肉体的痛苦，但不能减轻心灵的痛苦。

dumbbell_golden.en: It's almost as heavy as my heart.

decor_portraitframe.en: In the end, all we have are pictures.
decor_portraitframe.trans: 到最后，我们拥有的只剩图片。

shellweaver.trans: 我该做什么呢，阿比盖尔？

inactive.en: Even this obelisk has left me.
inactive.trans: 就连这个方尖碑也离我而去了。

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_horrorfuel.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

batwing.en: If only I could fly away.
batwing.trans: 要是我也能飞走就好了。

oceanfishingrod.en: The depths will offer no safety from my hook.
oceanfishingrod.trans: 不管藏的多深，我的鱼钩都会找到你。

balloonhat.en: Can he make one for Abigail?
balloonhat.trans: 他能不能给阿比盖尔也做一个？

generic.en: A lifeless statue.

carnivaldecor_banner.en: Such a simple thing, but somehow watching it makes my heart lighter.
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 如此简单的东西却不知为何能让我心情放轻松。

portablefirepit_item.en: I may carry warmth with me, yet I am ever cold.
portablefirepit_item.trans: 就算让我随身带上温暖，我还是永远都是冷的。

wagpunk_lever.en: Let's pull it come what may.
wagpunk_lever.trans: 拉下它吧，管不了那么多了。

backpack.en: A spacious sack to increase one's burden.

bird_egg_cooked.en: No bird will ever come of it.

statue.en: There is no life in its eyes.

generic.en: To perish now would save me much sorrow.
generic.trans: 现在死掉就能免掉许多悲伤了。

fence.en: Sort of like an emotional barrier. But wood.
fence.trans: 有点像情感障碍。但是是木头的。

pumpkin.en: It's as big as the hole where my heart once was.
pumpkin.trans: 它和我心里曾经的洞一样大。

chesspiece_formal.en: Alas, the king is but a figurehead, at best.
chesspiece_formal.trans: 哎，国王也顶多是个傀儡而已。

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

pumpkin_seeds.trans: 这是一颗种子。真令人兴奋。

slingshot_band_mimic.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

festive_blueprint.en: It's so colorful, it hurts my eyes.
festive_blueprint.trans: 色彩太过缤纷，伤了我的眼睛。

diseased.en: It's not long for this world...

generic.en: How all must toil for the necessities of life.
generic.trans: 为了生计，难逃劳苦奔波。

book_silviculture.en: What secrets lie deep in the forest?

mashedpotatoes.en: My stomach rumbles just looking at it...
mashedpotatoes.trans: 仅仅看着它就让我的肚子咕咕叫了。

berries_juicy_cooked.en: This hasn't halted the decay, merely stalled it.
berries_juicy_cooked.trans: 这不会暂停变质，只是在拖延。

cool.en: It's cooled off and smells funny.
cool.trans: 它凉下来了，气味很古怪。

exposed.en: It is too strong, and I am too weak.

generic.en: We are all tethered to this place in one way or another.
generic.trans: 我们都被束缚在了这个地方，形式不同而已。

krampus.en: Hello, foul creature of the underworld.
krampus.trans: 你好啊，地下的邪恶生物。

nature_blueprint.en: Do you like this one, Abigail?
nature_blueprint.trans: 这个你喜欢吗，阿比盖尔？

decor_centerpiece.en: The mortal obsession with material things.

wagboss_robot_constructionsite.en: It destroys, is destroyed and rises anew. The cycle endures.
wagboss_robot_constructionsite.trans: 制造毁灭，然后自毁，重生升起。就这么循环往复着。

lunar_seed.en: All that remains is its crown.

shadowdancer.en: Father used to do silly dances like that.
shadowdancer.trans: 父亲曾经也跳过那种傻气的舞蹈。

generic.en: Perhaps I could make something nice.

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: A small spot of light in the darkness... waiting to be snuffed out.
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 黑暗中的一个小光点……随时可能被掐灭。

plantregistryhat.en: I don't like to play in the dirt...

held.en: Give up. You won't escape my grasp.
held.trans: 放弃吧。你逃不脱我的手掌。

generic.en: Such beauty can never last.
generic.trans: 这么美的东西不会长久的。

generic_largestack.en: M-maybe I'll take a look at the prizes...!
generic_largestack.trans: 也许——我该看看有什么奖品……！

generic_smallstack.en: I've collected quite a few now.
generic_smallstack.trans: 我现在已经收集了不少了。

generic.en: I... won something?

burnt.en: Fire has broken it down even further.
burnt.trans: 火的洗礼让它更加残破了。

generic.en: Time has broken it down.
generic.trans: 时间的洗礼让它破旧不堪。

costume_doll_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_doll_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

spore_moon.en: Pop goes the weaselly little thing.
spore_moon.trans: 这小东西啪啪啪地爆炸。

uncovered.en: Perhaps it wanted to hide the shame of its monstrous form?
uncovered.trans: 也许它想要把它对怪物形态的羞愧藏起来？

finished.en: It's been made whole again. Lucky.

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: Will you silently bear witness to what befalls us?
boatrace_spectator_dragonling.trans: 你会静静见证即将降临在我们身上的一切吗？

generic.en: The writing has been smudged away, the words forgotten.
generic.trans: 书写已被抹去，文字也已遗忘。

horrorfuel.en: There are always more horrors to come.
horrorfuel.trans: 总会有更多的恐怖来临。

held.en: I hold its life in my hands.
held.trans: 它的生命掌握在我的手中。

generic.en: Pretty, but short-lived.
generic.trans: 美丽的生命，如昙花一现。

burnt.en: Death comes for all of us...
burnt.trans: 死亡为我们所有人而来...

generic.en: We can plant a Winter's Feast tree.
generic.trans: 我们可以种一棵圣诞树。

quagmire_rubble_chimney2.en: Its hearth no longer has a home.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: A paltry last meal for the fish.

quagmire_sap_spoiled.trans: 就像生活一样有苦有甜。

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: The beast came back even colder than before.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 野兽回来了，比以前更冷了。

slingshotammo_container.en: Grief takes up no space, yet weighs far more.
slingshotammo_container.trans: 悲伤不占空间，但却沉重无比。

eggplant_cooked.en: Cooking this nightshade made it even less deadly.
eggplant_cooked.trans: 煮熟这个茄子可以使它不那么致命。

maxwell.en: I feel a strange kinship with him.
maxwell.trans: 他让我觉得有一种奇怪的亲切感。

wagboss_robot_secret.en: Is it better not to know?

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_dreadstone.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

chesspiece_depthworm.en: How curious, the things we choose to commemorate.
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 我们总是选择一些古怪的东西去纪念。

moon_altar_ward.en: So lost and alone... my sister and I will help you.
moon_altar_ward.trans: 如此失落和孤独……我们姐妹俩会帮助你的。
