uncovered.en: The more the marble wastes, the more the statue grows.
uncovered.trans: 大理石浪费得越多，雕像成长得越快。

covered.en: A beautiful corruption gnaws at its base...
covered.trans: 美丽的腐败在它的底部啃噬...

finished.en: Not everyone can be put back together after falling apart.
finished.trans: 不是每个人在崩溃后都能复原。

rock_avocado_fruit.en: It grew on a tree, but it looks like a rock.
rock_avocado_fruit.trans: 结在树上，但是看着像一块石头。

fish.en: It was flopping around desperately for life. The poor fool.
fish.trans: 它为了活命绝望地挣扎。可怜的傻瓜。

generic.en: No treasure could replace what I've lost.
generic.trans: 什么宝藏都取代不了我失去的。

quagmire_slaughtertool.en: Is all of life not a slaughter?
quagmire_slaughtertool.trans: 人生，不就是一场屠杀吗？

snurtle.en: That one has a larger shell.

critter_lamb.en: The softest creature in the hardest world.
critter_lamb.trans: 最坚硬的世界中的最柔软的生物。

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Perhaps now death has finally claimed it.

generic.en: Those vines carry a heavy burden.
generic.trans: 那些藤蔓承载着沉重的负担。

wilted.en: I think it's lovelier this way...
wilted.trans: 我想以这种方式它会更可爱...

generic.en: We pulled the flowers from their homes for our own amusement.
generic.trans: 我们为了消遣从它们家摘了鲜花。

empty.en: I feel the urge to stare into it.
empty.trans: 我有种想盯着它的冲动。

generic.en: How sad... there's nobody left to guard.
generic.trans: 悲哀……已经没有人守护了。

figkabab.en: The fig pieces look like little pierced hearts.
figkabab.trans: 无花果肉看起来像被刺穿的小心脏。

generic.en: I wish I had a song left in my heart to sing.
generic.trans: 我倒希望我内心还留下了一首能唱出来的歌。

onion_cooked.en: It will never make anyone cry again.
onion_cooked.trans: 它再也无法让谁流泪了。

generic.en: They are rather pretty...
Abigail, do you remember collecting shells on the beach?
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔，你还记得我们一起去海滩拾贝壳吗？

flotationcushion.en: One does not need water to drown.

wobster_sheller.en: Its hard exterior shelters it from the cruel outside world.
wobster_sheller.trans: 它坚硬的外壳保护它不受外面那个残忍世界的伤害。

chopped.en: It's met its end at our hands.

generic.en: A fleeting beauty.

slurtlehat.en: It certainly didn't help the original owner.
slurtlehat.trans: 它肯定对原来的主人没什么帮助。

seeds.en: Life, or at least the promise of it.
seeds.trans: 生命，或者至少是孕育生命的希望。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: I suppose I should try to be useful...
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 我想我应该努力成为一个有用的人……

pig_token.trans: 又是一个不必要的玩物。

generic.en: I wonder what happens to us in-between.
generic.trans: 我想知道我们在两界中间会经历什么。

picked.trans: 万物都会消亡，就连菌类也不例外。

generic.en: They thrive on a stump made by death.
generic.trans: 它们在死神创造的树桩上茁壮成长。

generic.en: Kindness only begets more pain...
generic.trans: 善良只会带来更多的痛苦……

archive_centipede.en: I suppose I'm to be crushed by a bug... an ironic end.
archive_centipede.trans: 看来我是要被一只虫子压扁了……多么讽刺的下场。

generic.en: What IS that?!

feather_canary.en: A canary feather, golden as the gilded cage.
feather_canary.trans: 金丝雀的羽毛，如镀金的笼子一般闪亮。

deserthat.en: Now no one can tell when I'm crying.
deserthat.trans: 现在没有人能够看出来我什么时候哭过。

quagmire_mushrooms.en: Maybe we'll get lucky and they'll be poisonous.
quagmire_mushrooms.trans: 说不定我们运气好，它们都是有毒的。

valid.trans: 它已经得到了想要的宝藏。

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: A meager light to combat the darkness.
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 一盏微不足道的灯，难以对抗黑暗。

gestalt_guard.en: I don't think they want us here.
gestalt_guard.trans: 我觉得他们不希望我们出现在这里。

off.en: There is no light to be found.

on.en: A deathly light dances across the room.
on.trans: 死一般的光线在房间里舞动。

dragonboat_kit.en: I can help set this up, I guess.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 我大概可以建好这个吧。

ghost.en: Come back, %s... Take my heart...
ghost.trans: %s，回来…收下我的心…

firestarter.en: Do the Norse have a god of fire, %s?
firestarter.trans: %s，挪威人有火神吗？

murderer.en: It'll all be over soon, %s.
murderer.trans: %s，一切会很快结束。

attacker.en: %s... she's bloodthirsty.

reviver.en: It seems your heart is strong too, %s...

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

pickaxe.en: That the earth itself might be penetrated.
pickaxe.trans: 那地球本身可能会被穿透。

mast.en: If we sailed forever we would never reach the horizon.
mast.trans: 如果一直航行，就永远到不了地平线。

antliontrinket.en: If only I could kick it.

match_but_snack.en: This will satisfy the beast, but not for long.
match_but_snack.trans: 这会满足野兽的，但不会长久。

match.en: The beast will be satisfied with this.
match.trans: 对此，野兽会感到满意的。

generic.en: We should offer it to the beast.
generic.trans: 我们应当把它献祭给野兽。

burnt.en: Their kingdom vanishes as swiftly as it appeared.
burnt.trans: 他们的王国来的快去的也快。

generic.en: "The Frogs Who Desired a King"...

cooking_long.en: Whatever's in there isn't dead yet.

costume_queen_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_queen_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

mermguard_lunar.en: Their eyes... they're so vacant and cold...
mermguard_lunar.trans: 他们的眼神……是如此空洞和冷漠

chesspiece_malbatross.en: No more will she soar over the gloomy shoals.
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 她再也不能在灰暗的海岸飞翔了。

onion_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
onion_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

yotb_sewingmachine_item.en: It needs to be put together before it can be of any use.

growing.en: Despite the horrors of the world, it seems intent on living.
growing.trans: 尽管这个世界很恐怖，但它似乎打算活下去。

full_weed.en: It is the tragic fate of all weeds to be spurned from the garden.
full_weed.trans: 园子里的杂草都难逃被铲除的宿命。

seed.en: Is it cold down there, alone in the ground?
seed.trans: 一个人在地里，下面冷不冷？

full_oversized.en: However did it grow so big?

rotten.en: There's nothing I can do for it.

generic.en: A plant.

full.en: How cruel, that I must now steal the fruits of your labor.
full.trans: 多么残酷，我现在必须偷取你的劳动成果。

ancientfruit_gem.en: A fruit that offers no sweetness.

berries_juicy.en: I'd better consume these before death does.
berries_juicy.trans: 我最好在死亡吃掉他们之前吃掉这些。

held.trans: 你在我的摆布之中，小鸟。

generic.en: Such a cheery yellow... I can't stand it.
generic.trans: 这样活泼的颜色...我忍受不了。

fishmeat_cooked.en: A proper grilling puts a stop to the flopping.
fishmeat_cooked.trans: 烤上一会儿，它们就不会扑腾了。

held.en: I can feel its stolen warmth.
held.trans: 我能感觉到它偷来的鲜血的温热。

generic.en: It thieves others' life to maintain its own.
generic.trans: 它窃取他人的生命来维持自己的生命。

ready.trans: 它们的辛勤工作收获颇丰!

fullhoney.trans: 它们的辛勤工作收获颇丰!

generic.en: Their stolen labor tastes so sweet.
generic.trans: 他们偷来的劳动成果如此美味。

spiderden_bedazzler.en: I wonder if I might ask to borrow some colored pencils...
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 我该不该开口借几根彩色铅笔……

wall_scrap_item.en: If junk can find new purpose, maybe... nah.
wall_scrap_item.trans: 如果连垃圾也能找到新的使命，也许……也罢。

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: All that death in such a tiny package.
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 小小包裹里竟然容得下如此多的死亡。

oceanfish_medium_9.en: A fish, by any name, should not smell sweet.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 鱼即使不叫鱼，依然不会芬芳。

balloons_empty.en: These look as deflated as I feel...

oceanfish_medium_8.en: It has no warmth... like my life without Abigail.
oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 它没有一丝温暖……就像少了阿比盖尔的我一样。

oceanfish_medium_7.en: It's almost too pretty to eat. Almost.
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 这么漂亮几乎都不舍得吃了。几乎。

oceanfish_medium_6.en: It's almost too pretty to eat. Almost.
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 这么漂亮几乎都不舍得吃了。几乎。

glassspike.en: My warped reflection stares back at me with malice.
glassspike.trans: 我弯曲的倒影带着恶意回视着我。

oceanfish_medium_5.en: Its existence must be so confusing.

oceanfish_medium_4.en: My luck couldn't possibly be worse than it already is.
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 我的运气应该到了谷底了。

oceanfish_medium_3.en: It fought hard to live. A shame, really.
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 它为了求生挣扎了好久。真的可惜了。

wathgrithr_shield.en: What do I have that's worth protecting?
wathgrithr_shield.trans: 我还有什么值得保护的呢？

oceanfish_medium_2.en: I'm afraid your time is up.

seedpouch.en: Another burden for me to shoulder.
seedpouch.trans: 又是一个要我承担的负担。

lightflier.en: A small spot of light in the darkness... waiting to be snuffed out.
lightflier.trans: 黑暗中的一个小光点……随时可能被掐灭。

quagmire_potato.en: It has eyes, yet it never cries.

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: But will it heal my soul?
lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.trans: 但是它能治愈我的灵魂吗？

generic.en: Nothing could be as painful as my own memories.
generic.trans: 没有什么能比我自己的记忆更痛苦的了。

moonstaff.trans: 沐浴在苍白的永恒的亮光中...

staffed.en: Perhaps it thirsts for a sacrifice. Where's Webber...
staffed.trans: 也许它是渴望祭品。韦伯在哪里...

generic.en: I felt a terrible chill run down my spine.
generic.trans: 我感觉一股可怕的寒意顺着我的脊椎下去。

bedroll_furry.en: For veiling oneself in the fuzzy skins of the fallen.
bedroll_furry.trans: 用死去动物的毛皮把自己盖起来。

yotr_decor_1_item.en: I should find a place for it to belong.

rhinodrill.en: Brotherly camaraderie will not save you.

spiderden.en: A nest of filth and villainy.

generic.en: It looks so... silly.

activated.en: Will it draw me toward safety or destruction?
activated.trans: 它将把我引向安全还是毁灭？

farm_hoe.en: I must prepare the seeds for their burial.
farm_hoe.trans: 我要为种子们准备好埋葬的地方。

phlegm.en: The wretched beast must have been sick.
phlegm.trans: 那只不幸的野兽肯定是生病了。

eggplant.trans: 差一点就是致命的颠茄了。就差一点点。

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: I still remember watching the light leave their eyes.
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 我仍然记得看着他们的眼睛逐渐失去光芒。

book_temperature.en: What does it matter? I'll always feel cold inside.
book_temperature.trans: 有什么用呢？我的内心总会感到寒冷。

mooseegg.en: Not sure how a thing like that happens.
mooseegg.trans: 不确定那样的事情是怎么发生的。

batbat.trans: 一件附魔武器。多么令人兴奋！

carnivaldecor_plant.en: A small reminder of... a nice day.
carnivaldecor_plant.trans: 美好的一天的……小小象征。

starving.en: The emptiness is eating him from the inside out.

dead.en: Bereft of life, he rests in pieces.

generic.en: Few of us can see our cages.
generic.trans: 我们中很少有人可以看到我们的笼子。

sleeping.trans: 死了？不，只是睡着了而已。

fish_box.en: It feels a bit cruel to trap them within sight of freedom.
fish_box.trans: 把他们困在里面感觉有点残忍。

onion_oversized.en: You won't draw any tears from me.

generic.en: A bee without conscience.

bloom.en: All its efforts fall on rocky soil.
bloom.trans: 它的所有努力都掉落在多石的土壤上。

generic.en: It looks like a rotting hat.
generic.trans: 它看起来像一顶腐烂的帽子。

acidcovered.en: I know the scent of death and decay.
acidcovered.trans: 我了解死亡和腐烂的味道。

featherpencil.en: M...maybe I'll doodle something... When no one's looking.
featherpencil.trans: 嗯...也许我会涂鸦点东西...趁没人在看的时候。

quagmire_park_angel2.trans: 阿布盖尔需要一尊雕塑。

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.

beast_blueprint.en: May it give my beefalo more luck than I've had.
beast_blueprint.trans: 希望它能给我的皮弗娄牛带去我没有的好运。

burnt.en: Charred remains are all that's left.

generic.en: I never cared for climbing trees, no matter how many times Abby prodded me.
generic.trans: 我从来不喜欢爬树，不管阿比催我多少次。

overloaded.en: It takes a lot of breaks.

burnt.en: It all crumbles to ash, in the end.
burnt.trans: 最终，一切都烧成了灰烬。

generic.en: This one looks odd.

lavaarena_armor_hp.en: It protects from damage, but not from sorrow.
lavaarena_armor_hp.trans: 它能抵挡伤害，但不能抵挡悲伤。

book_sleep.en: Does it impart an eternal slumber?
book_sleep.trans: 它能带来永恒的长眠吗？

critter_bulbin.en: Its adorable face nearly brings me to tears.
critter_bulbin.trans: 它的脸可爱到让我想掉眼泪。

saddle_basic.en: As if it wasn't already burdened by the yoke of life...
saddle_basic.trans: 好像它还没有负担生活的重荷...

generic.en: Has it ever been above ground?
It's soothing to watch the seconds tick away.
generic.trans: 看着时间一分一秒地过去，心里很舒坦。

shadowrift_portal.trans: 无尽的、旋转的虚无……多么安详。

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

lunarplant_kit.en: You can't always fix what's broken. But sometimes you can.
lunarplant_kit.trans: 不是所有破损的东西都可以被修复，但有些可以。

monstertartare.trans: 看起来不错，吃起来糟透了。

mask_sagehat.trans: 我早就掩饰自己的情感了。

sleeping.en: It is arrested by deepest sleep.

generic.en: I despise how it skitters...

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: We help the plants grow, only to cull them in their prime.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 我们帮助植物生长，为的居然是在它们全盛的时候进行收割。

malbatross_feather.en: It won't be needing these anymore.

spat.en: I should put it out of its misery.
spat.trans: 我应该让它从痛苦中解脱。

yoth_lance.trans: 死亡就骑在它的枪尖上。

kitcoon_rocky.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

boatrace_start.en: Is this the start or the end? Or the start of the end?
boatrace_start.trans: 这是开始还是结束？还是结束的开始？

blowdart_lava.en: To pierce the hearts of my foes...

moose_nesting_ground.en: A cradle of life. I hate it.

wobster_moonglass.en: This world has made it hard, and sharp.
wobster_moonglass.trans: 这个世界让它变得坚硬和锋利。

bullkelp_root.en: It's like a very slimy whip.
bullkelp_root.trans: 好像是一把黏糊糊的鞭子。

cookiecuttershell.en: All that remains of its former occupant.

earmuffshat.en: Their bitter end offers protection from the bitter cold.
earmuffshat.trans: 它们难以接受的尾巴可以抵御严寒。

spider_dropper.en: The darkness has drained the color from their fur.
spider_dropper.trans: 黑暗褪去了它们身上的颜色。

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: Nothing can escape death for long.
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 谁都不能永远逃避死亡。

1.en: It was so lonely without you here.

2.trans: 那是我的孪生姐妹，阿比盖尔。
那是我的孪生姐妹，阿比盖尔。
那是我的孪生姐妹，阿比盖尔。

bananabush.en: Bananas that grow in the sun... how unnatural.
bananabush.trans: 在阳光下生长的香蕉……多么不自然。

shadowthrall_wings.en: There is no face beneath that hood.
shadowthrall_wings.trans: 兜帽下面居然没有面孔。

sleep.en: Given the choice, would it accept this life of toil?
sleep.trans: 如果可以选，它会接受这种劳碌的生活吗？

generic.en: Given the choice, would it accept this life of toil?
generic.trans: 如果可以选，它会接受这种劳碌的生活吗？

generic.en: He's little and warty.
generic.trans: 他个子很小而且全身是包。

fireballstaff.en: To call death from the skies.

cookedmandrake.en: It was a good death. You will be delicious.
cookedmandrake.trans: 死得很有价值。你会很美味的。

generic.en: This home is not a happy one, I fear.
generic.trans: 我担心这个家并不温馨。

empty.en: If they are not in there, where are they?
empty.trans: 如果它们不在这，那它们会在哪里？

dug_bananabush.en: Bananas that grow in the sun... how unnatural.
dug_bananabush.trans: 在阳光下生长的香蕉……多么不自然。

treegrowthsolution.en: I suppose even trees get hungry.

eyeturret_item.en: I think it needs to be placed.

fence_rotator.en: Disorderly fences need to be brought into line.
fence_rotator.trans: 需要让无序的栅栏变得有序。

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_gunpowder.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

wx78module_heat.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_heat.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

grassgator.en: It fears what it does not know.
grassgator.trans: 它惧怕它不知道的东西。

cave_entrance_ruins.en: Someone is trying to keep the underground at bay.
cave_entrance_ruins.trans: 有人不想让别人进入地下。

telestaff.en: We could escape if it were more powerful.
telestaff.trans: 如果它更强大一些，我们就可以解脱了。

red_cap.en: A mushroom after my own heart.

yotr_token.en: A duel to the death might help pass the time.
yotr_token.trans: 来一场殊死对决也许能快一点打发时间。

kabobs.en: Meat, skewered right through the center.

molehat.en: So this is what those things see.
molehat.trans: 这就是那些生物看到的东西。

fence_item.en: We could use it to build a fence.
fence_item.trans: 我们可以用它来建造一个栅栏。

marblepillar.en: Even stone can not withstand the constant pull of decay.
marblepillar.trans: 即使是石头，也经不起天长地久的腐蚀。

bluegem.en: Blue like... er... a sad bird?
bluegem.trans: 忧郁的蓝色，就像...呃...一只悲伤的鸟？

flower_cave_withered.en: There's a sadness about how it flickers.
flower_cave_withered.trans: 它闪烁的方式中带着一种悲伤。

armorskeleton.en: I shall wrap myself in death's sweet embrace.
armorskeleton.trans: 我应该用死者的甜蜜拥抱伪装我自己。

bombed.en: Perhaps it will soothe my soul, if only for a moment.
bombed.trans: 也许它能安慰我的灵魂，哪怕只有片刻。

generic.en: When I gaze upon my reflection, a ghost stares back at me.
generic.trans: 我注视自己的倒影时，看到一个鬼魂盯着我看。

victorian_blueprint.en: Playing dress-up with a beefalo is... quite fun...
victorian_blueprint.trans: 和皮弗娄牛玩换装……真好玩……

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: Father had a tool shed, though he hardly used it.
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 父亲有过一个工具棚，不过他很少使用。

generic.en: A siesta is but a preview of death.

burnt.en: A preview of the fires of Hell.

malbatross_feathered_weave.en: My fingers ache from sewing in all those feathers.
malbatross_feathered_weave.trans: 缝羽毛缝的我指头发痛。

spider_water.en: Its legs look so thin and delicate, like they could snap at the slightest kick...
spider_water.trans: 它的腿看起来很细很精致，好像轻轻一踢就会折断……

boat_bumper_crabking.en: Looks strong. Are we afraid to die?
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 看起来是结实的。我们怕死么？

spider_healer_item.en: Merely a temporary respite from the pain of the world.
spider_healer_item.trans: 对世界的痛苦来说，仅仅是暂时的喘息。

ghost.en: Did you lose a game, %s?
ghost.trans: 你输了一把游戏啊，%s？

firestarter.en: Abby and I know what you did, %s.
firestarter.trans: 阿比和我知道你干了什么，%s。

murderer.en: Abby and I will put your souls to rest!
murderer.trans: 阿比和我会让你的灵魂得到安息！

attacker.en: You haven't been a good imp today, %s.
attacker.trans: 你今天的表现不是一个好恶魔，%s。

reviver.en: %s is reliable when it counts.
reviver.trans: %s关键时候还是能派上用场的。

generic.en: Heehee. You're funny, %s.

ghost.en: Should I revive you, %s? Hmm...
ghost.trans: 我应该让你复活吗，%s？嗯...

firestarter.en: Are you trying to kindle a bad reputation?
firestarter.trans: 你想讨个恶名吗？

murderer.en: Cursed villain!
murderer.trans: 天杀的坏蛋！

attacker.en: I don't think I trust %s yet.

reviver.en: He's gone from Sisyphus to Lazarus.

generic.en: How are you coping, %s?

mask_treehat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_treehat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

fishmeat_small_dried.trans: 几乎枯萎到什么都不剩。

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: I suppose I should try to be useful...
carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.trans: 我想我应该努力成为一个有用的人……

inground.en: I would hide too, if I could.
inground.trans: 如果可以的话，我也想藏起来。

generic.en: Damp.

gravy.en: How we try in vain to add flavor to our bland and meaningless lives.
gravy.trans: 我们乏味而徒劳的生活根本不值得去调味。

generic.en: This body is nothing but an empty vessel.
generic.trans: 这个身体只不过是一个空空的容器。

junk_pile.en: Could there be something worthwhile hiding deep inside?
junk_pile.trans: 在深处是否藏有价值连城的东西呢？

maxwellphonograph.en: Shall we have a danse macabre?
maxwellphonograph.trans: 我们要跳一场死亡之舞吗？

retrieving_item.en: It's pulling something from the depths...
retrieving_item.trans: 它把什么东西从深渊里捞了出来……

holding_item.en: This is what I have to show for my efforts.
holding_item.trans: 这是我付出努力后换来的。

generic.en: I doubt I'll find anything of interest.
generic.trans: 肯定找不到有意思的东西。

wagdrone_parts.en: A shame we don't come with spare parts.
wagdrone_parts.trans: 可惜我们无法像机器般更换零件。

upgraded_stacksize.en: It holds multitudes, and refuses to burn away.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 它承受了那么多，竟然还拒绝被烧尽。

generic.en: Boom box.

someone_else_won.en: Enjoy your victory {winner}... good things never last.
someone_else_won.trans: 享受你的胜利吧， {winner}……好景素来不长。

burnt.en: I suppose this means the race is over.
burnt.trans: 我猜这个意味着比赛已经结束。

generic.en: Don't worry, the end is near.
generic.trans: 别担心, 终点很近了。

unwritten.en: Its blank face shall soon offer a secret.
unwritten.trans: 它一脸茫然，很快便会透露秘密。

generic.en: A mark is made, however transient.
generic.trans: 我做了个标记，不过是暂时的。

nitre_formation.en: It thrives while the rest of us burn.
nitre_formation.trans: 它茁壮成长，而我们却在燃烧。

poop.trans: 生命的特征就是血和这个。

wortox_souljar.en: You can hear the souls screaming inside.
wortox_souljar.trans: 你能听到灵魂在里面尖叫。

mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.en: Alas, being struck down by lightning is one less thing I can look forward too.
mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.trans: 唉，有了它被雷劈也不可能了，我又少了一件可以期待的事情。

quagmire_carrot_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_carrot_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

yotr_decor_2_item.en: I should find a place for it to belong.

uncovered.en: We all have monsters within, I suppose.
uncovered.trans: 我们内心都有怪物，我猜。

covered.en: There's a sickly beauty to it...

finished.en: If only the rest of us could be whole again.
finished.trans: 要是我们剩下的人可以再次成为一个整体。

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: It will make the emptiness in my chest grow even bigger...
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 这会让我箱子中空虚感变得更大……

chesspiece_pawn.en: We are all but pawns in this game called "life".
chesspiece_pawn.trans: 我们在这场称为“人生”的游戏中不过是些小棋子。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.en: At least they're not real worms.

wall_stone_item.en: These won't protect from the demons within.
wall_stone_item.trans: 这不能抵御内心的恶魔。

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: There is a quiet strength about this one.
mask_ancient_masonhat.trans: 它散发出一种安静的力量。

moonglass.en: Its sharp edge would end this quickly.

complete.en: What horrors have we resurrected here today?
complete.trans: 我们今天复活了什么令人恐怖的东西？

generic.en: We must find more pieces.
generic.trans: 我们必须找到更多的碎块。

funny.en: Death has a sense of humor.

hawaiianshirt.en: They'll put flowers on anything these days.
hawaiianshirt.trans: 如今，他们做什么都要在上面放点花。

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: Can I... help set up the carnival?

quagmire_potato_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_potato_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

warglet.en: A beast of gnashing teeth and fury.

record_end.en: I wonder if father still listens to his record collection.
record_end.trans: 不知道父亲是否还会听他收藏的旧唱片。

on.en: Abigail would have thought this was... pretty...
on.trans: 阿比盖尔会认为这东西...很可爱...

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: I seem to leave only misery in my wake...
hermit_cracked_pearl.trans: 我走过的地方必留下灾祸……

asparagus_seeds.en: Will I live to see this grow?
asparagus_seeds.trans: 我能活着看到它长大吗？

goldenpitchfork.en: One might as well till fields with style.

kitcoonden_kit.en: Oh, to be young and free of life's worries.
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 啊，年轻烂漫时没有生活的烦恼多好。

kelp_cooked.en: The things we do for sustenance.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: A paltry last meal for the fish.

powcake.en: I would have to be desperate.
powcake.trans: 我要不是饿疯了绝不会吃它。

generic.en: It's just putting off the inevitable.
generic.trans: 只是将不可避免的死亡延迟了。

burnt.en: I'm glad that fail-safe is gone.
burnt.trans: 我很高兴，保险措施失效了。

generic.en: It's soothing to watch the seconds tick away.
generic.trans: 看着时间一分一秒地过去，心里很舒坦。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: The rain will mask my tears of boredom...
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 落下的雨会盖住我空虚的泪……

generic.en: Perhaps broken things can be fixed... over time...
generic.trans: 也许坏了的东西也可以修好吧……假以时日……

battlesong_fireresistance.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

generic.en: A piece, constrained to the board.

mask_toadyhat.trans: 我早就掩饰自己的情感了。

generic.en: It will draw others near.
generic.trans: 它会把其他同类吸引过来。

shadowheart.en: It beats with a sorrow to span the skies and plumb the darkest seas.
shadowheart.trans: 它的跳动伴随着悲伤，跨越了天空，探索最黑暗的大海。

generic.en: Life doesn't always make sense.

open.en: No matter what it consumes, it is never satisfied.
open.trans: 不论多少东西都填不饱它的胃口。

sweettea.en: Would you care for a tea party, Abigail?
sweettea.trans: 你想参加茶话会吗，阿比盖尔？

leafloaf.en: It's nothing like any meatloaf I've tried.
leafloaf.trans: 这和我试过的任何肉饼都不一样。

quagmire_altar_queen.en: I am not impressed by opulence.

hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.en: This takes me to a dark place.
hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.trans: 它把我带到一个很黑暗的地方。

pondfish.en: It was flopping around desperately for life. The poor fool.
pondfish.trans: 它为了活命绝望地挣扎。可怜的傻瓜。

wathgrithrhat.en: I've never seen her take it off before...
wathgrithrhat.trans: 我之前从未见过她取下它...

moon_altar_icon.en: I will take you to your final resting place.
moon_altar_icon.trans: 我会带你到你最后的安息之地。

cursed_monkey_token.en: It has an aura of malevolence... and monkeyness.
cursed_monkey_token.trans: 它有一种恶毒的光环……和猴子的气息。

stump.en: It's been put out of its misery.

generic.en: Burning from the inside... it must be agony.
generic.trans: 内心在燃烧……一定很痛苦。

mosquitofertilizer.en: The best nourishment is the lifeblood of another.
mosquitofertilizer.trans: 最好的营养品是他人毕生的心血。

quagmire_key_park.en: The key to a beautiful place, locked long away.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 这把钥匙开启的是一个美丽而遥远的地方。

tourtiere.en: I cannot be comforted by comfort food... but I will have some more...
tourtiere.trans: 美食不能慰藉我……不过我还是再吃点……

held.en: Tiny lights, stranded from the world outside my pocket.
held.trans: 从我的口袋洒向外界的微光。

generic.en: A tiny brightness in the dark.

wall_hay_item.trans: 它们的防御效果值得怀疑。

boatrace_seastack_monkey.en: Why try to avoid the inevitable?
boatrace_seastack_monkey.trans: 明知不可避免，又何必闪躲？

wagboss_robot.en: I have a bad feeling about this.

dragonfruit_cooked.en: Still not a dragon. At least it's dead.
dragonfruit_cooked.trans: 还是没有变成龙。至少它是死的。

alterguardian_contained.en: It's draining the life from that creature...
alterguardian_contained.trans: 它正在耗尽那个生物的生命……

pirate_stash.en: Oh... did I... find the treasure?

roastturkey.en: The holiday was cut short for this poor bird.
roastturkey.trans: 这只可怜的鸟的假期被削短了。

minotaurhorn.en: All that remains of a once great beast.
minotaurhorn.trans: 一位曾经的伟大野兽留下的全部遗物。

held.en: So many have perished. But this one is safe.
held.trans: 许多已经消亡。但这个很安全。

generic.en: Be free, little one!
Nature is so boring.

tallbirdegg_cooked.en: All that promise, snatched away. Not bad with bacon.
tallbirdegg_cooked.trans: 所有希望都被夺走了。和培根搭配起来不赖。

wagboss_robot_leg.en: A piece of its physical body discarded and forgotten.
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 它肉体的一部分，被遗弃且遗忘。

costume_blacksmith_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_blacksmith_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

ancient_altar_broken.en: I hear the painful echoes of the dead.
ancient_altar_broken.trans: 我听到了死者的痛苦回声。

wx78module_maxhunger.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: I forsee a wave of death.

quagmire_pebblecrab.en: Had I such a shell, I would never emerge.
quagmire_pebblecrab.trans: 假如我长着这样的壳，我绝不会露面。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: The ball of death burns brighter than ever.
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.trans: 死亡之球燃烧得比以往更加亮。

playing.en: I think... I'd like to try to play...

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

battlesong_durability.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

oceanfish_small_6.trans: 它已经散发出变质的臭味。

dragonpie.en: Well, at least it's a pie now.
dragonpie.trans: 好吧，至少它现在做成派了。

oceanfish_small_8.en: The sun has set on your time in this world.
oceanfish_small_8.trans: 你在这个世界的时间算是到头了。

oceanfish_small_7.trans: 哼。我看不出有什么相似。

oceanfish_small_2.en: I'm afraid you've splished your last splash.

oceanfish_small_1.en: It didn't have enough time to grow.

beehive.en: A wretched hive of scum and pollen.
beehive.trans: 充满渣滓和花粉的可悲蜂窝。

oceanfish_small_4.en: All my efforts reap only the smallest rewards.
oceanfish_small_4.trans: 我所有努力就换来一点回报。

wall_moonrock.en: The moon... she whispers promises of protection to me.
wall_moonrock.trans: 月亮...她轻声许下保护我的承诺。

burning.en: Antagonizing crows is always bad luck.
burning.trans: 对抗乌鸦总是运气不好。

generic.en: Who would want to scare crows away?

burnt.en: Now the crows will be at peace.

cookedmeat.en: The remaining blood has been cooked away.

oceanfish_small_3.en: I suppose it will do for now.

firestarter.en: Abby and I know what you've been doing.
firestarter.trans: 阿比和我知道你干了什么。

ghost.en: I'll mourn you, %s.
ghost.trans: 我会悼念你的，%s。

murderer.en: Your treachery ends here, %s.
murderer.trans: 你的背叛到此为止，%s。

attacker.en: What if he was just fattening us up, all along?
attacker.trans: 他打算把我们养肥了再杀么？

reviver.en: Sometimes he shows he cares without cooking.
reviver.trans: 有时候他也通过做饭以外的方式表达关心。

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

chesspiece_klaus.en: No more life in this festive spirit.
chesspiece_klaus.trans: 这只节日的怪兽没了生气。

held.en: Life is not fair, is it?

generic.en: Oh, to be so carefree.

record_efs.trans: 曲中有甜蜜而不祥的征兆。

generic.en: Not everything can come back so easily.
generic.trans: 不是所有事情都可以轻易地挽回。

carrot_planted.en: It's a carrot that's in the ground.
carrot_planted.trans: 这是一根种在地里的胡萝卜。

ghost.en: Have you and Abigail become aquainted yet?
ghost.trans: 你和阿比盖尔已经认识过了吗？

firestarter.en: Is this world to end in fire, %s?
firestarter.trans: 这个世界是否将在火中结束，%s？

murderer.en: You prolong your own life while robbing others of theirs? No more.
murderer.trans: 你一面延长自己的生命，一面却剥夺别人的生命？停手吧。

attacker.en: You're no fun at all, %s!

reviver.en: Couldn't you have brought Abigail back instead?
reviver.trans: 你就不能自己别回来，给我把阿比盖尔带回来吗？

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

carpentry_blade_moonglass.en: Pretty. If it was smaller I'd wear it around my neck.
carpentry_blade_moonglass.trans: 很漂亮。如果再小一点的话我会戴在脖子上。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: It will only prolong the inevitable.
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 这只会延长不可避免的事情。

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: Abby will make a big impression.
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 阿比会给人留下深刻印象。

wagpunk_bits.en: Only parts of a greater whole. Just like me.
wagpunk_bits.trans: 只是一个更大整体的一部分。就像我一样。

manrabbit_tail.en: It contains his fuzzy wuzzy essence.
manrabbit_tail.trans: 毛茸茸、软绵绵的，尽显其本质。

batnose_cooked.en: It doesn't look more appetizing now.
batnose_cooked.trans: 做熟也不见得好吃多少。

houndwhistle.en: That I cannot hear it does not mean it is silent.
houndwhistle.trans: 我听不见它的声音，不代表它很安静。

beefalotreat.en: Oh to be able to find joy in such a simple thing...
beefalotreat.trans: 哦，能在简单的食物中找到快乐……

generic.en: It's dead.

uncommon.en: The colors are so cheery, yet I don't despise it. How odd.
uncommon.trans: 颜色虽然如此欢快，但我却不鄙视它。多么奇怪啊。

rare.trans: 它将在这里安息，永远安息。

generic.en: Oh. It's a little wooden statue.

gift.en: The only gift I desire is a swift end...
gift.trans: 我唯一想要的礼物是尽快结束...

collapsedchest.en: Is the emptyness all around us now?
collapsedchest.trans: 空虚已经无处不在了吗？

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: I wonder what kind of prizes they have...

alterguardianhat.en: When I wear it, i-it's harder to see Abigail...
alterguardianhat.trans: 我戴上以后，就更难看到阿比盖尔了……

generic.en: A tribute to gluttony.

empty.en: It needs a sacrifice of flesh.

quagmire_mealingstone.en: I am ground down on the mealing stone of life.

marbleshrub.en: Against all odds, it has flourished in life...
marbleshrub.trans: 困难重重，它还是在生命中茂盛起来...

cannonball_rock_item.en: I must carry this weight... to the cannon, at least.
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 我必须扛起这个重担……至少要扛到大炮旁边。

balloonparty.en: What is the point of celebrating in a place such as this?
balloonparty.trans: 在这种地方搞庆祝有什么意义？

cave_banana_cooked.en: Warmed banana mush is so much better.

winter_ornament.en: Do you like this one, Abigail?
winter_ornament.trans: 这个你喜欢吗，阿比盖尔？

pepper_oversized.en: That is a very significant amount of pepper.

cookiecutter.en: Their faces are twisted with hunger.
cookiecutter.trans: 他们的脸因饥饿而扭曲。

wasphive.en: They hide in their fortress of hate.
wasphive.trans: 它们躲在仇恨的堡垒里。

batcave.trans: 它们只是潜伏在那里面...

butterflymuffin.en: Let's see you get out of this sugary trap!
butterflymuffin.trans: 看你如何逃出这个甜蜜陷阱！

saddle_war.en: Oh, how we bend creatures to our ill intent.
saddle_war.trans: 哦，怎样让各种生物屈服于我们邪恶的意图。

perogies.en: A lovely little pouch of nutrients.

dumbbell_gem.en: Who would choose to carry such a burden...
dumbbell_gem.trans: 谁会选择背负这样的负担呢？

spidergland.en: Even in death, this beast causes pain.
spidergland.trans: 即使死去，这只野兽仍能制造伤痛。

wagpunk_workstation.en: Still so much we don't understand.

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.

yotd_anchor_item.en: It's for a burdensome boat anchor.

tree_rock_sapling.en: It can only go wrong from here.
tree_rock_sapling.trans: 从现在起它只会变得更糟。

record_dawn.en: Does this music lift your spirits, Abigail?
record_dawn.trans: 听了音乐心情有没有好一点，阿比盖尔？

stump.en: This tree was put to rest.

generic.en: It is touched by darkness.

firestarter.en: Fire probably isn't the method I would choose...
firestarter.trans: 火可能不是我会选择的方式…..

ghost.en: At least a heart could return one sister to this world...
ghost.trans: 至少一颗心会让一个姐妹回到这个世界...

murderer.en: Have we not seen enough death, %s?
murderer.trans: 我们没有见过太多死亡，%s？

attacker.en: %s... she's no sister of mine.

reviver.en: I hope Abigail doesn't like you more than me...
reviver.trans: 我希望阿比盖尔喜欢你不会多过喜欢我...

generic.en: She looks sad...

slingshotammo_marble.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_marble.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

oceanwhirlbigportalexit.en: Is it even worth digging through?

shell_cluster.en: They're all clumped together... it seems a shame to separate them...
shell_cluster.trans: 它们紧密的粘在一起……真不忍心分开它们……

asparagus_oversized.en: Sigh. I suppose all these vegetables will keep my strength up...
asparagus_oversized.trans: 哎。也许这些蔬菜能让我保持强壮吧……

mandrake_planted.en: The mighty mandrake. It's best picked at night.
mandrake_planted.trans: 威力无比的曼德拉草。最好是在晚上采摘。

spear.en: They who wield it shall become the destroyer of worlds.
spear.trans: 使用它的人将会成为世界的毁灭者。

generic.en: I had a hamster once. It died.
generic.trans: 我养过一只仓鼠。它死了。

cookbook.en: What's the point of filling my stomach when my heart remains empty...
cookbook.trans: 我的心空空如也，填饱肚子又有什么意义呢？

potato.en: It has eyes, yet it never cries.

lots.trans: 尽管困难重重...它还是茁壮成长...

snowcovered.en: A frigid cold bites at its heart.

rotten.en: Nothing escapes the pull of decay.
rotten.trans: 没有什么逃得掉衰败的拉扯。

empty.en: Emptiness. The natural state of all things.
empty.trans: 虚无。所有事物的自然状态。

slingshotammo_freeze.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_freeze.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

mermguard_shadow.en: You shed everything you were. Does it feel... good?
mermguard_shadow.trans: 你舍弃了自己曾经的一切。感觉……好吗？

burning.en: Reduced to ashes, scattered on the wind.

reviving.en: Is this what you really want?

generic.en: Laid to rest.

slingshotammo_poop.en: I suppose it has its uses.

shark.en: Are you here to send me to a watery grave?
shark.trans: 你是来送我去水上墓园的吗？

tophat.en: A piece of finery to help forget the inescapable wild.
tophat.trans: 一件华美的服饰，帮助遗忘无法逃避的荒野。

wagstaff_npc.en: He flickers and fades... perhaps he's a spirit?
wagstaff_npc.trans: 他闪闪光之后就渐渐消失了……是因为他是个幽灵？

armor_bramble.en: So my outside matches my inside.

dumbbell_marble.en: We all carry a great weight. His seems... a bit more literal, though.
dumbbell_marble.trans: 我们都是负重前行。而他背负的……更多一些。

boat_ancient_item.en: It looks like it will be quite sturdy. Oh well.
boat_ancient_item.trans: 看起来相当坚固。哎，算了。

anchor.en: For when I feel I can go no further.
anchor.trans: 等我不想再动的时候就用它。

book_elemental.en: I would not want such power.

generic.en: For when I don't want to be alone...
generic.trans: 当我不想独自一人的时候...

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: It won't be looking down on us anymore.

eyeplant.en: They follow their master's every wish.

quagmire_park_angel.en: It's winged, but it's no angel.

fish_cooked.en: A proper grilling puts a stop to the flopping.
fish_cooked.trans: 烤上一会儿，它们就不会扑腾了。

coontail.trans: 它乱蓬蓬地缠在一起，已经腐烂了。

growing.en: It is not a danger... yet...

generic.en: The bees left their sweet mark upon the earth.
generic.trans: 蜜蜂把它们甜美的标记留在土地上。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: Can I... help set up the carnival?

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: I shall be able to see with eyes unclouded.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 这下我的双眼不会被蒙蔽，能够看清东西了。

ruins_bat.en: It possesses the power of the ancients.

bird_egg.trans: 这么多的希望都化为乌有了。

moonstorm_static_item.en: I can see a little spark inside.
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 我能看到里面有个小火花。

dead.en: It's the way of all things.

generic.en: Death on legs.

sleeping.en: It is arrested by deepest sleep.

generic.en: I despise how it skitters...

lore3.en: We aren't meant to leave this place.
lore3.trans: 我们注定无法离开此地。

anchor_item.en: It's for a burdensome boat anchor.

rock_moon.trans: 它跨越了遥不可及的距离...

yellowgem.en: It reminds me of my mother.

charlie_lecturn.en: Perhaps there is a small part for me to play.
charlie_lecturn.trans: 也许有个我能扮演的小角色。

atrium_overgrowth.en: Scrawlings of a tongue lost to time.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 语言的乱涂乱写败给了时间。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: It's for collecting salt from the pond.
quagmire_salt_rack_item.trans: 它的作用是提取池塘里的盐。

rabbitking_lucky.en: I should take a closer look.

berries_cooked.en: More balanced flavor, but they won't last long.
berries_cooked.trans: 味道更均衡，但过不了多久它们就会腐烂。

basalt.en: Trying to break it would be pointless.
basalt.trans: 尝试破坏它是毫无意义的。

spiderqueen.en: She is regal in her horribleness.

growing.trans: 继续生长吧。我会等着的。

ready.en: It is ready for the harvest.

withered.en: It's had the life sucked out of it.

generic.en: An edible plant.

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.en: It's for hanging the pot over the fire.
quagmire_pot_hanger_item.trans: 它的作用是把锅悬挂在火的上方。

inert.en: A crumbling edifice of sand... it's not even decorated.
inert.trans: 一堆破沙子……都没点装饰。

generic.en: One of us will be sent to a watery grave...
generic.trans: 我们中一个会被送进水墓……

raincoat.en: I liked jumping in puddles with Abigail.
raincoat.trans: 我过去喜欢和阿比盖尔在水坑中跳来跳去。

hungry.en: We all try to fill the void.

generic.en: Will you leave too?

greenmooneye.en: A green aura hangs over us...
greenmooneye.trans: 一个绿色的光环笼罩在我们上面。

held.en: So many have perished. But this one is safe.
held.trans: 许多已经消亡。但这个很安全。

generic.en: It has no concept of time, or loss.
generic.trans: 它丝毫没有时间的概念，或者失去的概念。

hiding.en: My heart aches with its beauty.
hiding.trans: 我的心随着它的美丽而疼痛。

awake.en: A creature of shadow that seeks the light... how sad...
awake.trans: 寻求光亮的暗影生物...真可悲啊...

halloweencandy_9.en: As perplexing as it is delicious.

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.en: It might actually taste good at this point.

robot_blueprint.en: Oh to be encased within a hard and unfeeling exterior...
robot_blueprint.trans: 哎，装在一个坚硬而冷漠的壳子里……

halloweencandy_7.en: Life is a swirling abyss of suffering and disappointment.
halloweencandy_7.trans: 生活就是充满痛苦和失望的打着旋涡的深渊。

slurtleslime.trans: 它闪烁着微光，看上去就很黏。

koalefant_winter.en: It stands against the cruel elements.

mask_dollhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_dollhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

gingerbreadwarg.en: Horrible evil in a festive coating.
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 身披节庆外衣的邪恶生物。

generic.en: Abigail... do you think...?
Not so dangerous now...

full.trans: 有些事情是无法防腐保存的。

halloweencandy_5.en: Nine lives are not enough to save you from my hungry maw...
halloweencandy_5.trans: 九条命不够从我饥饿的大嘴里救下你...

wx78module_music.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_music.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

hungry.en: He is suffering the pangs of hunger.

generic.en: A spark of life illuminating the darkness.

content.en: Enjoy your happiness while it lasts, little lavae.
content.trans: 人生苦短，尽情享受你短暂的快乐吧，小岩浆虫。

halloweencandy_4.en: Don't worry, Webber, it's just candy.
halloweencandy_4.trans: 不要担心，韦伯，它只是糖果。

ceviche.en: All I taste is my sadness...
ceviche.trans: 我尝到的只有我的悲伤...

salty_doghat.en: It is my turn to play the captain.

bushhat.trans: 实际上我已经是隐形的了...

cookiecutterhat.en: I'm protected, but at what cost to my dignity.
cookiecutterhat.trans: 我受到保护了，但是付出了巨大的人格代价。

halloweenpotion_bravery.en: Things seem less horrifying with this.
halloweenpotion_bravery.trans: 有了它，很多东西就显得不那么恐怖了。

bananapop.en: I used to eat these with Abigail...
bananapop.trans: 我过去常和阿比盖尔一起吃这些东西...

lightcrab.en: Their shells look like glass... I wonder if they shatter like glass too.
lightcrab.trans: 它们的外壳看起来像玻璃……我想知道它们是否也像玻璃一样易碎。

bootleg.en: It will just take me from one unpleasant place to another.
bootleg.trans: 我不过是被从一个不愉快的地方带到另一个不愉快的地方。

icepack.en: Nothing can insulate us from the horrors of this world.
icepack.trans: 任何东西都隔绝不了世间惨事。

upgraded_stacksize.en: It's still not big enough to hold all my regrets.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 它还是不够大，装不下我所有的遗憾。

generic.en: For which to contain my lucre.

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: Sigh. Isn't the regular swamp bad enough?
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 唉。普通沼泽还不够糟糕吗？

boat_ancient_container.en: I could put things in there. I guess.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 我可以把东西放进去。我猜吧。

sleep.en: But what if I liked the dark?
sleep.trans: 可是如果我喜欢黑暗呢？

burnt.en: It all crumbles to ash, in the end.
burnt.trans: 最终，一切都烧成了灰烬。

generic.en: But what if I liked the dark?
generic.trans: 可是如果我喜欢黑暗呢？

gestalt.en: I can feel their fear and loneliness.
gestalt.trans: 我能感受他们的恐惧和寂寞。

lunarplant_husk.trans: 它不会再伤害任何人了。

critter_lunarmothling.en: Your beauty will fade too, you know.
critter_lunarmothling.trans: 你知道，你的美也会逐渐消逝的。

quagmire_pot_small.en: We will cook, or we will die.
quagmire_pot_small.trans: 我们要么烹饪，要么饿死。

bonestew.en: You'd be surprised how much life can be gleaned from death and bones.
bonestew.trans: 你会惊讶于从死亡和骨头中可以收集多少生命。

yotb_stage_item.en: I suppose putting that together will distract me from my misery for a while.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 我想组装它也许能让我暂时忘记一些痛苦。

phonograph.en: Shall we have a danse macabre?
phonograph.trans: 我们要跳一场死亡之舞吗？

halloween_ornament_1.en: It reminds me of Abigail. I'll hang it somewhere.
halloween_ornament_1.trans: 它让我想起阿比盖尔。我要把它挂在某个地方。

halloween_ornament_2.en: It longs to be hung somewhere.
halloween_ornament_2.trans: 它渴望被挂在某个地方。

generic.en: If only my life could find some direction.
generic.trans: 要是我也能找到生活的方向就好了。

lunarthrall_plant.en: Others must suffer for it to survive.
lunarthrall_plant.trans: 其他人必须遭受苦难，它才能生存。

halloween_ornament_6.en: Crows in trees mean souls trapped between worlds.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 树上的乌鸦代表困在不同世界之间的灵魂。

generic.en: It hungers for a sacrifice.

webber_spider_minion.trans: 韦伯似乎以它们为骄傲。

cutreeds.en: The blade has sentenced you to death.

pinecone_sapling.trans: 一棵树很快就会长出来。

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: I'd rather not carry it any longer.

generic.en: After all, one never knows when disaster will strike...
generic.trans: 毕竟没人知道什么时候会发生灾难……

quagmire_swampig_house.en: I see no joy in this house.
quagmire_swampig_house.trans: 我在这个房子里看不到半点喜悦。

turtillus.en: You cannot shield yourself from this world.
turtillus.trans: 你无法将自己和这个世界隔离。

book_moon.en: Let the moon turn its cold gaze on us once again.
book_moon.trans: 让月亮再次把它冰冷的目光投向我们吧。

dug.en: The earth has vomited up its secrets.

generic.en: Some day, I will join you.
generic.trans: 总有一天，我会加入你们的。

lunarplanthat.en: It lets me hide my face from the world.
lunarplanthat.trans: 有了它，我就能把脸藏起来不给全世界看。

stuffedeggplant.en: A nightshade. Probably not filled with poison.
stuffedeggplant.trans: 一只茄子，里面大概没有塞满毒药。

turfcraftingstation.en: We can change the very earth beneath our feet, but not the past.
turfcraftingstation.trans: 我们可以改变脚下的大地，但不能改变过去。

active.en: I'm sure the next realm will be even more horrible!
active.trans: 我确信下一个地方会更可怕！

locked.trans: 它仍然是上锁关闭的状态。

partial.en: Is it half built, or half destroyed?
partial.trans: 它是建了一半，还是毁了一半？

generic.en: No good can come of this.

houndbone.en: The remains of an evil beast.

spice_sugar.trans: 没有阿比盖尔那么甜美。

hivehat.en: What dark machinations were once concocted beneath?
hivehat.trans: 下面曾经策划了什么黑暗的阴谋诡计？

generic.en: Well aren't you a happy little fuzzball. Die.
generic.trans: 难道你不是一个快乐的小毛毛球？去死吧。

sleeping.en: Is it dead? Oh, just sleeping.

thurible.en: An ember that burns with the stuff of nightmares.
thurible.trans: 与梦魇素材一同燃烧的灰烬。

otter.en: Is it true they hold paws while sleeping at sea to not get separated?
otter.trans: 为了不被分开，它们在海上睡觉时真的会爪牵爪吗？

armorwood.en: To hold off the inevitable a bit longer.
armorwood.trans: 拖延一下不可避免的死亡。

shadow_forge.en: What terrible things will I create?
shadow_forge.trans: 我将创造什么可怕的东西？

record_balatro.en: It brightens my mood, if only for a while.
record_balatro.trans: 它让我的心情好了点，虽然只有一会儿。

watermelon.en: It's mostly water. What's the big deal?
watermelon.trans: 它里面主要是水。有什么大不了的？

chesspiece_bearger.en: Ashes to ashes, bust to bust. Oh.

stalker.trans: 甚至连死亡也不是永恒的。

portabletent_item.en: Abigail and I set up a tent in our backyard once. It was... fun.
portabletent_item.trans: 阿比盖尔和我曾经在后院搭过一个帐篷。当时也……很有趣。

scraphat.en: My head will be safe. My dignity, however...
scraphat.trans: 我的头安全了。然而，我的尊严……

unwritten.en: Its blank face shall soon offer a secret.
unwritten.trans: 它一脸茫然，很快便会透露秘密。

generic.en: A mark is made, however transient.
generic.trans: 我做了个标记，不过是暂时的。

firestarter.en: Douse your fires, %s.
firestarter.trans: 把火灭了，%s。

ghost.en: That was a bad experiment, %s...
ghost.trans: 那是个糟糕的实验，%s…

murderer.en: You've gone mad, scientist.
murderer.trans: 你已经疯了，科学家。

attacker.en: %s is unstable.

reviver.en: Abigail likes you, %s.

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

remains_eye_bone.en: The eyebone was incinerated in the teleportation!
remains_eye_bone.trans: 传送的时候，眼骨被烧成灰了！

remains_glommerflower.en: The flower was incinerated in the teleportation!
remains_glommerflower.trans: 传送的时候，花被烧成灰了！

remains_thingie.en: This was once some thing before it got burned...
remains_thingie.trans: 在被烧毁前，它曾经是某样东西…

generic.en: All that's left after another beautiful fire.
generic.trans: 另一场熊熊大火过后只剩下这些。

quagmire_wheat_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
quagmire_wheat_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

burnt.en: Another entry in a long line of unfortunate occurrences.
burnt.trans: 反正一直在倒霉，多这一件也无所谓。

generic.en: Thinking on the waves makes me nauseous.
generic.trans: 在海上思考让我有点晕船。

leafymeatsouffle.en: Oh. I thought it was dessert...

firepen.en: Father had one very similar. I doubt it ever started a fire, though.
firepen.trans: 像极了父亲的旧笔。我猜多半生不出火来。

moon_altar_seed.en: It wants some sort of energy.

generic.en: Not everything can be brought back.
generic.trans: 并不是所有东西都能带回来。

burnt.en: It all crumbles to ash, in the end.
burnt.trans: 最终，一切都烧成了灰烬。

stuffing.en: Perhaps filling my belly will make me feel less empty inside.
stuffing.trans: 也许填饱了肚子就不会那么空虚了。

quagmire_rubble_pubdoor.trans: 一扇不通往任何地方的门。

durian_seeds.en: It's a plant that's waiting to be.

cave_banana_burnt.en: The death and suffering never ends.

pomegranate_cooked.trans: 变热了，但还是那么麻烦。

seastack.en: I could steer toward it and resign myself to a watery fate.
seastack.trans: 要不我航向它，在水上做个了断。

pomegranate_seeds.en: It's a plant that's waiting to be.

type2.en: A chilling thought... what if nothing's beneath the mask?
type2.trans: 令人恐惧的想法...如果面具下面什么也没有怎么办呢？

type1.en: Each of us wear many masks...
type1.trans: 我们每个人都戴着许多面具...

generic.en: Cold, hard stone...

potatosouffle.en: A dish as delicate as life itself.
potatosouffle.trans: 如果生命般脆弱的一道菜。

eyeofterror_mini.en: I can feel the sting of their sharp gaze...
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 我可以感受到来自锐利目光的刺痛……

carnival_host.en: How do you do, Mr. Raven?

underground.en: Stay down there, away from this horrible place.
underground.trans: 待在下面，远离这个恐怖的地方。

held.en: How do you like being torn away from your family?
held.trans: 被迫和你的家人分离是什么滋味呢？

aboveground.en: You should go back to where it's dark.
aboveground.trans: 你应该回到黑暗的地方。

cutstone.en: The better to mark graves with.

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: You'll feel like yourself again soon, Abby.
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 你很快就在能做回自己了，阿比。

saltbox.trans: 它只会推迟不可避免的事情。

critter_glomling.en: Its snuggles almost make me forget.
critter_glomling.trans: 它的依偎几乎让我忘记了。

icecream.en: Ice cream could never replace Abigail.
icecream.trans: 冰淇淋绝不能代替阿比盖尔。

has_item.trans: 阿比盖尔最喜欢的藏身之处。

generic.en: Abigail's favorite hiding spot.
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔最喜欢的藏身之处。

fishtacos.en: Hopefully no bones still linger within.
fishtacos.trans: 希望体内没有骨头存在。

merm_tool_upgraded.en: It's only slightly better than useless.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 只比没用的垃圾稍微强一点。

treasurechest_trap.en: Every once in awhile, things go my way.
treasurechest_trap.trans: 偶尔，事情的发展会符合我的心意。

generic.en: Take thy beak from out my heart!

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

cane.en: To explore to the ends of this wretched world.
cane.trans: 探索到这个悲惨世界的尽头。

burning.trans: 它的痛苦马上就会结束。

picked.en: It's given all it had to give.

diseased.en: It's not long for this world...

withered.en: It has crumpled under the heat.

generic.en: I could strip it clean, if I so chose...
generic.trans: 如果我想的话，我能把它剥干净...

barren.en: There's no life to be had here...

sleepbomb.en: Sickly spores bring such sweet slumber.
sleepbomb.trans: 病态的孢子带来这样甜蜜的睡眠。

wormlight_lesser.en: Better the worm's light than its tongue.
wormlight_lesser.trans: 虫子的光好过它的舌头。

carnival_ball.en: Won't you play with me, Abigail?
carnival_ball.trans: 你不和我玩吗，阿比盖尔？

generic.en: A place to drown my sorrows.
generic.trans: 淹没我的伤心事的地方。

empty.en: If only my tears could dry up like this lake.
empty.trans: 假如我的泪水能像湖水一样干涸掉就好了。

pepper_seeds.en: Will I live to see this grow?
pepper_seeds.trans: 我能或者看到它长大吗？

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.

voidclothhat.en: I can disappear into the darkness within.
voidclothhat.trans: 我可以消失在它的黑暗之中。

bird_mutant.en: Mr. Crow, you don't look well.
bird_mutant.trans: 乌鸦先生，你看起来身体不太好。

opalstaff.en: As cold and lifeless as... well...

carnivalfood_corntea.en: Oh. There really is corn in it...

ghostflowerhat.en: That I may walk a mile under your veil, Abby.
ghostflowerhat.trans: 让我在你的面纱下走一里路吧，阿比。

orangegem.en: Such things used to bring me happiness.
orangegem.trans: 这些东西过去曾给我带来快乐。

orangemooneye.en: It sees all, and yet nothing.
orangemooneye.trans: 它什么都看见了，但是什么都看不见。

lobsterdinner.en: Its death will give me life.
lobsterdinner.trans: 它的死亡将给我带来生机。

pumpkin_oversized.en: If only it could become a carriage and carry me far away from here.
pumpkin_oversized.trans: 如果它能变成一辆马车，载着我远走高飞就好了。

generic.en: Oh, if I could ride away into the night.
generic.trans: 哦，如果我可以骑走，进入夜晚之中。

lunarrift_portal.en: A gaping wound in the sky.

slingshotmodkit.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

high.trans: 这团火焰热烈地燃烧着！

low.en: It's losing the will to go on.
low.trans: 它失去了继续下去的意志。

generic.en: A flame to keep the horrors at bay.
generic.trans: 点燃火焰阻止恐怖的逼近。

out.en: This can be rekindled, unlike my heart.
out.trans: 这可以复燃，不像我的心。

high.en: A vision of a frozen-over Hell!

generic.en: I might survive this night!

out.en: That is not a good sign.

burnt.trans: 不可避免的死亡来临了。

generic.en: It will only delay the inevitable.
generic.trans: 它只会推迟不可避免的事情。

glasscutter.en: It visits death upon all who face it.

wet.en: It's far too watery, the poor plants might drown.
wet.trans: 水太多，可怜的植物可能会被淹死。

balanced.en: I suppose this will do well enough.

generic.en: Food for worms.

cattoy_mouse.en: The wheel is come full circle.

axe.en: An instrument for industry and murder.
axe.trans: 用于工业和谋杀的工具。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: I suppose I should make myself useful.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 我想我应该让自己变得有用。

lit.en: Somehow, its presence puts my mind at ease.
lit.trans: 不知怎的，它的存在让我安心了。

generic.en: The fire has grown cold.

lit.en: A gentle glow from a gentle creature.
lit.trans: 来自温柔生物的温柔光芒。

generic.en: The fire has grown cold.

quagmire_goatmum.trans: 您好，女士。要不要做个交易？

lit.en: Look how it glitters in the firelight, Abigail!
lit.trans: 看它在火光下闪闪发光，阿比盖尔！

generic.en: The fire has grown cold.

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 就连我们的盔甲也带有尖牙。

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

charging.en: It takes things away. I cannot follow.
charging.trans: 它会带走东西。我追不上。

charged.en: It takes things away. I cannot follow.
charged.trans: 它会带走东西。我追不上。

generic.en: It takes things away. I cannot follow.
generic.trans: 它会带走东西。我追不上。

grotto_pool_small.en: A rare bit of beauty in this dark, dreary place.
grotto_pool_small.trans: 在这个黑暗沉闷的地方，难得有一点美的东西。

generic.en: I wonder what I'll get?
generic.trans: 不知道我会得到什么呢？

wall_stone_2.en: What will protect me from what's inside?
wall_stone_2.trans: 在里面又有什么来保护我呢？

warm.en: As lukewarm and lifeless as every other rock.
warm.trans: 像其他石头一样微温而没有生机。

cold.en: Just a moderately cold lump of rock.
cold.trans: 只是一块有些冰凉的石头。

hot.en: Those that burn brightest, burn fastest.
hot.trans: 烧得最亮的也会最快烧尽。

generic.en: There it sits, just taking up space.
generic.trans: 它待在那里，占据着空间。

royal_jelly.en: We stole it out of the mouths of baby bees.
royal_jelly.trans: 我们从蜜蜂宝宝的嘴里偷出了它。

mapscroll.trans: 现在像阿比盖尔一样空白。

otterden_dead.en: I had a feeling it would end at sea.
otterden_dead.trans: 我有一种预感，它会在海上结束。

mutator_spitter.en: It's the only thing smiling around here.
mutator_spitter.trans: 这是这里唯一在笑的东西。

on.en: I don't know why you bother. We're all going to burn.
on.trans: 我不知道你为什么要理会。我们最终都会被烧掉的。

barnaclepita.en: My pita is filled with disappointment.
barnaclepita.trans: 我的皮塔饼里满是失落。

boatpatch.en: To mend what the cruel seas have crushed.
boatpatch.trans: 修理残忍的海洋摧毁的东西。

wx78module_maxsanity.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

quagmire_portal.en: There's no night here. It is a nice change.
quagmire_portal.trans: 这里没有夜晚。这个变化真不错。

has_food.en: I wish Abigail could enjoy some of that.
has_food.trans: 要是阿比盖尔能吃点就好了。

wrong_type.en: Like me, it doesn't belong here.
wrong_type.trans: 像我一样，它不属于这里。

generic.en: A table for gatherings.

burnt.en: It seems the time for celebration is over.

bathbomb.en: To mask the smell of sorrow and death.
bathbomb.trans: 来遮蔽死亡和忧伤的味道。

voidcloth_scythe.en: One swift motion, and the work is done.
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 只要快速一挥，工作就了结了。

quagmire_grill_item.en: I don't want to carry this around.

spring.en: It's closed up. No one is falling down there, now.
spring.trans: 它已经封死了。现在没人会掉到洞下面去了。

generic.en: I'm too big to fall down there.
generic.trans: 我个子太大了，没办法掉到洞下面去。

closed.en: If only it had swallowed me whole.
closed.trans: 要是把我整个人吞掉就好了。

generic.en: It's a starfish.

quagmire_merm_cart2.en: Nothing in there could bring me happiness.
quagmire_merm_cart2.trans: 那里没有一样东西会给我带来快乐。

quagmire_merm_cart1.en: I, too, cart around my baggage.
quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 我也会带着我的行李前行。

ghost.en: You won't leave us if I get you a heart, right?
ghost.trans: 如果我给你一颗心，你就不会离开我们，对吗？

firestarter.en: There are other ways to express yourself, %s.
firestarter.trans: %s，你有其他的方式表达自己。

murderer.en: %s, this is the end... for you!
murderer.trans: %s，你死期到了！

attacker.en: There's something you're not telling us...
attacker.trans: 你有些事情没告诉我们...

reviver.en: Abigail says she understands you, %s.

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

ready.trans: 它们的辛勤工作收获颇丰！

fullhoney.trans: 它们的辛勤工作收获颇丰!

generic.en: There are only memories of sweetness here.
generic.trans: 这里只剩下甜蜜的回忆。

cabbagerolls.en: I wouldn't mind rolling up in a blanket and forgetting my troubles...
cabbagerolls.trans: 我也干脆裹在毛毡里忘掉所有烦恼算了……

generic.en: If my fish was as heavy as my heart, I'd surely win.
generic.trans: 如果我的鱼像我的心一样沉，那我赢定了。

quagmire_altar_bollard.trans: 一根柱子而已，没什么大惊小怪的。

fence_electric_item.en: It's no use to anyone like that.
fence_electric_item.trans: 它现在那样对任何人都没用处了。

koalefant_carcass.trans: 不知为何，这让我感到欣慰。

yotr_food3.en: I'm sorry Abigail, I'd share if I could.
yotr_food3.trans: 抱歉，阿比盖尔，如果能分享我一定分享。

yotr_food2.en: Now my lips have turned blue...
yotr_food2.trans: 这下我的嘴唇都变蓝了……

palmcone_sapling.en: It may yet have the chance to grow up.

yotr_food1.en: I think... I would like a bit of cake.

lavaarena_armorlightspeed.en: They'll have to catch me to hurt me.
lavaarena_armorlightspeed.trans: 他们要想伤害我就得先抓到我。

slingshotammo_slow.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_slow.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

broken_forgeditem.en: A broken mockery of what it once was.
broken_forgeditem.trans: 对它曾经模样的一种破碎嘲弄。

monkey.en: Living without the burden of intelligence must be nice.
monkey.trans: 不用动脑地活着肯定很爽。

book_rain.en: Oh... I suppose I was hoping it might involve more candles and chanting.
book_rain.trans: 哎……我本以为主要内容是蜡烛和诵经。

waiting.en: Not so much sleeping as... waiting.
waiting.trans: 与其说是睡眠...不如说是等待。

generic.en: It's looking into my soul.
generic.trans: 它看向了我灵魂的深处。

fruitflyfruit.en: Now you may trade your lord for a queen.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 现在你们的王变成本后了。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: This one is just right. Except for the smell.
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 这个还可以，就是有点味道。

deer_antler.en: We have grabbed life by its horn... though I wish we hadn't.
deer_antler.trans: 我们已经抓住了生活的角...尽管我希望我们没抓住。

merm_prince.en: Are you ready to shoulder the burdens of leadership?
merm_prince.trans: 你准备好担负领袖的重担了吗？

lucy.en: Hello... "Lucy"... I'd like you to meet my sister.
lucy.trans: 哈喽…..“露西”….我想让你见见我孪生姐妹。

whip.en: It only provides the illusion of control.
whip.trans: 它只能提供控制的错觉。

desiccant.en: It can't dry away all my tears.

gems.trans: 传送焦点是如此死气沉沉。

ghostflower.en: I promise to use it well.

ghost.en: Everyone that leaves takes a piece of my heart...
ghost.trans: 离开的每个人都带走了我心上的一块肉…

firestarter.en: Ms. %s, wreathed in flames.
firestarter.trans: %s小姐被火焰包裹着。

murderer.en: "Murder", she wrote.
murderer.trans: “谋杀”，她写道。

attacker.en: Ms. %s... do you turn your wits against us?

reviver.en: Abigail likes you, Ms. %s.

generic.en: How do you do, Ms. %s?

quagmire_fern.en: Wilson calls them "greens"... but they're purple...
quagmire_fern.trans: 威尔逊称它们为“绿蔬”，但它们是紫色的呀。

melted.en: A large pool of cool, melted ice.
melted.trans: 一大滩冰冷的，融化的冰。

generic.en: A large piece of cold, unfeeling ice.
generic.trans: 一大块冰冷的，无情的冰。

crabking_claw.en: It wants to drag me down to the icy depths of the sea.
crabking_claw.trans: 它想把我拖到冰冷的深海里去。

veggieomlet.en: A healthy diet for a long life. How dreadful.
veggieomlet.trans: 有益长寿的健康饮食。多么可怕。

waterballoon.en: At any moment it could pop and spill its guts.

wortox_reviver.en: Of course it won't work for Abigail.
wortox_reviver.trans: 显然对阿比盖尔不起作用。

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: How long before that fire in your eyes goes out?
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 你眼睛里的火什么时候会熄灭？

generic.en: It's soothing to watch the seconds tick away.
generic.trans: 看着时间一分一秒地过去，心里很舒坦。

mast_malbatross_item.en: That's alright, I can manage it.

scanning.en: It's too busy to bother with me.

hunting.en: It's too busy to bother with me.

generic.en: Oh. Hello.
I'm too busy descending into madness to descend that cave.
generic.trans: 我太忙了，没时间发疯进入那个洞。

open.en: A great evil lurks beneath the surface.
open.trans: 地表之下潜伏着巨大的邪恶。

full.en: There's no room at the cave party for me...
full.trans: 洞穴晚会没有容我的余地…

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: Abigail was always the strong one.
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 阿比盖尔一直比我有力气。

mutator_water.en: Webber sees the world in a most curious way.
mutator_water.trans: 韦伯以一种最奇特的方式看待世界。

rocky.en: What terrible sights they have seen.
rocky.trans: 他们看到了多么可怕的景象。

archive_moon_statue.en: This place feels rather like a tomb.
archive_moon_statue.trans: 这个地方给人的感觉颇像一座坟墓。

guano.trans: 这是生命不可避免的副产品。

kitcoon_deciduous.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

pigking.en: Live it up while you can, Your Majesty.
pigking.trans: 陛下，尽您所能逍遥快活吧。

molehill.en: Down, down, down to the depths.
molehill.trans: 往下、往下、往下，一直挖到土地深处。

panflute.en: Music is the window to my empty soul.
panflute.trans: 音乐是通向我空虚灵魂的窗户。

lavaarena_battlestandard.en: That Battle Standard needs to be destroyed...
lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 需要摧毁那面战斗旗帜...

dug_marsh_bush.en: I like it dead, but it should probably be returned to the earth.
dug_marsh_bush.trans: 我想它死，但它可能会重返地球。

lots_of_flowers.en: I won't let you fade away, Abigail. Never.
lots_of_flowers.trans: 我不会让你消逝的，阿比盖尔。永远不会。

lots_of_flowers_blossom.en: I can almost hear your voice, Abby.
lots_of_flowers_blossom.trans: 我几乎能听到你的声音，阿比。

lots_of_flowers_evil.en: These don't make me feel good, but they help Abigail.
lots_of_flowers_evil.trans: 这些让我感觉不太好，但它们能帮阿比盖尔。

some_flowers.trans: 阿比盖尔一直都很爱鲜花……

generic.en: It's a memorial to my sister... but it's so bare...
generic.trans: 它是对我姐妹的一种纪念……可是它光秃秃的……

quagmire_swampig.en: They're less standoffish than their brethren.
quagmire_swampig.trans: 比起它们的弟兄，它们没那么冷漠。

dock_kit.en: I will build it, but no one will come.
dock_kit.trans: 即使我建好也不会有人来。

durian_cooked.trans: 刺少了，但气味甚至更重了！

mast_malbatross.en: Fly me away from this place.

fig.en: Abigail always told me they were filled with wasps.
fig.trans: 阿比盖尔以前告诉过我，这里面全是黄蜂。

quagmire_saltrock.en: It needs to be ground down before we can use it.

portableblender_item.en: Inflicts chaos and turmoil on food.
portableblender_item.trans: 给食物带来混乱和纷扰。

amulet.en: I wonder who used to own this.
amulet.trans: 我想知道它以前的主人是谁。

generic.en: It prefers to be alone.

sleeping.en: It is arrested by deepest sleep.

burning.trans: 它的痛苦马上就会结束。

diseased.en: It's not long for this world...
diseased.trans: 它不在这个世界呆不久了...

generic.en: A snack, perchance?

magician_chest.en: You can't use a magic box for hide-and-seek, that's cheating.
magician_chest.trans: 不能用变魔术的箱子来玩捉迷藏，那是作弊。

buzzard.en: I hear they feed on the dead.
buzzard.trans: 我听说它们以死去的生物为食。

shadowthrall_mouth.en: What are you? The Grin Reaper?
shadowthrall_mouth.trans: 你是做什么的？狞笑的死神？

pepperpopper.en: They're so good I almost forgot my crushing grief.
pepperpopper.trans: 好吃到几乎让我忘却了沉重的悲痛。

boatrace_checkpoint.en: Where do we go from here?

fence_gate_item.en: We could use it to build a gate.
fence_gate_item.trans: 我们可以用它来建造一个大门。

quagmire_wheat.en: We can grind it down into flour.
quagmire_wheat.trans: 我们可以把它磨成面粉。

mushroomhat.en: If I'm lucky, it'll be poisonous.
mushroomhat.trans: 如果我足够幸运，它会是有毒的。

salsa.en: I don't feel much like dancing.

minifan.en: When I am still, it is as lifeless as Abigail.
minifan.trans: 我静止不动的时候，它就像阿比盖尔一样死气沉沉的。

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: I used to like reading about plants... I suppose this is similar in a way.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 我以前很喜欢读植物的书……我想这跟那差不多。

tapped_empty.en: Like a dagger through the heart. A tree heart.
tapped_empty.trans: 犹如匕首穿过心脏，树木的心脏。

stump.trans: 桩桩件件，总有终结的时候。

generic.en: It has a sickly beauty.

playing.en: They were created only to suffer.
playing.trans: 他们被创造出来只是为了受苦。

generic.en: It's a little door.

thulecitebugnet.en: The net comes for us all.
thulecitebugnet.trans: 我们所有人都挣脱不了那张网。

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: A useful guide, or a marker for a watery grave...
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 是指引，还是水葬的航标？

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: It makes the endless toil a bit easier.
pickaxe_lunarplant.trans: 它使无休止的劳作变得容易一些。

wall_moonrock_item.en: This gift from above should not go to waste.
wall_moonrock_item.trans: 这个来自上天的礼物不应被浪费。

generic.en: Enjoy your youth. Soon you will learn the terrors of the real world.
generic.trans: 享受你的童年吧。很快你就会知道现实世界的残酷。

book_light_upgraded.en: The brighter the light, the deeper the shadows...
book_light_upgraded.trans: 光线越耀眼，阴影越黑暗……

spider_whistle.en: I don't think I want to play with that.

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: I'll never catch a fish as heavy as my heart.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 再重的鱼也不如我的内心沉重。

generic.en: The hounds are baying.

empty.en: We must light a fire to honor the hound.
empty.trans: 我们必须点个火，以敬猎犬。

crimson.en: The darkness of this world has corrupted it.
crimson.trans: 这个世界的黑暗已经腐蚀了它。

cooldown.trans: 所有的美都会随着时间的推移而消逝。

spawn_disabled.en: Let it be sealed away forever.

generic.en: So much beauty contained inside, will it ever escape?
generic.trans: 里面锁了这么多美好的东西，会跑出来吗？

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: It brings more pain into the world.
lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.trans: 它给世界带来了更多痛苦。

differentshard.en: What will I find if I take a tumble down the rabbit hole?
differentshard.trans: 我跳进这个兔洞会发现什么呢？

generic.en: What will I find if I take a tumble down the rabbit hole?
generic.trans: 我跳进这个兔洞会发现什么呢？

icehound.en: He has a cold, dead heart.
icehound.trans: 他有一颗冰冷、死寂的心。

locked.en: I need a key to enter.

generic.en: Now I may enter the park.
generic.trans: 现在我可以进入公园了。

trunkvest_summer.en: Skin to wear over your skin.
trunkvest_summer.trans: 穿在你皮肤上的一层皮肤。

dead.en: We will meet again some day.

generic.en: A creature of the night!
A mere minion to something greater.
generic.trans: 一个仅仅是更伟大的东西的随从。

quagmire_beefalo.en: Don't worry. You'll be dead soon.
quagmire_beefalo.trans: 别担心，你会死得很快的。

generic.en: I'd steer clear of that stinger.

multiplayer_portal.en: Its beauty is tinged with a heartbreaking sadness.
multiplayer_portal.trans: 它的美丽略带令人心碎的悲伤。

record_worktobedone.en: I wonder if father still listens to his record collection.
record_worktobedone.trans: 不知道父亲是否还会听他收藏的旧唱片。

turf_cotl_brick.trans: 冰冷的石头让我从脚底开始发寒。

potatosack.en: Large enough to hold a corpse... or a few dozen potatoes.
potatosack.trans: 尸袋的大小……能装几十颗土豆。

generic.en: This tree is spooky. I bet it likes Halloween.
generic.trans: 这棵树很阴森。我打赌它喜欢万圣节。

wagstaff_item_1.en: A single glove left behind... Sigh.

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: Everything that grows just dies eventually.
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 所有生长的东西最终都会死亡。

mermwatchtower_regular.en: They seem to not wish us harm, for now.
mermwatchtower_regular.trans: 他们暂时不会伤害我们了。

generic.en: This one is frail and scorned. Like a friend.
generic.trans: 这一棵虚弱而卑微，像一个朋友。

acidcovered.en: I know the scent of death and decay.
acidcovered.trans: 我了解死亡和腐烂的味道。

lumpy_sapling.trans: 这条生命来自不知名的地方。

bedroll_straw.en: Sleep is but a temporary death.

generic.en: Abigail used to play with one of these.

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

figatoni.en: The fig cowers in its pasta shell.
figatoni.trans: 无花果在它的意面壳里瑟瑟发抖。

book_light.en: It won't save us from the darkness forever.
book_light.trans: 不可能永远指望它把我们从黑暗中拯救出来。

lost_toy_42.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_42.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

lost_toy_43.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_43.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

wobster_sheller_dead.en: It's met its maker. I've met my lunch.
wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 它遇见了它的创造者。我遇见了我的午餐。

armor_voidcloth.en: This ragged cloak will either protect me, or be my shroud.
armor_voidcloth.trans: 这破布斗篷就算保护不了我，也能当我的裹尸布。

winter_ornamentboss.en: This is one of my favorites.

fishmeat_small.en: There are other fish in the sea. Bigger ones, hopefully.
fishmeat_small.trans: 海里还有其他鱼。更大的鱼，希望如此。

waterpump.en: The fish is paying for its transgressions.
waterpump.trans: 这条鱼在为自己的过失付出代价。

tacklesketch.en: New methods for ripping fish from their peaceful lives.
tacklesketch.trans: 新技术，能把鱼类从它们平静的生活中拉出来。

support_pillar.en: The cracks have started to show...

taffy.en: Who knew such sweet things could exist here?
taffy.trans: 谁知道这些美味的东西怎么会生长在这里？

justeggs.en: Plain is fine. Why hope for anything more?
justeggs.trans: 平淡就好。为什么希望有更多的东西？

generic.en: It lives in a constant state of fear.
generic.trans: 它一直生活在恐惧之中。

flower_evil.en: At least they're better than the other flowers.

mask_foolhat.en: To become someone else, even for a moment...
mask_foolhat.trans: 变成另一个人，哪怕只有一瞬间……

cooking_short.en: It will all be over soon.

cooking_long.en: I may starve to death before it's done.
cooking_long.trans: 等它做好了，我都饿死了。

done.en: Another menial task has been completed.
done.trans: 又完成了一项卑微的任务。

generic.en: For when the hunger gnaws at my tiny stomach...
generic.trans: 当饥饿侵扰我的小肚肚时，它可以抵挡一下...

lost_toy_10.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_10.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

generic.en: I dared not hope it would take me home.
generic.trans: 我不敢奢望它能送我回家。

lost_toy_11.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_11.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

portabletent.en: It makes no difference where I rest my head, my nights are filled with bad dreams.
portabletent.trans: 我在哪里休息都没有区别，我的夜晚充满了恶梦。

lost_toy_14.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_14.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: My mind is not what needs protecting.
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 需要保护的并不是我的心智。

generic.en: Empty.

burning.en: Well, old maps always do look burnt at the edges...
burning.trans: 好吧，旧的地图边缘看起来总是像烧过一样...

generic.en: Maps are best with monsters drawn on the borders.
generic.trans: 边界上或者怪物的地图是最好的。

durian_oversized.en: Why did this one have to grow so large?
durian_oversized.trans: 这个为什么要长这么大？

spoiled.en: It has the stench of death... and yet it brings life.
spoiled.trans: 它有死亡的臭味……但却会带来生命。

generic.en: We nourish the plants' soil with the decomposed husks of their ocean cousins.
generic.trans: 我们用它们海生表亲的腐烂外壳来滋养土壤。

mutateddeerclops.en: Forced to continue its cursed existence... I pity it.
mutateddeerclops.trans: 被迫延续被诅咒的生命……我同情它。

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: The cracks have started to show...

has_loot.en: If I take what's there, the creature may starve.
has_loot.trans: 如果我拿走了里头的东西，那生物可能就会饿死。

generic.en: It has nothing.

wall_ruins.en: These didn't protect the ancients, now did they!
wall_ruins.trans: 这些并没能保护古人，不是吗！

inground.en: Something has filled the void. In the ground, I mean.
inground.trans: 某些东西填补了空白。我是说在地里。

generic.en: Look how whimsical it is... We must kill it.
generic.trans: 看它多古怪...我们必须杀了它。

empty.en: Just like the one in my heart.

oar.en: I'd prefer to be stranded at sea.

spidereggsack.en: A tiny package full of death and destruction.
spidereggsack.trans: 满是死亡和毁灭的小包裹。

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: Poor little machine. Is nobody paying attention to you?
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 可怜的小机器。没有人注意到你吗？

garlic_seeds.en: The life they contain is a mystery.
garlic_seeds.trans: 它们孕育的生命，是一个谜。

canary_poisoned.en: Pestilence and death will soon claim you.
canary_poisoned.trans: 瘟疫和死亡将会很快夺走你。

block.en: Abigail... You be Death, I'll be the Sculptor...
block.trans: 阿比盖尔... 你当死神，我当雕塑师...

burnt.en: ...I can't be disappointed... If I expect nothing...
burnt.trans: ...如果我没什么期望...就不会失望...

gargoyle_werepig.en: I can make that face too...

has_item.en: I don't know if it's worth it.

generic.en: Looks sticky.

minotaur.en: He must be lonely, trapped in such a small cage.
minotaur.trans: 被困在这样一个小小的牢笼中，他肯定很孤独。

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: I'll be able to attack so often...

lost_toy_18.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_18.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

walrus.en: An old man of the sea.

lost_toy_19.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_19.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

generic.en: Do little gnomes live in these?
generic.trans: 有小地精生活在这里吗？

acidcovered.en: I know the scent of death and decay.
acidcovered.trans: 我了解死亡和腐烂的味道。

support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.trans: 在那层裹尸布下面隐藏着什么？

elixir_container.en: If only I could have helped you then.
elixir_container.trans: 如果当时我能帮到你就好了。

mandrakesoup.en: Boiled the life out of him.

generic.en: The ring is silent and still, for now.
generic.trans: 这个擂台现在还是一片死寂。

lutefisk.en: Maybe I'll try just a bite.

quagmire_plate_silver.en: If only life had been handed to me on a silver plate.
quagmire_plate_silver.trans: 如果我是含着银盘子出生的，那多好。

monkeyisland_portal_debris.en: The scattered remains of some ill-fated machine.
monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 某个不幸机器散落的残骸。

wx78module_taser.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_taser.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

jellybean.en: Beans that shall never know life.

prime_mate.en: What it must be like to live unburdened by intelligence?
prime_mate.trans: 没有智力负担的生活一定很惬意吧？

playbill_the_vault.en: It was written with a sorrowful pen.
playbill_the_vault.trans: 它是用一支悲伤的笔写成的。

miasma.en: One could drown in that black fog.
miasma.trans: 进那黑雾中可能会窒息。

hot.en: I prefer the cold's quiet embrace.
hot.trans: 我更喜欢寒冷的静谧拥抱。

generic.en: There's nothing coming out... for now.
generic.trans: 到现在……还没有东西出来。

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.
I hope you find her.

wagpunk_cagewall.en: I guess we're not going anywhere.

saddle_wathgrithr.en: It has wings, but will never fly.

ancient_altar.en: It is full of the echoes of the dead.

generic.en: It is not as edible as it looks.
generic.trans: 它并不像看上去那样是可以吃的。

hostile.en: The rage is a mask to hide his pain.
hostile.trans: 愤怒是他掩饰痛苦的面具。

buried.en: A soul crushed by the weight of the inescapable past.
buried.trans: 一个被无法逃避的沉重过去压垮的灵魂。

generic.en: He seems hungry for power. Perhaps to fill the void within.
generic.trans: 他看起来渴望力量。也许是要填满内心的空虚。

oceanfishingbobber_goose.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

gears.en: The insides of a mechanical demon.

tacklecontainer.en: At least I won't have to carry bait in my pockets anymore.
tacklecontainer.trans: 起码以后不用在口袋里装鱼饵了。

frogglebunwich.en: I never thought frog's legs could look so good.
frogglebunwich.trans: 我从没想过蛙腿可以看上去这么棒。

freshfruitcrepes.en: Could I get this a la mode?
freshfruitcrepes.trans: 我这个上面能加冰淇淋吗？

bearger.en: It could crush me in one blow. I wish it would.
bearger.trans: 它一巴掌就能把我拍扁。我希望它这样做。

bandage_butterflywings.en: An ephemeral remedy woven from vanitas itself.
bandage_butterflywings.trans: 一种由虚空本身编织的短暂疗法。

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.
It is forever seeking its lost half.
generic.trans: 它永远在寻找失去的另一半。

some_kelp.en: The merms are in an endless cycle of feeding. Give them more.
some_kelp.trans: 鱼人无休止地循环进食。再多给它们一些。

lots_of_kelp.en: So even the merms have their limits.
lots_of_kelp.trans: 所以，即使是鱼人也有自己的极限。

generic.en: Empty.

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.
It does seem to bring some cheer.
generic.trans: 它确实能带来一些喜悦。

moon_altar_glass.en: It wants to find its missing pieces.

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: It will only build a temporary distraction.
kitcoondecor1_kit.trans: 只能暂时分散一下它们的注意力。

generic.en: What a lonely post.

linked.en: It fulfills its purpose in connection.
linked.trans: 它只有通过相连才能实现自身的意义。

kitcoon_nametag.en: It's too painful to grow attached to things.
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 一旦对事物产生依恋，痛苦就无穷无尽。

quagmire_park_obelisk.en: A monument. But not to Abigail.
quagmire_park_obelisk.trans: 一座纪念碑，但它纪念的不是阿比盖尔。

watermelon_oversized.en: One could drown in so much watermelon...
watermelon_oversized.trans: 这么多西瓜都能淹死人了……

playing_card.trans: 一张孤零零的纸牌。好极了。

chesspiece_pipe.en: A bubble, frozen in time, can never pop.
chesspiece_pipe.trans: 一个冻结在时间里的泡沫，绝不会爆破。

quagmire_portal_key.en: Perhaps I'll be happier in the next world.
quagmire_portal_key.trans: 也许我在下一个世界里会快乐些。

ghostlyelixir_slowregen.en: It's all I can do to help...
ghostlyelixir_slowregen.trans: 我能帮的也只有这些了……

miniboatlantern.en: Such a happy little glow... I despise it.
miniboatlantern.trans: 好一个快乐的微光……我鄙视它。

glowberrymousse.en: It swirls like the endless abyss.
glowberrymousse.trans: 像无尽的深渊一样旋转着。

slingshot_band_pigskin.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

bundle.en: I don't even remember what's within anymore...
bundle.trans: 我甚至都不记得里面有什么了...

orangestaff.en: With each use the wielder dies and is again reborn.
orangestaff.trans: 每用一次，使用者会死掉，然后又重生。

pavlova.en: It's brittle and delicate, like life itself.
pavlova.trans: 它脆弱易碎，就像生命一样。

oceanfishingbobber_robin.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_robin.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

slingshotammo_scrapfeather.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_scrapfeather.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

generic.en: I will learn unspeakable things.
generic.trans: 我会学到无法形容的事情。

generic.en: I have learnt unspeakable things.
generic.trans: 我学到了无法形容的事情。

generic.en: This is but a step from madness.
generic.trans: 距离疯狂只有一步之遥。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: One more blight will be brought into this world.
eyeofterror_mini_grounded.trans: 又有一个祸害将被带入这个世界。

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: It beckons me with the promise of endless slumber...
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 它用长眠不醒的承诺在向我招手……

carnivalgame_herding_chick.trans: 不可避免的东西就不要逃避了。

rage.en: I think I'll be reunited with Abigail soon.
rage.trans: 我想我很快会和阿比盖尔重聚了。

generic.en: Just swallow us whole and end our misery.
generic.trans: 吞了我们，结束我们的痛苦吧。

rabbitkinghorn.en: I guess it plays a type of burial song.
rabbitkinghorn.trans: 我猜它会演奏一种葬歌。

wolfgang_whistle.en: Abigail, I saw you whispering at Wolfgang to make us do pushups!
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 阿比盖尔，我看到你跟沃尔夫冈说悄悄话让他叫我们做俯卧撑！

bernie_active.en: It dances to forget the pain.

birdtrap.trans: 树枝和蜘蛛丝也能变得致命。

generic.en: It lacks a soul.

cave_banana.trans: 它们的皮看起来很危险。

dug_monkeytail.en: Oh. They're so soft. And fuzzy.
dug_monkeytail.trans: 哦。它们是如此柔软。而且毛茸茸的。

turf_cotl_gold.en: If I follow the yellow bricks, will they take me home?
turf_cotl_gold.trans: 如果我沿着这些黄色砖块走，它们会带我回家吗？

cutgrass.en: It never even knew it was alive. How fortunate.
cutgrass.trans: 它从未知道自己还活着。太幸运了。

mask_ancient_architecthat.en: Did the wearer know what would become of their people?
mask_ancient_architecthat.trans: 佩戴者是否知道他的族人会走向什么结局？

saddlehorn.en: I'm only taking back what's mine.
saddlehorn.trans: 我只是拿回属于我的东西。

ghost.en: I'm so sorry, %s.
ghost.trans: 我很抱歉，%s。

firestarter.en: Maybe we should play a different game...
firestarter.trans: 我们也许该玩一个别的游戏……

murderer.en: You should've stayed hidden in your swamp!
murderer.trans: 你应该继续躲在沼泽里！

attacker.en: If you won't play nice, you can't play with us!
attacker.trans: 你要是不好好玩，我们就不带你玩！

reviver.en: That was very nice of you, %s.

generic.en: Hello, %s.

mermking.en: He does look very regal, despite the warts.
mermking.trans: 他皇室的气派十足，尽管长了好多疣。

lunar_grazer.en: Will you grant me the eternal slumber I seek?
lunar_grazer.trans: 你能不能给我我追求的永恒沉睡？

chesspiece_minotaur.en: A testament to a lifetime spent alone in the dark.
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 独自在黑暗中度过一生的见证。

wx78module_nightvision.en: It looks so fragile... hopefully no tragic accidents befall it.
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 它看起来很脆弱……希望别出悲剧性事故。

pirate_flag_pole.en: Those monkeys have no imagination. I've seen more macabre children's drawings.
pirate_flag_pole.trans: 这些猴子没有想象力。我见过更可怕的儿童画。

chesspiece_muse.en: She holds the true power, here.
chesspiece_muse.trans: 她在这里拥有真正的力量。

purplemooneye.en: Maybe now I'll lose fewer friends...
purplemooneye.trans: 也许现在我会失去更少的朋友...

burning.trans: 现在它得到了真正的自由。

reviving.en: There can be a fate worse than death.
reviving.trans: 原来还有比死亡更糟的命运。

generic.en: Poor bird.

growing.en: Leafy tendrils coil out of the muck.
growing.trans: 枝繁叶茂的卷须盘绕在泥土上。

needsfertilizer.en: This earth is cold and dead.
needsfertilizer.trans: 这块土地冰凉而没有生机。

burnt.en: This earth is burnt and dead.
burnt.trans: 这块土地已经被烧毁，失去了生命力。

generic.en: What seeds shall I sow?
I know that emptiness behind those eyes.
generic.trans: 我熟悉那种眼睛后面的空洞。

slingshot_handle_jelly.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

archive_resonator_item.en: The ones who designed it are long dead.

moonbutterfly_sapling.trans: 尽管困难重重...它还是茁壮成长...

honeyham.en: A sweet sauce for this creature's sweet embrace.
honeyham.trans: 死去的肉块，蘸满甜蜜的酱汁。

scorched_skeleton.en: The flame has cleansed this poor wretched soul.
scorched_skeleton.trans: 火焰净化了这个不幸的灵魂。

succulent_picked.en: Plucked from the safety of its desert home.
succulent_picked.trans: 从它在沙漠中安全的家里拔出。

festivefish.en: It's about as festive as I feel.
festivefish.trans: 跟我感受到的一样喜庆。

kitcoon_marsh.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

costume_king_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_king_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

generic.en: It's soothing to watch the seconds tick away.
generic.trans: 看着时间一分一秒地过去，心里很舒坦。

tamales.en: Little pockets of warmth in this cold world.
tamales.trans: 这个冰冷世界里的小小温暖。

following_other.en: Whom do you serve, dear knight?
following_other.trans: 你在效忠于谁呢，亲爱的骑士？

generic.en: Brutes, all of you!
generic.trans: 你们都是些粗鲁的家伙。

pigskin.en: The hide of a pig that once was.
pigskin.trans: 曾经是一只猪身上的皮。

hammer.en: This hammer does not create... it only destroys...
hammer.trans: 锤子不能创造...它只用于毁灭...

guacamole.en: That's just gruesome. I like it.

yotd_oar.en: I can paddle and paddle, and still feel like I'm going nowhere.
yotd_oar.trans: 不管我怎么划水，还是会感觉无处可去。

wagpunkbits_kit.trans: 有些事情是无法修复的。

voidcloth_boomerang.trans: 不是所有东西都会回来。

carrot_cooked.en: It's a carrot that's gone through a gauntlet of fire.
carrot_cooked.trans: 这是一根经过烈火考验的胡萝卜。

wagdrone_beacon.en: It prevents the little machine from crossing over.
wagdrone_beacon.trans: 它阻止这小机器跨越界限。

dumbbell_bluegem.en: It chills me to my core.

berrysauce.trans: 阿比盖尔会喜欢这个的……

nightsword.en: Dreams come to a point. A sharp one.
nightsword.trans: 噩梦渐渐变得尖锐，铸成了这把利剑。
