playing.en: I'm very good at remembering... aren't I, Abigail?
playing.trans: 我很擅长记忆……不是吗，阿比盖尔？

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

oar_monkey.en: It slices through the waves without mercy.
oar_monkey.trans: 它毫不留情地切开海浪。

generic.en: It's had a rough life.
Beauty, like all things, will fade and be forgotten.
generic.trans: 美，就像所有的事物一样，会褪色，会被遗忘。

occupied.en: I can change its appearance, but it will always just be a beefalo.
occupied.trans: 不管我怎么改变它的外表，但它永远只是头皮弗娄牛。

monkey_mediumhat.en: A captain must go down with her ship.
monkey_mediumhat.trans: 船长必须与她的船一起沉没。

cave_banana_tree.en: Poor plant, locked away from the sun.
cave_banana_tree.trans: 可怜的植物，永远不见天日。

generic.en: A tree that knows only pain.
generic.trans: 一棵只能感受到痛苦的树。

potatotornado.trans: 天旋地转，如同我的生活。

beaverghost.en: The curse haunts you even in death, %s?
beaverghost.trans: 就算死了，这诅咒还是缠扰着你吗，%s？

firestarter.en: Fire setting does not seem in your best interest...
firestarter.trans: 放火好像不是你最大的兴趣…

ghost.en: We'll get a heart, but are you sure you want to come back?
ghost.trans: 我们会拿到心，但你确定你想回来吗？

goose.en: Hah... you look so silly I almost... well, never mind.
goose.trans: 哈...你看着真蠢，我差点...算了，不说了。

mooseghost.en: I'll find a way to return you to this mortal coil. If you wish.
mooseghost.trans: 我想个办法让你回到这个凡尘俗世吧。如果你想的话。

murderer.en: I'll send you someplace much nicer than this, %s.
murderer.trans: %s，我会给你安排比这更好的住所。

attacker.en: %s is plotting something dastardly with that axe.
attacker.trans: %s和他的斧子鬼鬼祟祟地密谋什么。

moose.en: It looks like your condition has worsened, %s.
moose.trans: 你的状况看起来显著恶化了，%s。

gooseghost.en: Why stay when you could fly away from this place?
gooseghost.trans: 你明明能飞走，为什么还留在这个地方呢？

beaver.en: He pinky-promised I'd get to ride on his shoulders. Such lies.
beaver.trans: 他勾手指答应过让我骑在他肩上。根本就是谎话。

reviver.en: Abigail likes you, %s. But she likes Lucy more.
reviver.trans: %s，阿比盖尔喜欢你。但她喜欢露西多一点。

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

bundlewrap.en: Abigail always helped me tie the bow.
bundlewrap.trans: 阿比盖尔总是帮我系蝴蝶结。

beemine.en: They're still alive in there. Poor things.
beemine.trans: 它们在那里面还是活的。可怜的小东西。

eggplant_oversized.en: Unfortunately it's not poisonous, despite its sickly purple shade.
eggplant_oversized.trans: 可惜它没有毒，尽管它紫的病恹恹的。

generic.en: I hope it wasn't one of Webber's friends.
generic.trans: 希望它不是韦伯的朋友。

generic.en: That is a mere suggestion of defense.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: A paltry last meal for the fish.

oceantree.en: Its roots have the appearance of sunbleached bones.
oceantree.trans: 它的根部看起来像被太阳晒白的骨头。

trinket_41.en: It looks like ectoplasm in there.

trinket_40.en: The weight of the world rests upon me.
trinket_40.trans: 整个世界都压在我身上。

trinket_43.en: I have put childish things behind me.
trinket_43.trans: 我已经把幼稚的东西都抛在身后。

trinket_42.en: To frolic, to play, no more.

molebat.en: Nature has played a cruel joke on this creature.
molebat.trans: 大自然给这种生物开了一个残酷的玩笑。

reflectivevest.trans: 任何东西都可以做成背心。

stafflight.en: I can almost make out a tiny solar system.
stafflight.trans: 我甚至能做出一个小小的太阳系。

slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

trinket_44.trans: 一些裂痕是修补不了的。

yotc_carrat_race_start_item.en: I should find a resting place for this.
yotc_carrat_race_start_item.trans: 我要为这个找个安息之地。

trinket_46.en: I simply do not know what it is.
trinket_46.trans: 我根本不知道这是什么。

chesspiece_wormboss.en: It consumed to fill its endless void.
chesspiece_wormboss.trans: 它为了填补无尽的空虚而吞噬。

slurtlehole.en: The slurtles pop out when they outgrow it.
slurtlehole.trans: 蛞蝓龟长得太大的时候就会从里面出来。

handpillow_beefalowool.en: This one is just right. Except for the smell.
handpillow_beefalowool.trans: 这个还可以，就是有点味道。

voidcloth_kit.en: You can't always fix what's broken. But sometimes you can.
voidcloth_kit.trans: 不是所有破损的东西都可以被修复，但有些可以。

level_3.en: It does look quite pretty, doesn't it?

generic.en: Abigail thinks it needs some decorations around it.
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔觉得它的周围需要一点装饰。

level_2.en: The ravens seem quite drawn to the decorations.
level_2.trans: 乌鸦们好像被装饰品深深吸引住了。

trinket_32.en: When I gaze into the ball I see... nothing. Apropos.
trinket_32.trans: 当我盯着球的时候我...什么也没看见。恰好。

generic.en: Look at those hooves.
generic.trans: 看看这些长蹄子的动物。

cooking_long.en: Whatever's in there isn't dead yet.

palmcone_seed.en: A tree that has barely begun to live.
palmcone_seed.trans: 一棵几乎没有开始生活的树。

trinket_38.en: It makes the world look as insignificant as I feel.
trinket_38.trans: 它使这个世界看起来就像我的感觉一样微不足道。

oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 有邪恶的东西潜伏在我们上方。

trinket_37.en: Drive it through my heart and be done.

pepper_cooked.en: What can this tiny plant possibly do to fill my empty life?
pepper_cooked.trans: 这个小植物怎么才能填满我空虚的生活？

trinket_39.en: One lonely half of a pair.

trinket_34.en: Perhaps a curse could end our suffering.
trinket_34.trans: 也许一个诅咒会结束我们的痛苦。

trinket_36.en: Now Webber and I can match.
trinket_36.trans: 现在韦伯和我合得起来了。

mosquitomermsalve.en: Don't worry, this will only hurt for a moment.

trinket_35.en: Neither half empty, nor half full.

generic.en: Would you like to be a pie, little bird?
generic.trans: 要不要把你做成馅饼呀，小鸟？

sleeping.en: It's practicing for the big sleep.
sleeping.trans: 它正在为长睡不醒做准备呢。

beequeen.en: As regal as she is ruthless...

high.en: A vision of a frozen-over Hell!

generic.en: I might survive this night!

out.en: That is not a good sign.

playing.en: The outcome is as unpredictable as life itself.
playing.trans: 结果就像生活本身一样不可预知。

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

trinket_21.en: This tool has come to the end of its life.
trinket_21.trans: 这个工具再也无法使用了。

rock_ice_melted.en: A large pool of cool, melted ice.
rock_ice_melted.trans: 一大滩冰冷的，融化的冰。

pigelitefighter1.trans: 暴风雨在他体内肆虐着。

generic.en: It is touched by death.

fence_junk.en: Even these discarded pieces can manage to be useful.
fence_junk.trans: 即使是被丢弃的碎片，合成后也能派上用场。

pigelitefighter3.en: His whole career is grounded in violence.
pigelitefighter3.trans: 他的整个职业生涯都以暴力为基础。

trinket_27.en: Now at least the wardrobe can be organized.
trinket_27.trans: 现在至少衣柜是井井有条的。

damaged.en: It cannot be brought back but its parts may be gifted to another.
damaged.trans: 它无法重生，但它的零件或许能赠于他人。

generic.en: They're starting to irritate me.

trinket_26.en: That potato is as hollow as I am.

goldnugget.en: Even in purgatory it remains the most precious of metals.
goldnugget.trans: 即使在炼狱之中，它仍是最珍贵的金属。

potato_oversized.en: I'm not sure if I could even carry it on my own...
potato_oversized.trans: 我不知道我自己能不能搬得动……

trinket_29.en: A horse! A horse! My castle for a horse!
trinket_29.trans: 一匹马！一匹马！我的城堡换一匹马！

merm_shadow.en: You shed everything you were. Does it feel... good?
merm_shadow.trans: 你舍弃了自己曾经的一切。感觉……好吗？

trinket_28.en: A horse! A horse! My castle for a horse!
trinket_28.trans: 一匹马！一匹马！我的城堡换一匹马！

trinket_23.en: I don't have a use for it.

trinket_25.en: It smells of decay and death.

ivy_snare.en: I suppose I must deserve this.

icestaff3.en: My heart is already cold as ice.

generic.en: Knives out.

glommerwings.en: Even his wings are small and cheery.
glommerwings.trans: 就连他的翅膀也是小小而活泼的。

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_thulecite.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

firestaff.en: The world will burn before this staff.
firestaff.trans: 世界将在这根魔杖面前燃烧。

charlie_heckler.en: Their words can't hurt me. Well, maybe just a little...
charlie_heckler.trans: 他们的话不会伤到我。好吧，也许有一点……

saddle_shadow.en: The higher you sit, the farther you fall.

critterlab.en: Oh. The abyss is staring back at me...

brewing.en: One of my few joys in this life.
brewing.trans: 这是我此生少有的乐事之一。

active.en: It's been a while since my last tea party.
active.trans: 离上一次的茶话会已经有一阵子了。

generic.en: She's not in.

dragontailhat.trans: 那仅仅是一条高高的尾巴。

chesspiece_beefalo.trans: 仅仅是一个冰冷而没有生命的副本。

trinket_16.en: Winning with only one piece is hopeless.
trinket_16.trans: 只有一片的胜利是无望的。

trinket_15.en: Winning with only one piece is hopeless.
trinket_15.trans: 只有一片的胜利是无望的。

trinket_17.en: Two utensils that are one. It reminds me of myself and Abigail.
trinket_17.trans: 两个厨具其实是一个。这让我想起我和阿比盖尔。

trinket_12.en: Not so slimy any more, are we?
trinket_12.trans: 不再那么黏滑了，不是吗？

sweetpotato.en: Oh Abigail, remember how mother would make this every year?
sweetpotato.trans: 喔阿比盖尔，还记得以前妈妈每年都会做这个吗？

trinket_11.en: I warned you, WX, never ingest bottles labeled "Drink me."
trinket_11.trans: 我警告你，WX，绝对不要喝下标记有“请喝我”的瓶子。

trinket_14.en: I wish my life force would drain away like the tea.
trinket_14.trans: 我希望我的生命像茶一样耗尽。

boomerang.trans: 死亡会回到发镖者身上。

generic.en: They are bright and cheery. Yuck.
generic.trans: 它们明亮又活泼。真讨厌。

trinket_13.en: I'd carry this to the end of the world.
trinket_13.trans: 我会带着这个，直到世界末日。

trinket_19.en: The spinning inevitably ends, just like life.
trinket_19.trans: 纺锤必然停止转动，如同生命必然终结。

burnt.en: Death comes for all of us...

lavaarena_heavyblade.en: It's too heavy. Like my soul.
lavaarena_heavyblade.trans: 它太沉重了。就像我的灵魂。

support_pillar_complete.en: It promises protection, but for how long?
support_pillar_complete.trans: 它能提供保护，但能持续多久？

nightmarefuel.en: With the sleep of dreams comes this stuff.

ghost.en: You were too good for this world, %s.
ghost.trans: 你太善良，这个世界不适合你，%s。

firestarter.en: If you play with fire, you're liable to get burned...
firestarter.trans: 玩火者必自焚...

murderer.en: Don't worry, %s. I'll end it quickly.
murderer.trans: 别担心，%s。我会给你一个痛快的了断。

attacker.en: %s has developed a taste for blood.

reviver.en: %s's friendship extends beyond the veil.

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

slingshot_band_tentacle.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_band_tentacle.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

yotc_seedpacket.en: Nothing grows in the garden of my heart.
yotc_seedpacket.trans: 我的心里什么都长不出来。

war_blueprint.en: Even seemingly gentle creatures have a dark side.
war_blueprint.trans: 就算是看起来温柔的生物也有黑暗的一面。

deerclops_eyeball.trans: 它肯定看到了什么可怕的东西。

generic.en: Abigail?

occupied.en: You might be sitting on Abigail.
occupied.trans: 你可能坐到了阿比盖尔身上。

moonstorm_static.en: That looks rather dangerous... I wonder if he'd let me try.
moonstorm_static.trans: 这看起来相当危险……不知道他能不能让我试试。

generic.en: Why do I feel that it is measuring our mortality?
generic.trans: 我怎么觉得像在计算我们的死期？

burnt.en: Does that mean my day to die is here?
burnt.trans: 我今天难道要死在这里了吗？

burning.en: Soon it will be nothing but ashes.

burnt.en: Now it doesn't remind me of anything.
burnt.trans: 现在它不会让我想起任何东西。

generic.en: It reminds me of a story I used to read with Abigail.
generic.trans: 它让我想起了过去和阿比盖尔一起读的一个故事。

carrot_oversized.en: A clump of giant, gnarled roots for eating.
carrot_oversized.trans: 一丛巨大的、虬结的可食用的根茎。

mask_princesshat.en: There's a lonliness in her expression.

generic.en: Abigail loved surprises.
generic.trans: 阿比盖尔生前喜欢惊喜。

empty.trans: 本是同根生，相煎何太急。

1.en: I wonder how she came to this miserable place.
1.trans: 我不知道她是怎么来到这个悲惨的地方的。

2.en: I wonder how she came to this miserable place.
2.trans: 我不知道她是怎么来到这个悲惨的地方的。

pumpkinpie.en: Is it sweet enough to help me forget the bitterness in my heart?
pumpkinpie.trans: 它的甜能让我忘了心里的苦吗?

horseshoe.en: Will it make a difference for me?

crumbs.en: The little guy is falling apart.

carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.en: Can I... help set up the carnival?

watertree_root.en: Perhaps my boat will be dashed upon it.
watertree_root.trans: 也许我的小船会撞上它。

cave_entrance.en: Someone is trying to keep the underground at bay.
cave_entrance.trans: 有人不想让别人进入地下。

oceanfishingbobber_ball.en: It floats happily until something drags it under.
oceanfishingbobber_ball.trans: 如果没东西拉它沉沦，它会一直这么快乐的漂着。

shovel_lunarplant.en: Some things should stay buried... but not today.
shovel_lunarplant.trans: 有些东西应当永远深埋……但今天不行。

generic.en: Oh. That might be... f-fun...

burning.trans: 现在它得到了真正的自由。

reviving.en: There can be a fate worse than death.
reviving.trans: 原来还有比死亡更糟的命运。

generic.en: Poor bird.

yotb.en: Mr. Judge might like to see it.
yotb.trans: 评委先生也许想看看它。

generic.en: What a sweet little doll.

crabking_icewall.trans: 你不可能永远都藏起来的，螃蟹。

picked.en: They have already been torn away.

generic.en: It's just a bunch of reeds.

goldenaxe.en: One might as well kill trees with style.
goldenaxe.trans: 谁都可以有范地把树杀掉。

monsterlasagna.en: Cooked evil is still evil. Even in lasagna.
monsterlasagna.trans: 弄熟的恶魔还是恶魔，在千层饼中也不会改变。

burning.en: Their ashes belong in the swamp.
burning.trans: 该把这些骨灰葬在沼泽。

generic.en: I can't help feeling sorry for the horrid swamp thing.
generic.trans: 我不禁为这可怕的沼泽怪物感到遗憾。

generic.en: I will learn unspeakable things.
generic.trans: 我会学到无法形容的事情。

generic.en: It has not yet been touched by the ravages of time.
generic.trans: 还没有遭受到时间的蹂躏。

golden_farm_hoe.en: One might as well garden in style.

mosquitosack.en: A sack of blood ripped from a mosquito. I love it.
mosquitosack.trans: 从蚊子身上掉落下来的血囊。我爱这玩意。

lunar_forge.en: Will I be able to create anything of use?
lunar_forge.trans: 我能否创造出任何有用的东西？

gargoyle_hound.trans: 一只“小狗”，冻结在时间里...

shimmer.en: I feel its strange light drawing me in, like a moth to the flame.
shimmer.trans: 我感到它的奇异光芒吸引着我，就像飞蛾扑火。

burnt.en: It didn't belong in this world.
burnt.trans: 它本就不属于这个世界。

generic.en: What terrible things hide within?
generic.trans: 里面藏着什么可怕的东西？

raised.en: So close, yet so far away.
raised.trans: 如此贴近，却又遥不可及。

generic.en: Call me Sisyphus.

molebathill.en: Abigail keeps daring me to touch it...
molebathill.trans: 阿比盖尔一直怂恿我碰碰它……

wall_dreadstone_item.en: As dark and impenetrable as my heart.
wall_dreadstone_item.trans: 就像我的内心一样黑暗和不可穿透。

pinecone.en: A tiny life, ensconced in brittle death.
pinecone.trans: 藏身于脆弱死亡中的渺小生命。

quagmire_lamp_short.en: The only light in my life is Abigail.
quagmire_lamp_short.trans: 我唯一的人生之光，就是阿比盖尔。

firestarter.en: Fire won't protect you, %s.
firestarter.trans: 火保护不了你，%s。

ghost.en: %s... Everyone leaves...
ghost.trans: %s…大家都走了…

murderer.en: Strength is meaningless if you can't catch me...
murderer.trans: 如果你抓不住我，力量也没意义。

attacker.en: I don't trust %s. Fear makes people dangerous.
attacker.trans: 我不相信%s。恐惧让人变得危险。

reviver.en: Don't be scared, %s. Abigail just wants to be friends.
reviver.trans: 别害怕，%s。阿比盖尔只是想交个朋友。

generic.en: Hi %s. Why are you shaking?

boat_bumper_yotd.en: My boat is baring its teeth.

mossling.en: A new life. The last thing anyone needs.
mossling.trans: 一个新生命。没人需要这个。

ghostlyelixir_lunar.trans: 你会让他们大吃一惊的，阿比。

battlesong_instant_revive.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

opalpreciousgem.en: I see a million sad eyes reflecting back at me...
opalpreciousgem.trans: 我看见一百万只悲伤的眼睛反射在我身上...

inground.en: I would hide too, if I could.
inground.trans: 如果可以的话，我也想藏起来。

generic.en: Dank.

playing.en: They look so silly running about.
playing.trans: 它们跑起来的样子好傻。

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

blowdart_sleep.en: Not the big sleep, just a temporary one.
blowdart_sleep.trans: 不会让目标沉睡，只会造成短暂的休眠。

has_spirit.en: Let's find you a new place to rest.
has_spirit.trans: 给你找个新的安息之所吧。

generic.en: Empty. Sigh.

little_walrus.trans: 暴力周而复始，仍在继续。

playing.en: Abigail, do you remember which one it was?
playing.trans: 阿比盖尔，你记得是哪个吗？

generic.en: It's a little door.

fig_cooked.en: Any wasps it held seem to have been burned away.
fig_cooked.trans: 里面的黄蜂好像被烧没了。

lavaarena_elemental.en: When will you be free from this torment?
lavaarena_elemental.trans: 你什么时候才能脱离这种痛苦呢？

armor_carrotlure.en: I assume it only comes in orange.

mermhat.en: We all hide behind our own masks...
mermhat.trans: 我们每个人都戴着面具隐藏自己……

generic.en: She was just protecting her children.
generic.trans: 她只是在保护她的孩子。

mutatedbird.en: There's no life in its eyes.

moonstorm_spark.en: It doesn't feel of this world.
moonstorm_spark.trans: 感觉它不是这个世界的东西。

kitcoon_savanna.en: Small and innocent. Like I once was...
kitcoon_savanna.trans: 年幼而天真，就像曾经的我……

trunkvest_winter.en: It may warm the body, but what of the spirit?
trunkvest_winter.trans: 它也许能温暖身体，但对灵魂有什么用呢？

chesspiece_daywalker.en: A reminder that kindness only leads to pain.
chesspiece_daywalker.trans: 提醒你善意只会导致痛苦。

pigguard.trans: 这头小猪看上去脾气不好。

lucky_goldnugget.en: Luck has long since abandoned me...
lucky_goldnugget.trans: 运气已经抛弃我很久了...

baconeggs.en: A balanced breakfast to start another miserable day.
baconeggs.trans: 吃了这份营养均衡的早餐，新的悲惨一天又开始了。

quagmire_pot_hanger.en: The hanger is a noose for a pot.
quagmire_pot_hanger.trans: 这个挂锅装置能把锅勾住。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.en: A paltry last meal for the fish.

me.en: I don't need another dead twin.
me.trans: 我不需要再多死去的双胞胎了。

generic.en: A souless existence.

charlie_stage_post.en: The perfect place for a tragedy.

bibingka.en: This bread has a most curious texture.
bibingka.trans: 这个面包的口感非常神奇。

battlesong_sanityaura.en: My heart has no desire to sing.

twiggy_nut.en: It's sad it's not in the earth.

chesspiece_butterfly.en: But a simulacrum of life. Sigh.

chesspiece_stalker.en: Dark and cold, like my soul.
chesspiece_stalker.trans: 黑暗而冰冷，就像我的灵魂。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.en: It was so beautiful at its core.
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.trans: 它的核心曾是那般美丽。

tomato_cooked.en: Its flesh is far more bloody now.
tomato_cooked.trans: 现在它的肉显得更血淋淋了。

ghost.en: He has risen from the grave!
ghost.trans: 他从坟墓里跑出来！

skullchest.en: It shall contain my memento mori.
skullchest.trans: 那里面应该有我的死亡警告。

yellowamulet.en: A brief light in a dark life.
yellowamulet.trans: 黑暗生活中的一道短暂光芒。

mast_yotd.en: Maybe I could sail far away...

beeswax.en: It's useless on its own, just like me.
beeswax.trans: 它本身是没有用的，就像我。

shroom_skin.en: A reminder of the death we wrought.

shadowthrall_horns.en: Will the darkness consume me at last?
shadowthrall_horns.trans: 黑暗最终会不会吞噬我？

lost_toy_1.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_1.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

lost_toy_2.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_2.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

pigelite3.en: His whole career is grounded in violence.
pigelite3.trans: 他的整个职业生涯都以暴力为基础。

pigelite1.trans: 暴风雨在他体内肆虐着。

oar_driftwood.en: Just when it thought it had escaped the ocean...

dug_grass.en: I like it dead, but it should probably be returned to the earth.
dug_grass.trans: 我想它死，但它可能会重返地球。

lost_toy_7.en: I get the feeling... that this meant a great deal to someone.
lost_toy_7.trans: 我能感觉到……这个对某人很重要。

fruitmedley.en: Sweet, tart and in a cup.
fruitmedley.trans: 装在杯子里，酸酸甜甜的。

piggyback.en: They are more useful in death.

carrat.en: I don't know what I expected, really.
carrat.trans: 我也不知道自己期望什么，真的。

generic.en: What is the measure of a Carrat?
generic.trans: 胡萝卜鼠是用什么单位衡量的？

critter_eyeofterror.en: May we gaze into the abyss... together.
critter_eyeofterror.trans: 也许我们可以一起凝视……深渊。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.en: Can I... help set up the carnival?

lunar_forge_kit.en: I should try to put these scattered pieces together...
lunar_forge_kit.trans: 我应该试着把这些零散的东西拼凑起来……

slingshot_handle_voidcloth.en: Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting.
slingshot_handle_voidcloth.trans: 沃尔特弹弓玩得越来越像那么回事了。

1.trans: 她的皮毛……柔软，内心善良。

2.trans: 她的皮毛……柔软，内心善良。

generic.en: A death cap, surely.

burnt.en: It's nothing but ashes and memories.

generic.en: It seems strength can only be found through suffering.
generic.trans: 似乎只有经受苦难才能获得力量。

critter_dragonling.en: My, what big eyes you have.

corn.en: I could make a corny joke, but I'll refrain.
corn.trans: 我可以说个关于玉米的老掉牙笑话，但我会克制的。

hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.en: They will merely tolerate my presence.
hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.trans: 它们多半不会容忍我的出现。

grotto_pool_big.en: A rare bit of beauty in this dark, dreary place.
grotto_pool_big.trans: 在这个黑暗沉闷的地方，难得有一点美的东西。

2.trans: 这是一座鬼城。

3.en: Some tragedy has struck this house.

ready.en: There is salt to be had.

generic.en: There is no salt, yet.

palmconetree.en: Your hardened exterior won't protect you from the world.
palmconetree.trans: 你坚硬的外表并不能保护你免受这个世界的伤害。

critter_kitten.en: Cursed with nine lives. Poor thing.
critter_kitten.trans: 被诅咒拥有9条命。可怜的东西。

robot.en: I envy you, %s. Maybe I should play with %s?
robot.trans: 我羡慕你，%s。也许我也该和%s一起玩？

default.en: I envy you, %s. Maybe I should play with %s?
default.trans: 我羡慕你，%s。也许我也该和%s一起玩？

female.en: I envy you, %s. Maybe I should play with %s?
female.trans: 我羡慕你，%s。也许我也该和%s一起玩？

male.en: I envy you, %s. Maybe I should play with %s?
male.trans: 我羡慕你，%s。也许我也该和%s一起玩？

noammo.en: I have nothing that can fill the void... of this empty cannon.
noammo.trans: 我没有任何东西能够填补这门大炮的空虚。

ammoloaded.en: What irreparable damage will it cause?
ammoloaded.trans: 它将造成什么不可修复的损失？

generic.en: It's empty inside...

lavae.en: It burns with the fires of Hell.

quagmire_crabmeat.en: Its insides are as horrid as its outsides.
quagmire_crabmeat.trans: 无论内外，它都是可怕的。

winter_food9.en: So aggressively delicious. You can't help but feel better.
winter_food9.trans: 这味道真是顶呱呱。你情不自禁地会觉得更好。

generic.en: I might survive this night!

out.en: That is not a good sign.

halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.en: Like life, it's a bit disappointing.
halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.trans: 它就像生命一样有点令人失望。

moonglass_charged.trans: 它感觉好像是活的一样。

winter_food5.en: It tastes okay, but I've grown tired of logs...
winter_food5.trans: 味道还行，但是我已经厌倦木头了...

winter_food4.en: It is filled with chunks of evil.
winter_food4.trans: 它充满了大块大块的魔鬼。

winter_food7.en: I don't want Winter's Feast to end...

winter_food6.en: I'm going to lick all the icing off...
winter_food6.trans: 我要把所有的糖衣舔下来...

winter_food3.en: If you eat it right... the end gets sharp...
winter_food3.trans: 如果你用正确的方式吃它...结果就会变得锋利...

winter_food2.en: Not nearly sweet enough to balance out this bitter world.
winter_food2.trans: 远远没有甜美到能够平衡这个苦涩的世界。

record_dusk.en: I wonder if father still listens to his record collection.
record_dusk.trans: 不知道父亲是否还会听他收藏的旧唱片。

stalagmite.en: The earth gives up its bounty.
stalagmite.trans: 大地慷慨地奉献了这些岩石。

chesspiece_warg_mutated.en: Why was it able to come back? It's not fair...
chesspiece_warg_mutated.trans: 它为什么能回来？这不公平……

green_cap.trans: 这个蘑菇太普通了，真让人失望。

icebox.en: It is as cold as my heart.

common.en: Whoever drew this is probably dead.
common.trans: 绘制这个的人可能已经死了。

rare.en: I'm surprised we didn't die trying to get this.
rare.trans: 尝试得到这东西的时候我们居然没死，我太惊讶了。

lava_pond.en: I could jump in and be done.
lava_pond.trans: 我可以跳进去，一了百了。

quagmire_grill.en: It can't make life more palatable.
quagmire_grill.trans: 它并不能让我的生活变得美好。

friendly.en: It kind of lost its spark.

damaged.en: It can live again or sacrifice its parts for another.
damaged.trans: 它可以重生，或者献出零件选择牺牲。

generic.en: They are compelled by a greater entity.
generic.trans: 它们被更强大的存在压迫着。

chesspiece_yoth.en: Not quite the fairy tale version.

onemanband.en: I used to take joy in instruments such as these.
onemanband.trans: 我曾经在类似的乐器中享受这样的快乐。

wagstaff_npc_mutations.en: This apparition always has some sort of task he wants help with.
wagstaff_npc_mutations.trans: 这个烦人鬼总有事要人帮忙。

chesspiece_yotd.en: If only I could have a new start.
chesspiece_yotd.trans: 我要是能有新的开始该多好。

book_horticulture.en: I'm not very good at keeping things alive.

gingerbreadpig.en: No one wants to be my friend.
gingerbreadpig.trans: 没有人愿意做我的朋友。

slingshotammo_honey.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_honey.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

catcoonhat.en: Nothing like the stench of death on your head.
catcoonhat.trans: 什么都比不上你脑袋上的死亡恶臭。

kelphat.en: The strands are so slippery, it's barely holding together.
kelphat.trans: 每根都滑滑的，放都放不到一起。

minotaurchest.en: My, what magnificent horns you have!
minotaurchest.trans: 天啊，你有一对多么华丽的角！

generic.en: The monster's hunger shall never cease.
generic.trans: 那头怪兽的饥饿是永不终止的。

full.en: We have prolonged our horrific demise.
full.trans: 我们可以晚点走上最后的结局了。

chesspiece_yots.en: How curious, the things we choose to commemorate.
chesspiece_yots.trans: 我们总是选择一些古怪的东西去纪念。

moon_cap.en: It took nourishment from dead things, now its death will nourish me.
moon_cap.trans: 它从死物中汲取营养，现在它的死会滋养我。

held.en: He likes being trapped in my pocket.
held.trans: 他喜欢被困在我的口袋里。

generic.en: Does that mean spring is coming? I hope not.
generic.trans: 这意味着春天来了吗？希望不是。

beemine_maxwell.en: The furious creatures appreciate their freedom in retrospect.
beemine_maxwell.trans: 里面暴怒的生物无比怀念往昔的自由。

generic.en: Oh that my ship would dash across it.
generic.trans: 啊，我的船差点就撞上了。

lifeinjector.en: We were not meant to cheat death.

yotb_sewingmachine.en: Mother liked to sew matching outfits for Abigail and I.
yotb_sewingmachine.trans: 妈妈以前喜欢给我和阿比盖尔缝衣服。

firestarter.en: Do you wish to see the world burn?
firestarter.trans: 你想看到这个世界燃烧吗？

ghost.en: A heart could return %s to this world...
ghost.trans: 一颗心便能帮助%s回到这个世界…

murderer.en: Murderer! Cutthroat!
murderer.trans: 谋杀者！杀人凶手！

attacker.en: %s... they'll betray us.

reviver.en: Abigail likes you, %s.

generic.en: How do you do, %s?

playing.en: Oh... I think I'm doing... well?

generic.en: It wants something first... something shiny.
generic.trans: 它想要点东西……要点发光的东西。

balloon.en: A colorful reminder that my childhood is no more.
balloon.trans: 一个彩色的提示，我的童年已不再。

slingshotammo_purebrilliance.en: Someone could trip and break their neck. Maybe it will be me.
slingshotammo_purebrilliance.trans: 有人可能会被绊倒，摔断脖子。也许会是我。

costume_tree_body.en: Shall we play a game of dress-up, Abigail?
costume_tree_body.trans: 我们要不要玩个换装游戏，阿比盖尔？

pottedfern.en: Its growth is stunted by the limits of the pot.

chesspiece_wagboss_robot.en: It was built to bring death.
chesspiece_wagboss_robot.trans: 建造它的目的就是制造死亡。

chesspiece_carrat.en: If only I could feel so serene.
chesspiece_carrat.trans: 要是我也能感到这样平静就好了。

announce_dig_disease_warning.en: Your death has been delayed another day.
announce_dig_disease_warning.trans: 你的死期又一次被延迟了。

describe_plantstressed.en: Something around is making its life quite difficult.
describe_plantstressed.trans: 周围的一些东西让它的生活相当困难。

prey.en: You'll appreciate the gift of life better now.
prey.trans: 现在你会更珍惜生命的礼物。

spider.en: You should be thankful I'm sparing you.
spider.trans: 你应该感谢我饶你一命。

generic.en: You shall live. For now.
generic.trans: 你应该活着，至少目前不能死。

pig.trans: 今天你逃过了一死，野兽。

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 是秃鹫。可是有哪里不对劲。

1.trans: 一个丢失的灵魂，现在找到了归途。

2.trans: 我们找到它们了，阿比盖尔！

3.en: Much like death, I'll always find you.
3.trans: 我就像死神一样，总会找到你的。

4.en: You only have yourself to blame. And your tail.
4.trans: 你只能怪自己，还有你的尾巴。

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: I'm sorry... I'm getting so tired...

wintersfeastfuel.en: Abigail, it's like I can taste mother's cooking...
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 阿比盖尔，这个就像妈妈做的味道一样……

tallbirdegg_cracked.en: I spared it the torment of living.
tallbirdegg_cracked.trans: 我让它免于经历生活的痛苦。

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: This must be where we part ways. Goodbye.
announce_ticoon_abandoned.trans: 这就是我们分道扬镳的地方了。再见。

1.en: Why should my life be anything other than pain...
1.trans: 反正我的生活除了痛苦别无一物……

2.en: What a terrible poison... I feel as though I might burn up.
2.trans: 多么可怕的毒药……我觉得我可能会烧起来。

announce_nodangersiesta.en: I couldn't possibly nap. Death is nigh.
announce_nodangersiesta.trans: 我连打个盹都不行。死亡近在眼前。

1.en: I must carry... my own burden...
1.trans: 我自己的包袱...必须我自己扛...

2.trans: 我不需要...帮助...

8.en: Don't worry... Abby... I got it...

9.en: My heart is heavy enough... without this...
9.trans: 我内心已经极其沉重了...怎么还来这个...

announce_lunarhail_bird_sounds.en: Those birds are singing their last.

announce_elixir_boosted.trans: 所有的慰籍都是短暂的。

1.en: It's close... I can feel it...

2.en: It's calling to me... it's nearby...
2.trans: 它在召唤我……在这附近……

announce_pocketwatch_portal.en: It looks like I survived the journey. Oh well, there's always next time.
announce_pocketwatch_portal.trans: 看起来我在旅途中幸存下来了。哦，好吧，总会有下一次的。

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: The knights must not be ready to return yet.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 骑士们也许还没准备好回来。

1.en: Of course you'd go in the opposite direction.
1.trans: 我一看你就跑错方向了。

2.en: Are you trying to mock me, Carrat?
2.trans: 你是在笑我吗，胡萝卜鼠？

level3.en: Abigail has always been my guiding light in the darkness...
level3.trans: 阿比盖尔一直是我黑暗中的指路明灯……

level2.en: You seem to have brightened up a bit, Abigail.
level2.trans: 你的脸色明亮起来了，阿比盖尔。

announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.en: If Abigail cannot rest, I won't either.
announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 如果阿比盖尔不休息，我也不休息。

announce_shelter.en: Nature is good for something after all.
announce_shelter.trans: 大自然毕竟有好的一面。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.en: Do you think we'll win this, Abigail?
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.trans: 你觉得我们能赢吗，阿比盖尔？

level1.en: I know you're tired, but I can't do this alone...
level1.trans: 我知道你累了，但是我需要你……

level3.en: You've rested in peace long enough, dear sister.
level3.trans: 你已经安息的够久了，亲爱的姐妹。

level2.trans: 我需要你的帮助，阿比盖尔……

announce_ghost_hint.en: Are you showing me the way?

announce_bravery_potion.en: Bats can't scare me anymore. I can return to my melancholy.
announce_bravery_potion.trans: 蝙蝠吓不到我了。我可以回到惆怅之中了。

announce_quake.en: The ground shakes. Will it swallow me whole?
announce_quake.trans: 大地在晃动。它会将我整个吞没吗？

announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.en: Birds of a feather fall together.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: No, they wouldn't have come this far...
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.trans: 不可能，它们走不了这么远……

announce_toadescaped.en: It's gone. The earth swallowed it whole...
announce_toadescaped.trans: 它没了。土地把它全吞了...

announce_wendy_babysitter_set.en: I'll come back for you, Abby.

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: The acid rain may burn my flesh once more.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 酸雨可能会再次灼伤我的肉体。

announce_canfix.en: Unlike my heart, this could be mended.
announce_canfix.trans: 不像我的心，这个可以修补。

announce_wormhole.en: I emerge into this world once more.
announce_wormhole.trans: 我又一次出现在这个世界。

announce_compass_out.en: It feels the force of the earth no more.
announce_compass_out.trans: 它再也不能感觉到大地的力量了。

spider.en: I shall send you to the other side!
spider.trans: 我会把你送到另一个世界！

generic.en: Death will find you!

announce_fan_out.en: The fan has breathed its last.
announce_fan_out.trans: 风扇呼出了最后一口气。

announce_weight_heavy.en:
Weight: {weight}
Burdened with yet another terrible weight...
announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量: {weight}
又多了一样讨厌的负担……

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: It won't survive these rough waters... perhaps I won't either.
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 它不会在这汹涌的水流中幸存……也许我也不会。

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: I can't sleep if I'm not surrounded by darkness.

announce_mount_lowhealth.en: This beast... is not long for this world.

announce_hunt_lost_trail.trans: 这个痕迹没有指向任何地方。

announce_hunt_beast_nearby.en: I sense the beast's presence nearby.

announce_boat_leak.trans: 我们的船流下咸咸的眼泪。

announce_highresearch.en: I have seen the void and it is deep and dark.
announce_highresearch.trans: 我看到了虚空，它深沉而又黑暗。

announce_shadow_rift_max.en: That glow... does it lead to my doom?
announce_shadow_rift_max.trans: 那个光芒……会给我带来厄运吗？

2.trans: 我脚下的地面正在崩溃。

3.en: May the earth swallow me whole.
3.trans: 大地要把我整个吸进去了。

describe_planthappy.en: The plant, at least, seems to be doing well.

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: I suppose I might as well make myself useful.
announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 我也许该发挥点作用吧。

announce_sisturn_full_evil.en: This gives me goosebumps. I hope it was worth it.
announce_sisturn_full_evil.trans: 这让我起鸡皮疙瘩。希望这一切是值得的。

announce_tool_tooweak.en: It's not strong enough... like me...

describe_plantverystressed.en: It is positively miserable. A kindred spirit.
describe_plantverystressed.trans: 它很痛苦。跟我同命相怜。

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: No... maybe I won't put it down after all...

announce_yotd_noboats.en: The starting point is too far away...

announce_nodaysleep.en: The sun upsets me. I couldn't possibly sleep.
announce_nodaysleep.trans: 阳光让我烦躁。我没法睡觉。

announce_tool_slip.en: Oh well, I didn't need it anyways.
announce_tool_slip.trans: 哦，好吧，反正我也不需要它。

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Once more I'm left defenseless against the elements.
announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 我又对大自然毫无防备了。

announce_archive_old_knowledge.en: You already showed me this one.
announce_archive_old_knowledge.trans: 你已经给我看过这个了。

2.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.trans: 我从生命的边缘回来了。

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: This path reeks of danger and death. Shall we?
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 这条路充满了危险和死亡的味道。我们去吧？

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: Don't laugh at me Abigail! It's not funny!
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 别笑我，阿比盖尔！一点都不好笑！

describe_toodark.en: The darkness! It is too dark!

announce_moonpotion_failed.en: Sigh... I didn't really expect that to work.
announce_moonpotion_failed.trans: 叹气……本来也没指望能管用。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: I wasted time, and now doth time waste me
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.trans: 我浪费了时间，现在轮到时间来浪费我

announce_scrapbook_full.en: Nothing more will fit in my scrapbook.
announce_scrapbook_full.trans: 我的图鉴里再也放不下了。

announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.en: They've lost their way. Poor thing.

announce_winch_claw_miss.en: Everything always seems just out of my grasp...

2.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_nomountedgift.en: Can someone help me down... I have a present to open.
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 有人帮我下去吗...我有个礼物要打开。

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: No checkpoints... I suppose I can't do anything right.
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 没有检查点……我什么都做不好。

announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: At least I'll stay dry through my misery.
announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 至少我在痛苦的时候是干燥的。

announce_petrifed_trees.en: A wave of sadness just washed over me...?

announce_knockedout.en: Yet, again I wake to life. Sigh.

announce_weapon_tooweak.en: This is futile. I need something stronger.
announce_weapon_tooweak.trans: 徒劳一场。我需要更强的东西。

announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.en: Death casts its black shadow upon us.
announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.trans: 我们被死亡的阴影笼罩了。

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: I feel the thrill of power!

announce_archive_new_knowledge.en: It's filling my head with plans...
announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 它让我满脑子都是计划……

announce_monkey_curse_changeback.en: I never imagined being glad to be myself...
announce_monkey_curse_changeback.trans: 我从来没有想象过能开开心心地做自己……

announce_insufficientfertilizer.en: It could use a bit more.

no_ingredients.en: I'm always lacking something, aren't I...
no_ingredients.trans: 我总是缺点什么，不是吗……

no_tech.en: I don't know how. I'm sorry.

describe_smoldering.en: It's about to be swallowed by flames.

announce_sisturn_full.en: Now Abigail can find her way back to me faster.
announce_sisturn_full.trans: 现在阿比盖尔可以更快回到我身边了。

announce_call_beef.en: Come now dear creature, don't be afraid.
announce_call_beef.trans: 过来，亲爱的生物，别害怕。

1.en: I'm not in the mood for jokes.

2.trans: 谢谢你做出的尝试。

3.en: I only laugh to be polite.

announce_no_abigail_flower.en: I need Abby's flower to pour it on.
announce_no_abigail_flower.trans: 我需要阿比盖尔之花才能继续。

announce_reviving_corpse.trans: 你今天不会看见死神了...

announce_lightning_damage_avoided.en: So close to death, yet so far.
announce_lightning_damage_avoided.trans: 离死亡这么近，又那么远。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: And just like that, the game is over.

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: Their scent lingers here no longer.
announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.trans: 此处已经没有萦绕它们的气味。

announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.trans: 躲了死亡一时，躲不了一世。

announce_attach_buff_attack.en: It must be my imagination, but I feel a little stronger...
announce_attach_buff_attack.trans: 可能是我的想象吧，但我觉得强壮了...

describe_plantstressorseason.en: It was not made to withstand the harshness of this season.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 它是经不起这个季节的严酷考验的。

announce_rabbitking_lucky.trans: 这是一只不寻常的兔子。

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: I suppose this trail would be safer. Sigh.
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 我想这条踪迹会更安全。哎。

announce_klaus_callforhelp.en: Your pleas will fall on deaf ears.
announce_klaus_callforhelp.trans: 你的恳求只会碰到听不见的耳朵。

announce_exit_gelblob.en: I don't prefer a slow death.

announce_abigail_death.en: No... don't leave me alone again!

announce_sisturn_full_blossom.en: This might be as close as we've ever come, Abigail.
announce_sisturn_full_blossom.trans: 这也许是我们之间最接近的一刻了，阿比盖尔。

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: He knows where they are, we should follow.
announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 他知道它们在哪里，我们应该跟随。

announce_wet.en: Even wetter than when I cry myself to sleep.
announce_wet.trans: 比我在哭泣中入睡时还要湿。

announce_toadescaping.en: I hope it doesn't try to escape...
announce_toadescaping.trans: 希望它不会试着逃出去...

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: This place is too cluttered... there's hardly room to breathe...
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 这里拥挤不堪……连呼吸都困难……

announce_klaus_unchained.trans: 野兽回来了，它的枷锁解开了。

announce_adventurefail.trans: 并不是所有死亡都是相似的。

announce_no_trap.trans: 我预想会有巨大的困难。

announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 一个温柔的生物正在接近。

2.trans: 野兽来了。

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Abigail, they're playing hide and seek. Let's go!
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 阿比盖尔，它们在玩躲猫猫。我们也去吧！

announce_accomplishment_done.en: This will be forgotten too, some day.
announce_accomplishment_done.trans: 有一天，这个也会被忘记的。

spoiled.en: That food was nearing the end of its lifetime.
spoiled.trans: 这个食物已经接近生命的尾声了。

generic.en: Yum!

announce_pirates_arrive.trans: 无处可逃……该来了终于来了。

announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.en: My pain has been dulled, for the moment.

quagmire_announce_lose.en: What a horrible place to have a curse.
quagmire_announce_lose.trans: 这是一个多么可怕的诅咒之地啊。

announce_ticoon_waiting_for_leader.en: He waits in gloom for me, I should return.
announce_ticoon_waiting_for_leader.trans: 他闷闷不乐在等我，我该回去他身边。

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: There is never an end to the madness.

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: I've arrived a moment too late. Sigh...
announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.trans: 我还是来晚了一刻，可叹呐……

announce_repelled.en: It has spirits to protect it...

announce_ghost_quest.en: You need me to... find something you've lost?
announce_ghost_quest.trans: 你需要我为你找回丢失的东西吗？

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: Must you drag your heels so?

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: It's gone. And alas, I'm still here.
announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.trans: 它已经走了。唉，而我还在。

announce_nohungersiesta.en: My stomach is as empty as my heart. I can't nap now.
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 我的胃就像我的心灵一样空虚。我现在不能睡午觉。

1.en: Abigail was the one who loved the garden. She would have been better at this than me.
1.trans: 阿比盖尔生前很喜欢花园。她会比我更擅长这个。

2.en: Go on then, grow if you must.
2.trans: 长吧，如果你非要长的话。

3.en: I'll try to make your fleeting time in this world as comfortable as I can.
3.trans: 我会尽量让你在这个世界上短暂的时间过得舒服些。

4.en: It must be so lonely, being stuck in the ground...

5.en: Shall I stay and talk with you for a while?
5.trans: 要不要我留下来和你聊一会？

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.en: No trail, just a bunch of muck.
announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 没有痕迹，只有一堆泥土。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: Maybe I could... join in the feast...

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: He would like me to follow, so I shall.
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 既然他想让我跟着，那我就跟着。

announce_snowball_no_snow.en: The ground lies barren, stripped of its winter coat.
announce_snowball_no_snow.trans: 大地光秃秃的躺着，被剥去了它的冬衣。

announce_nodangergift.en: There's no time for presents, death has finally come for me!
announce_nodangergift.trans: 没有时间去管礼物了，死亡终于来了！

announce_wetter.en: An eternity of moisture and sorrow.

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: Everything is falling apart. Like usual.
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 一切都分崩离析。像往常一样。

announce_mosquitos.en: Mosquitoes! Let my veins be a feast!
announce_mosquitos.trans: 蚊子！尽情享用我的鲜血吧！

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: Perhaps it might need some water?

announce_nodangersleep.en: I can't sleep, there's death to be had.

announce_worms.en: Uh-oh. I think we should leave.
